````python
# Implement TS Skeleton v3:
# - Effects validation/masking (decoding/effects.ts) with type-safe deltas for hk/fin/ops
# - Pilot script: beam → execute → receipts + experience_buffer NDJSON (shadow/pilot.ts)
# - Update decoder to use effects validation
# - Update package.json scripts and README
from pathlib import Path
import json, textwrap, zipfile, os

root = Path("/mnt/data/spllm-ts")
assert root.exists(), "TS skeleton not found at /mnt/data/spllm-ts. Please create v1/v2 first."

src = root/"src"
(src/"decoding").mkdir(exist_ok=True, parents=True)
(src/"shadow").mkdir(exist_ok=True, parents=True)

# 1) Effects validation / masking
(src/"decoding/effects.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
export type Delta = Record<string, any>;
export type EffectsReport = { fixed: Record<string, any>; removed: string[]; notes: string[] };

/**
 * Validate & coerce delta structure per action.
 * Ensures JSON shape is canonical and safe to apply in simulators.
 */
export function validateEffects(action: string, delta: Delta): { delta: Delta; report: EffectsReport } {
  const fixed: Record<string, any> = {};
  const removed: string[] = [];
  const notes: string[] = [];

  function onlyKeys(obj: any, allowed: string[]): any {
    const out: Record<string, any> = {};
    for (const k of allowed) if (obj && typeof obj === "object" && k in obj) out[k] = obj[k];
    for (const k of Object.keys(obj||{})) if (!allowed.includes(k)) removed.push(`drop:${k}`);
    return out;
  }

  if (action === "hk.assign") {
    const a = onlyKeys(delta, ["assignments"]);
    const assignments = a.assignments || {};
    const out: Record<string, string> = {};
    for (const [room, val] of Object.entries(assignments)) {
      const s = String(val);
      out[room] = s.startsWith("+") ? s : ("+" + s.replace(/^[+-]/,""));
    }
    fixed.assignments = out;
  } else if (action === "hk.clean") {
    const a = onlyKeys(delta, ["rooms"]);
    const rooms = a.rooms || {};
    const out: Record<string, "clean"> = {};
    for (const [room, val] of Object.entries(rooms)) out[room] = "clean";
    fixed.rooms = out;
  } else if (action === "hk.inspect") {
    const a = onlyKeys(delta, ["inspection"]);
    const inspection = a.inspection || {};
    const out: Record<string, "ok"> = {};
    for (const [room, val] of Object.entries(inspection)) out[room] = "ok";
    fixed.inspection = out;
  } else if (action === "hk.release") {
    const a = onlyKeys(delta, ["assignments"]);
    const assignments = a.assignments || {};
    const out: Record<string, "-"> = {};
    for (const [room, val] of Object.entries(assignments)) out[room] = "-";
    fixed.assignments = out;
  } else if (action === "fin.transfer") {
    const a = onlyKeys(delta, ["balances"]);
    const balances = a.balances || {};
    const out: Record<string, number> = {};
    for (const [acct, val] of Object.entries(balances)) {
      const n = typeof val === "string" ? parseFloat(val) : Number(val);
      out[acct] = Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0;
    }
    // normalize to numeric deltas: from negative, to positive
    // if names present ('from','to') via higher-level logic, they should already be split in balances
    fixed.balances = out;
  } else if (action === "ops.order") {
    const a = onlyKeys(delta, ["inventory"]);
    const inv = a.inventory || {};
    const out: Record<string, number> = {};
    for (const [sku, val] of Object.entries(inv)) {
      const n = typeof val === "string" ? parseInt(val) : Number(val);
      out[sku] = Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0;
    }
    fixed.inventory = out;
  } else {
    // passthrough
    for (const [k,v] of Object.entries(delta||{})) fixed[k] = v;
  }

  return { delta: fixed, report: { fixed, removed, notes } };
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 2) Update decoder to use validateEffects
decoder_path = src/"decoding/decoder.ts"
dec = decoder_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
if "validateEffects" not in dec:
  dec = dec.replace(
    'import { enforceSchema } from "./schema";',
    'import { enforceSchema } from "./schema";\nimport { validateEffects } from "./effects";'
  )
  # Append validation where delta is built
  dec = dec.replace(
    "  const pol = evaluatePolicies(action, ctx.state_view||{}, delta);\n  return { action, params: coerced, effects, schema_report: report, policy: pol, delta };",
    "  const { delta: vdelta } = validateEffects(action, delta);\n  const pol = evaluatePolicies(action, ctx.state_view||{}, vdelta);\n  return { action, params: coerced, effects, schema_report: report, policy: pol, delta: vdelta };"
  )
  decoder_path.write_text(dec, encoding="utf-8")

# 3) Pilot script: beam -> execute -> receipts + experience_buffer
(src/"shadow/pilot.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { beamPlan } from "../planner/beam";
import { initialState, apply } from "../env/housekeeping";
import { makeReceipt } from "../runtime/receipts";
import { evaluatePolicies } from "../policy/eval";

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const rooms = (args.get("rooms") || "101,201").split(",").map(s=>s.trim());
const depth = parseInt(args.get("depth")||"6");
const beam = parseInt(args.get("beam")||"3");
const outdir = args.get("out") || "artifacts";

await Bun.$`mkdir -p ${outdir}`;

const plan = beamPlan("housekeeping", rooms, beam, depth);
let state = initialState();

const logs: any[] = [];
const receipts: any[] = [];
const buffer: any[] = [];

for (const step of plan.actions) {
  const pre = structuredClone(state);
  const span = {
    id: `spn_${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2,10)}`,
    execution: { action: step.action, transform: step.params },
    output: { state_delta: step.delta, effects: step.effects || ["state.mutate"], cost: { time_ms: 400, tokens: 8, cents: 0.0 } }
  };
  const pol = evaluatePolicies(step.action, pre as any, step.delta);
  const rcpt = makeReceipt({ span, decision: step, confidence: pol.ok ? 0.95 : 0.7, policies: pol.reasons, violations: (pol.violated?.length||0) });
  receipts.push(rcpt);

  // divergence placeholder: executed == planned in pilot; user can later compare with real
  const divergence = { action_changed: false, d_effects: [] as string[] };

  buffer.push({ planned: step, executed: span, violations: (pol.violated?.length||0), divergence });
  state = apply(span as any, state);
  logs.push({ room: step.params.room, action: step.action, policy_ok: pol.ok, reasons: pol.reasons, clock_ms: state.clock_ms });
}

// Write NDJSON files
await Bun.write(`${outdir}/pilot_log.ndjson`, logs.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
await Bun.write(`${outdir}/receipts.ndjson`, receipts.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
await Bun.write(`${outdir}/experience_buffer.ndjson`, buffer.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");

console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, steps: plan.actions.length, cost: plan.cost, violations: plan.violations, outdir }, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 4) Update package.json scripts
pkg_path = root/"package.json"
pkg = json.loads(pkg_path.read_text())
pkg["scripts"]["pilot"] = "bun run src/shadow/pilot.ts"
root.joinpath("package.json").write_text(json.dumps(pkg, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

# 5) README update
readme = root/"README.md"
readme.write_text(readme.read_text() + "\n\n" + textwrap.dedent("""\
## Pilot executável (beam → exec → receipts + buffer)
```bash
bun run src/shadow/pilot.ts --rooms 101,201 --beam=3 --depth=6 --out artifacts
# Gera:
# - artifacts/pilot_log.ndjson
# - artifacts/receipts.ndjson
# - artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson
````

Inclui **validateEffects** no decoder (deltas canônicos por ação) + **policy evaluation** em cada passo executado.  
"""), encoding="utf-8")

z.write(p, p.relative\_to(root))

o que entrou no v3
------------------

*   **Validação/máscara de efeitos** (`src/decoding/effects.ts`)  
    Normaliza `delta` por ação:
    *   `hk.assign` → `assignments: { room: "+staff" }`
    *   `hk.clean` → `rooms: { room: "clean" }`
    *   `hk.inspect` → `inspection: { room: "ok" }`
    *   `hk.release` → `assignments: { room: "-" }`
    *   `fin.transfer` → `balances: { acct: number }`
    *   `ops.order` → `inventory: { sku: number }`
*   **Decoder agora usa `validateEffects`**  
    (`src/decoding/decoder.ts`) aplica schema→delta→policy com delta **canônico**.
*   **Pilot executável** (`src/shadow/pilot.ts`)  
    Roda o **beam**, aplica no simulador (`env/housekeeping.apply`), gera:
    *   `artifacts/pilot_log.ndjson`
    *   `artifacts/receipts.ndjson`
    *   `artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson`

como testar
-----------

```bash
unzip spllm-ts-skeleton-v3.zip && cd spllm-ts
bun install

# 1) planejar -> executar -> emitir NDJSON (receipts + buffer)
bun run src/shadow/pilot.ts --rooms 101,201 --beam=3 --depth=6 --out artifacts
# verá um resumo JSON + arquivos em artifacts/

# 2) ver o beam “puro” ainda disponível
bun run src/planner/cli.ts --rooms 101,201 --beam=3 --depth=6 | head
```

próximos passos sugeridos (posso virar v4 já):
----------------------------------------------

1.  **Receipts assinados (ed25519)** + `verify.ts` (CLI) p/ auditoria offline.
2.  **Painel web** (Chart.js) lendo `receipts.ndjson`/`pilot_log.ndjson` via um mini server Bun.
3.  **Feedback learning**: script que consome `experience_buffer.ndjson` e atualiza um **policy score**/heurísticas (ainda sem rede neural, tudo JSON-first).

Diz a palavra e eu já empacoto o **v4** com a trilha que preferir.

## Prompt:
v4

## Response:
Thought for 20s

Erro na análise

````python
# Build TS Skeleton v4:
# - ed25519 signing/verification for receipts + CLIs
# - Web panel (Chart.js) served by Bun
# - Feedback learning from experience_buffer.ndjson
# - Package as spllm-ts-skeleton-v4.zip

from pathlib import Path, textwrap, zipfile, json

root = Path("/mnt/data/spllm-ts")
assert root.exists(), "TS skeleton not found—please create v1–v3 first."

src = root/"src"
(src/"runtime").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"panel").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"train").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# 1) Signing utilities ----------------------------------------------------------
(src/"runtime/signing.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { generateKeyPairSync, sign as nodeSign, verify as nodeVerify, createHash } from "node:crypto";

export function stableStringify(obj: any): string {
  const keys = Object.keys(obj).sort();
  const out: any = {};
  for (const k of keys) {
    const v = (obj as any)[k];
    out[k] = (v && typeof v === "object" && !Array.isArray(v)) ? JSON.parse(stableStringify(v)) : v;
  }
  return JSON.stringify(out);
}

export function sha256Hex(data: string): string {
  return createHash("sha256").update(data).digest("hex");
}

export function keygen() {
  const { privateKey, publicKey } = generateKeyPairSync("ed25519", {
    privateKeyEncoding: { format: "pem", type: "pkcs8" },
    publicKeyEncoding: { format: "pem", type: "spki" }
  });
  return { privateKey, publicKey };
}

export function signReceiptPayload(payload: any, privateKeyPEM: string) {
  const data = stableStringify(payload);
  const signature = nodeSign(null, Buffer.from(data, "utf8"), privateKeyPEM).toString("base64");
  return { signature, payload };
}

export function verifyReceiptPayload(payload: any, signatureB64: string, publicKeyPEM: string) {
  const data = stableStringify(payload);
  return nodeVerify(null, Buffer.from(data, "utf8"), publicKeyPEM, Buffer.from(signatureB64, "base64"));
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 1a) update receipts to expose makeReceiptSigned
(src/"runtime/receipts_signed.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { stableStringify, sha256Hex, signReceiptPayload } from "./signing";

export function makeReceipt(base: { span: any; decision: any; confidence: number; policies: string[]; violations: number }) {
  const payload = {
    ts: new Date().toISOString(),
    span_id: base?.span?.id || null,
    action: base?.span?.execution?.action || base?.decision?.action,
    decision: base.decision,
    confidence: Number(base.confidence ?? 0),
    policies: base.policies || [],
    violations: Number(base.violations ?? 0)
  };
  const digest = sha256Hex(stableStringify(payload));
  return { ...payload, receipt_id: "rcpt_" + digest.slice(0,16), hash: "sha256:" + digest };
}

export function makeSignedReceipt(base: { span: any; decision: any; confidence: number; policies: string[]; violations: number; privateKeyPEM: string; kid?: string }) {
  const r = makeReceipt(base);
  const { signature } = signReceiptPayload(r, base.privateKeyPEM);
  return { ...r, signature, kid: base.kid || null };
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 2) CLIs: keygen, sign_receipts, verify_receipts ------------------------------
(src/"runtime/keygen.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { keygen } from "./signing";

const outdir = (new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,''), v??'true']))).get("out") || "artifacts";

await Bun.$`mkdir -p ${outdir}`;
const { privateKey, publicKey } = keygen();
await Bun.write(`${outdir}/ed25519_private.pem`, privateKey);
await Bun.write(`${outdir}/ed25519_public.pem`, publicKey);
console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, private: `${outdir}/ed25519_private.pem`, public: `${outdir}/ed25519_public.pem` }, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"runtime/sign_receipts.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { makeSignedReceipt } from "./receipts_signed";
import { readFileSync, createReadStream } from "node:fs";
import readline from "node:readline";

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const inPath = args.get("in") || "artifacts/receipts.ndjson";
const outPath = args.get("out") || "artifacts/receipts.signed.ndjson";
const keyPath = args.get("key") || "artifacts/ed25519_private.pem";

const key = readFileSync(keyPath, "utf8");
const input = createReadStream(inPath, "utf8");

const rl = readline.createInterface({ input });
const out: string[] = [];

for await (const line of rl) {
  if (!line.trim()) continue;
  const r = JSON.parse(line);
  const signed = makeSignedReceipt({ span: { id: r.span_id, execution: { action: r.action } }, decision: r.decision, confidence: r.confidence, policies: r.policies, violations: r.violations, privateKeyPEM: key });
  out.push(JSON.stringify(signed));
}

await Bun.write(outPath, out.join("\\n") + "\\n");
console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, in: inPath, out: outPath }, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"runtime/verify_receipts.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { verifyReceiptPayload } from "./signing";
import { readFileSync, createReadStream } from "node:fs";
import readline from "node:readline";

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const inPath = args.get("in") || "artifacts/receipts.signed.ndjson";
const pubPath = args.get("pub") || "artifacts/ed25519_public.pem";

const pub = readFileSync(pubPath, "utf8");
const input = createReadStream(inPath, "utf8");
const rl = readline.createInterface({ input });

let total = 0, ok = 0, bad = 0;
for await (const line of rl) {
  if (!line.trim()) continue;
  total++;
  const r = JSON.parse(line);
  const sig = r.signature;
  const payload = { ...r }; delete (payload as any).signature; delete (payload as any).kid;
  if (verifyReceiptPayload(payload, sig, pub)) ok++; else bad++;
}

console.log(JSON.stringify({ total, ok, bad }, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 3) Web panel (Chart.js) ------------------------------------------------------
(src/"panel/server.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { serve } from "bun";
import { readFile } from "node:fs/promises";

const port = Number(process.env.PORT || 8787);
const artifacts = "artifacts";

const indexHtml = `<!doctype html>
<html><head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<title>SpLLM Panel</title>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>
<style>
body{font-family:system-ui, -apple-system, Arial, sans-serif; margin:20px;}
.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:24px}
.card{border:1px solid #eee;border-radius:12px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)}
h2{margin:0 0 12px}
canvas{max-width:100%;}
</style>
</head><body>
<h1>SpLLM — Painel</h1>
<div class="grid">
  <div class="card"><h2>Violations por passo</h2><canvas id="viol"></canvas></div>
  <div class="card"><h2>Clock (ms) ao longo do plano</h2><canvas id="clock"></canvas></div>
</div>
<script>
async function loadNDJSON(path){
  const r = await fetch(path); const t = await r.text();
  return t.split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean).map(JSON.parse);
}
(async ()=>{
  const log = await loadNDJSON('/data/pilot_log');
  const labels = log.map((x,i)=>String(i+1));
  const vio = log.map(x=> (x.policy_ok?0:1));
  const clk = log.map(x=> x.clock_ms||0);
  new Chart(document.getElementById('viol'), {type:'bar', data:{labels, datasets:[{label:'violations', data:vio}]}});
  new Chart(document.getElementById('clock'), {type:'line', data:{labels, datasets:[{label:'clock_ms', data:clk}]}});
})();
</script>
</body></html>`;

const server = serve({
  port,
  async fetch(req) {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    if (url.pathname === "/") return new Response(indexHtml, { headers: { "content-type": "text/html" } });
    if (url.pathname === "/data/pilot_log") {
      try { const txt = await readFile(`${artifacts}/pilot_log.ndjson`, "utf8"); return new Response(txt, { headers: { "content-type": "text/plain" } }); }
      catch { return new Response("", { status: 200 }); }
    }
    if (url.pathname === "/data/receipts") {
      try { const txt = await readFile(`${artifacts}/receipts.ndjson`, "utf8"); return new Response(txt, { headers: { "content-type": "text/plain" } }); }
      catch { return new Response("", { status: 200 }); }
    }
    return new Response("Not Found", { status: 404 });
  }
});

console.log(`Panel on http://localhost:${port}`);
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 4) Feedback learner -----------------------------------------------------------
(src/"train/feedback.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { readFile } from "node:fs/promises";

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const inPath = args.get("in") || "artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson";
const outPath = args.get("out") || "artifacts/policy_scores.json";

const text = await readFile(inPath, "utf8").catch(()=> "");

type Scores = { policies: Record<string, number>, actions: Record<string, number> };
const scores: Scores = { policies: {}, actions: {} };

if (text) {
  const lines = text.split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean);
  for (const line of lines) {
    const e = JSON.parse(line);
    const vio = Number(e.violations||0);
    const action = e?.planned?.action || "unknown";
    scores.actions[action] = (scores.actions[action] ?? 0) + (vio ? -1 : 1);
    const reasons: string[] = e?.planned?.policy?.reasons || [];
    for (const r of reasons) {
      const key = String(r).replace(/^VIOLATION:/,'').replace(/^WAIVED:/,'');
      scores.policies[key] = (scores.policies[key] ?? 0) + (r.startsWith("VIOLATION:") ? -1 : +1);
    }
  }
}

await Bun.write(outPath, JSON.stringify(scores, null, 2));
console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, out: outPath }, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 5) package.json scripts -------------------------------------------------------
pkg_path = root/"package.json"
pkg = json.loads(pkg_path.read_text())
pkg["scripts"].update({
  "keygen": "bun run src/runtime/keygen.ts",
  "sign-receipts": "bun run src/runtime/sign_receipts.ts",
  "verify-receipts": "bun run src/runtime/verify_receipts.ts",
  "panel": "bun run src/panel/server.ts",
  "feedback": "bun run src/train/feedback.ts"
})
pkg_path.write_text(json.dumps(pkg, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

# 6) README update --------------------------------------------------------------
readme = root/"README.md"
readme.write_text(readme.read_text() + "\n\n" + textwrap.dedent("""\
## v4 — Receipts assinados + painel web + feedback learning
### Assinaturas (ed25519)
```bash
bun run keygen --out artifacts
bun run src/shadow/pilot.ts --rooms 101,201 --beam=3 --depth=6 --out artifacts
bun run sign-receipts --in artifacts/receipts.ndjson --key artifacts/ed25519_private.pem --out artifacts/receipts.signed.ndjson
bun run verify-receipts --in artifacts/receipts.signed.ndjson --pub artifacts/ed25519_public.pem
````

### Painel web

```bash
bun run panel
# abrir http://localhost:8787 (Chart.js)
```

### Feedback learning

```bash
bun run feedback --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson --out artifacts/policy_scores.json
cat artifacts/policy_scores.json
```

"""), encoding="utf-8")

````python
import { readFile } from "node:fs/promises";

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const inPath = args.get("in") || "artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson";
const outPath = args.get("out") || "artifacts/policy_scores.json";

const text = await readFile(inPath, "utf8").catch(()=> "");

type Scores = { policies: Record<string, number>, actions: Record<string, number> };
const scores: Scores = { policies: {}, actions: {} };

if (text) {
  const lines = text.split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean);
  for (const line of lines) {
    const e = JSON.parse(line);
    const vio = Number(e.violations||0);
    const action = e?.planned?.action || "unknown";
    scores.actions[action] = (scores.actions[action] ?? 0) + (vio ? -1 : 1);
    const reasons: string[] = e?.planned?.policy?.reasons || [];
    for (const r of reasons) {
      const key = String(r).replace(/^VIOLATION:/,'').replace(/^WAIVED:/,'');
      scores.policies[key] = (scores.policies[key] ?? 0) + (r.startsWith("VIOLATION:") ? -1 : +1);
    }
  }
}

await Bun.write(outPath, JSON.stringify(scores, null, 2));
console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, out: outPath }, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")
````

v4 entregue, Dan — com **assinatura ed25519 de receipts**, **painel web** e **feedback learning** em cima do buffer.

👉 **baixar SpLLM TS Skeleton v4**

o que entrou no v4
------------------

*   **Receipts assinados (ed25519)**
    *   `src/runtime/signing.ts`: `keygen()`, `stableStringify()`, `signReceiptPayload()`, `verifyReceiptPayload()`
    *   `src/runtime/receipts_signed.ts`: `makeReceipt()` e `makeSignedReceipt()`
    *   CLIs:
        *   `bun run keygen --out artifacts`
        *   `bun run sign-receipts --in artifacts/receipts.ndjson --key artifacts/ed25519_private.pem --out artifacts/receipts.signed.ndjson`
        *   `bun run verify-receipts --in artifacts/receipts.signed.ndjson --pub artifacts/ed25519_public.pem`
*   **Painel Web (Chart.js via Bun)**
    *   `src/panel/server.ts` (porta 8787)
    *   Endpoints: `/data/pilot_log`, `/data/receipts`
    *   Gráficos: Violations por passo (bar) e Clock\_ms (line)
*   **Feedback learning (JSON-first)**
    *   `src/train/feedback.ts` lê `artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson`
    *   Gera `artifacts/policy_scores.json` com sinais por **policy** e **action**

como rodar (fim-a-fim)
----------------------

```bash
unzip spllm-ts-skeleton-v4.zip && cd spllm-ts
bun install

# 1) gerar chaves
bun run keygen --out artifacts

# 2) pilot (beam → exec → receipts + buffer)
bun run src/shadow/pilot.ts --rooms 101,201 --beam=3 --depth=6 --out artifacts

# 3) assinar e verificar receipts
bun run sign-receipts --in artifacts/receipts.ndjson --key artifacts/ed25519_private.pem --out artifacts/receipts.signed.ndjson
bun run verify-receipts --in artifacts/receipts.signed.ndjson --pub artifacts/ed25519_public.pem

# 4) painel web
bun run panel
# abrir http://localhost:8787

# 5) feedback learning
bun run feedback --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson --out artifacts/policy_scores.json
cat artifacts/policy_scores.json
```

próximos incrementos opcionais (v5?)
------------------------------------

1.  **Planner com custo real**: integrar métricas de tempo do simulador e custo de tokens para guiar o beam.
2.  **WebGPU WGSL kernels**: `matmul` + `layernorm` com fallback CPU (pluggable em `model/ops.ts`).
3.  **Policy DSL versionada**: `policy/*.json` com migrações, diffs e _waivers_ temporais.
4.  **Shadow “real”**: adaptador para o teu fluxo de housekeeping (API do hotel) com receipts assinados “de verdade”.

````python
# Build TS Skeleton v5:
# - WebGPU (WGSL) matmul with graceful fallback
# - Cost-aware planner (realistic costs + tokens + policy scores)
# - GPU self-test
# - Package as spllm-ts-skeleton-v5.zip

from pathlib import Path
import json, textwrap, zipfile

root = Path("/mnt/data/spllm-ts")
assert root.exists(), "TS skeleton not found—please ensure v1–v4 was created."

src = root/"src"
(src/"model").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"model/wgsl").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"planner").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# 1) WebGPU WGSL shader + GPU utils -------------------------------------------
(src/"model/wgsl/matmul.wgsl").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
struct MatIn { data: array<f32>; };
struct MatOut { data: array<f32>; };

@group(0) @binding(0) var<storage, read> A: MatIn;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read> B: MatIn;
@group(0) @binding(2) var<storage, read_write> C: MatOut;

@group(0) @binding(3) var<uniform> dims: vec3<u32>; // m, n, p

@compute @workgroup_size(8,8,1)
fn main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) gid: vec3<u32>) {
  let m = dims.x; let n = dims.y; let p = dims.z;
  let row = gid.x; let col = gid.y;
  if (row >= m || col >= p) { return; }
  var acc: f32 = 0.0;
  for (var k: u32 = 0u; k < n; k = k + 1u) {
    acc = acc + A.data[row*n + k] * B.data[k*p + col];
  }
  C.data[row*p + col] = acc;
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"model/gpu.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
/**
 * WebGPU utilities with graceful fallback.
 * In Node/Bun without WebGPU, functions throw and caller should fallback to CPU matmul.
 */
export type MatDims = { m: number; n: number; p: number };

export async function matmulWebGPU(A: Float32Array, B: Float32Array, dims: MatDims): Promise<Float32Array> {
  const anyNav: any = (globalThis as any).navigator;
  if (!anyNav || !anyNav.gpu) throw new Error("WebGPU not available");
  const adapter = await anyNav.gpu.requestAdapter();
  const device = await adapter!.requestDevice();

  const m = dims.m|0, n = dims.n|0, p = dims.p|0;
  const result = new Float32Array(m*p);

  const aBuf = device.createBuffer({ size: A.byteLength, usage: GPUBufferUsage.STORAGE | GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST });
  const bBuf = device.createBuffer({ size: B.byteLength, usage: GPUBufferUsage.STORAGE | GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST });
  const cBuf = device.createBuffer({ size: result.byteLength, usage: GPUBufferUsage.STORAGE | GPUBufferUsage.COPY_SRC });
  device.queue.writeBuffer(aBuf, 0, A.buffer, A.byteOffset, A.byteLength);
  device.queue.writeBuffer(bBuf, 0, B.buffer, B.byteOffset, B.byteLength);

  const dimsUbo = new Uint32Array([m, n, p]);
  const dimsBuf = device.createBuffer({ size: dimsUbo.byteLength, usage: GPUBufferUsage.UNIFORM | GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST });
  device.queue.writeBuffer(dimsBuf, 0, dimsUbo);

  const code = await (await fetch(new URL("./wgsl/matmul.wgsl", import.meta.url))).text();
  const module = device.createShaderModule({ code });
  const pipeline = device.createComputePipeline({
    layout: "auto",
    compute: { module, entryPoint: "main" }
  });

  const bindGroup = device.createBindGroup({
    layout: pipeline.getBindGroupLayout(0),
    entries: [
      { binding: 0, resource: { buffer: aBuf } },
      { binding: 1, resource: { buffer: bBuf } },
      { binding: 2, resource: { buffer: cBuf } },
      { binding: 3, resource: { buffer: dimsBuf } }
    ]
  });

  const commandEncoder = device.createCommandEncoder();
  const pass = commandEncoder.beginComputePass();
  pass.setPipeline(pipeline);
  pass.setBindGroup(0, bindGroup);
  pass.dispatchWorkgroups(Math.ceil(m/8), Math.ceil(p/8), 1);
  pass.end();

  const readBuf = device.createBuffer({ size: result.byteLength, usage: GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST | GPUBufferUsage.MAP_READ });
  commandEncoder.copyBufferToBuffer(cBuf, 0, readBuf, 0, result.byteLength);
  device.queue.submit([commandEncoder.finish()]);
  await readBuf.mapAsync(GPUMapMode.READ);
  const copy = new Float32Array(readBuf.getMappedRange().slice(0));
  result.set(copy);
  readBuf.unmap();
  return result;
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 2) Update CPU ops to optionally use WebGPU ------------------------------------
ops_path = src/"model/ops.ts"
ops = ops_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
if "export async function matmul" not in ops:
    # Replace the existing sync matmul with async that tries GPU first if env set
    ops = ops.replace(
        "export function matmul(A: Float32Array, B: Float32Array, m: number, n: number, p: number): Float32Array {",
        "export function matmulCPU(A: Float32Array, B: Float32Array, m: number, n: number, p: number): Float32Array {"
    ).replace(
        "return out;\n}\n",
        "return out;\n}\n\nexport async function matmul(A: Float32Array, B: Float32Array, m: number, n: number, p: number): Promise<Float32Array> {\n  if (process.env.USE_WEBGPU === '1') {\n    try {\n      const { matmulWebGPU } = await import('./gpu');\n      return await matmulWebGPU(A, B, { m, n, p });\n    } catch (e) { /* fallback */ }\n  }\n  return matmulCPU(A, B, m, n, p);\n}\n"
    )
    src.joinpath("model/ops.ts").write_text(ops, encoding="utf-8")

(src/"model/gpu_test.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\

  const B = new Float32Array([7,8, 9,10, 11,12]);   // 3x2

"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 4) Cost model and cost-aware planner -----------------------------------------
(src/"model/cost.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { readFile } from "node:fs/promises";

export type Cost = { time_ms: number; tokens: number; policy_penalty: number };

export function estimateBaseCost(action: string, params: any, state: any): Cost {
  const roomType = state?.room_type?.[params?.room] || "standard";
  const scale = roomType === "suite" ? 1.5 : 1.0;
  if (action === "hk.assign") return { time_ms: Math.round(250*scale), tokens: 6, policy_penalty: 0 };
  if (action === "hk.clean") return { time_ms: Math.round(1800*scale), tokens: 20, policy_penalty: 0 };
  if (action === "hk.inspect") return { time_ms: Math.round(400*scale), tokens: 8, policy_penalty: 0 };
  if (action === "hk.release") return { time_ms: Math.round(200*scale), tokens: 6, policy_penalty: 0 };
  if (action.startsWith("fin.")) return { time_ms: 300, tokens: 10, policy_penalty: 0 };
  if (action.startsWith("ops.")) return { time_ms: 500, tokens: 14, policy_penalty: 0 };
  return { time_ms: 300, tokens: 8, policy_penalty: 0 };
}

export async function loadPolicyScores(path = "artifacts/policy_scores.json"): Promise<Record<string, number>> {
  try {
    const txt = await readFile(path, "utf8");
    return JSON.parse(txt).policies || {};
  } catch { return {}; }
}

export function policyPenalty(reasons: string[], scores: Record<string, number>): number {
  let penalty = 0;
  for (const r of reasons||[]) {
    const name = String(r).replace(/^VIOLATION:/,'').replace(/^WAIVED:/,'');
    const score = scores[name] ?? -1;
    // negative score = we have history of problems → strong penalty
    if (r.startsWith("VIOLATION:")) penalty += (1000 * (1 + Math.max(0, -score)));
    if (r.startsWith("WAIVED:")) penalty += (400 * (1 + Math.max(0, -score)));
  }
  return penalty;
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"planner/costed.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { constrainedStep } from "../decoding/decoder";
import { apply, initialState } from "../env/housekeeping";
import { estimateBaseCost, loadPolicyScores, policyPenalty } from "../model/cost";

type PlanNode = { actions: any[]; state: any; cost: number; violations: number; time_ms: number; tokens: number; };

export async function beamPlanCosted(goal: string, rooms: string[], beamWidth = 3, maxDepth = 6) {
  let frontier: PlanNode[] = [{ actions: [], state: initialState(), cost: 0, violations: 0, time_ms: 0, tokens: 0 }];
  const intents = ["hk.assign","hk.clean","hk.inspect","hk.release"];
  const scores = await loadPolicyScores();

  for (let depth=0; depth<maxDepth; depth++) {
    const candidates: PlanNode[] = [];
    for (const node of frontier) {
      const room = rooms[depth % rooms.length] || rooms[0];
      for (const intent of intents) {
        const step = constrainedStep({ intent, params: { room, staff: "alice" }, state_view: node.state });
        const base = estimateBaseCost(step.action, step.params, node.state);
        const polPenalty = policyPenalty(step.policy?.reasons||[], scores);
        const stepCost = base.time_ms + polPenalty + Math.round(base.tokens * 2); // tokens -> time proxy
        // simulate apply
        const span = {
          execution: { action: step.action, transform: step.params },
          output: { state_delta: step.delta, effects: ["state.mutate"], cost: { time_ms: base.time_ms, tokens: base.tokens, cents: 0.0 } }
        };
        const nextState = apply(span as any, node.state);
        candidates.push({
          actions: [...node.actions, step],
          state: nextState,
          cost: node.cost + stepCost,
          violations: node.violations + (step.policy?.violated?.length||0),
          time_ms: node.time_ms + base.time_ms,
          tokens: node.tokens + base.tokens
        });
      }
    }
    candidates.sort((a,b)=> a.cost - b.cost);
    frontier = candidates.slice(0, beamWidth);
  }
  frontier.sort((a,b)=> a.cost - b.cost);
  return frontier[0];
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"planner/cli_cost.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { beamPlanCosted } from "./costed";

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const rooms = (args.get("rooms") || "101,201").split(",").map(s=>s.trim());
const depth = parseInt(args.get("depth")||"6");
const beam = parseInt(args.get("beam")||"3");

const plan = await beamPlanCosted("housekeeping", rooms, beam, depth);
for (const [i, step] of plan.actions.entries()) {
  process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ i, action: step.action, params: step.params, reasons: step.policy?.reasons||[], delta: step.delta }) + "\\n");
}
process.stderr.write(`COST=${plan.cost} TIME_MS=${plan.time_ms} TOKENS=${plan.tokens} VIOLATIONS=${plan.violations}\\n`);
"""), encoding="utf-8")
````

````python
# Build TS Skeleton v6:
# - LayerNorm + Residuals (CPU) with optional WGSL stub
# - Planner with live ETA prioritization & penalty
# - Policy DSL v2 (versioned + waivers by time window)
# - Shadow→Hotel API adapter (mock) + pilot CLI
# - Scripts and README updates
# - Package as spllm-ts-skeleton-v6.zip

from pathlib import Path, json, textwrap, zipfile

root = Path("/mnt/data/spllm-ts")
assert root.exists(), "TS skeleton not found—please ensure v1–v5 was created."

src = root/"src"
(src/"model").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"model/wgsl").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"planner").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"policy/v2").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"adapters").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"shadow").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# 1) LayerNorm + Residuals (CPU) + WGSL stub -----------------------------------
(src/"model/layernorm.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
export function layernorm(x: Float32Array, eps = 1e-5): Float32Array {
  const n = x.length;
  let mean = 0; for (let i=0;i<n;i++) mean += x[i]; mean /= n;
  let varsum = 0; for (let i=0;i<n;i++) { const d = x[i]-mean; varsum += d*d; }
  const invStd = 1 / Math.sqrt(varsum / n + eps);
  const out = new Float32Array(n);
  for (let i=0;i<n;i++) out[i] = (x[i]-mean) * invStd;
  return out;
}

export function residualAdd(a: Float32Array, b: Float32Array): Float32Array {
  const n = a.length, out = new Float32Array(n);
  for (let i=0;i<n;i++) out[i] = a[i] + b[i];
  return out;
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# WGSL stub (non-functional placeholder for LN to show extensibility)
(src/"model/wgsl/layernorm.wgsl").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
// Placeholder for a future LayerNorm WGSL kernel.
// Current v6 uses CPU layernorm; GPU path will arrive in v7.
"""))

# Update model to use residual+LN after attention
model_ts = src/"model/model.ts"
model_code = model_ts.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
if "layernorm" not in model_code:
    model_code = model_code.replace(
        'import { attention1D } from "./attention";',
        'import { attention1D } from "./attention";\nimport { layernorm, residualAdd } from "./layernorm";'
    )
    # Insert residual+LN inside forward
    model_code = model_code.replace(
        "    for (let l=0; l<this.config.n_layers; l++) h = attention1D(h, this.config.n_heads);",
        "    for (let l=0; l<this.config.n_layers; l++) { const att = attention1D(h, this.config.n_heads); h = layernorm(residualAdd(h, att)); }"
    )
    model_ts.write_text(model_code, encoding="utf-8")

# 2) Planner with ETA prioritization & penalty ---------------------------------
(src/"planner/costed_eta.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { constrainedStep } from "../decoding/decoder";
import { apply, initialState } from "../env/housekeeping";
import { estimateBaseCost, loadPolicyScores, policyPenalty } from "../model/cost";

type PlanNode = { actions: any[]; state: any; cost: number; violations: number; time_ms: number; tokens: number; done: Record<string, boolean> };

function parseETA(arg?: string): Record<string, number> {
  const out: Record<string, number> = {};
  if (!arg) return out;
  for (const part of arg.split(",")) {
    const [room, iso] = part.split("=");
    const ts = Date.parse(iso || "");
    if (room && !Number.isNaN(ts)) out[room.trim()] = ts;
  }
  return out;
}

function etaPenalty(room: string, curClock: number, stepTime: number, etaAbs: number): number {
  if (!etaAbs) return 0;
  const nowAbs = curClock; // simulador usa clock_ms como "agregado"; interpretamos como ms absolutos relativos
  const after = nowAbs + stepTime;
  const late = after - etaAbs;
  return late > 0 ? late * 0.5 : 0; // meia unidade de custo por ms de atraso
}

export async function beamPlanCostedETA(goal: string, rooms: string[], etaMapIso?: string, beamWidth = 3, maxDepth = 8) {
  const etaMap = parseETA(etaMapIso);
  let frontier: PlanNode[] = [{ actions: [], state: initialState(), cost: 0, violations: 0, time_ms: 0, tokens: 0, done: {} }];
  const intents = ["hk.assign","hk.clean","hk.inspect","hk.release"];
  const scores = await loadPolicyScores();

  for (let depth=0; depth<maxDepth; depth++) {
    const candidates: PlanNode[] = [];
    for (const node of frontier) {
      // choose next room: earliest ETA not done; fallback rotation
      const available = rooms.filter(r => !node.done[r]);
      const nextRooms = (available.length ? available : rooms).slice();
      nextRooms.sort((a,b)=> (etaMap[a]||Infinity) - (etaMap[b]||Infinity));

      for (const room of nextRooms.slice(0, Math.max(1, Math.min(2, nextRooms.length)))) { // try top-2 by ETA
        for (const intent of intents) {
          const step = constrainedStep({ intent, params: { room, staff: "alice" }, state_view: node.state });
          const base = estimateBaseCost(step.action, step.params, node.state);
          const polPenalty = policyPenalty(step.policy?.reasons||[], scores);
          const etaPen = etaPenalty(room, node.time_ms, base.time_ms, etaMap[room]);
          const stepCost = base.time_ms + polPenalty + Math.round(base.tokens * 2) + etaPen;
          // simulate apply
          const span = {
            execution: { action: step.action, transform: step.params },
            output: { state_delta: step.delta, effects: ["state.mutate"], cost: { time_ms: base.time_ms, tokens: base.tokens, cents: 0.0 } }
          };
          const nextState = apply(span as any, node.state);
          const done = { ...node.done };
          if (step.action === "hk.release") done[room] = true;
          candidates.push({
            actions: [...node.actions, { ...step, eta_penalty: etaPen }],
            state: nextState,
            cost: node.cost + stepCost,
            violations: node.violations + (step.policy?.violated?.length||0),
            time_ms: node.time_ms + base.time_ms,
            tokens: node.tokens + base.tokens,
            done
          });
        }
      }
    }
    candidates.sort((a,b)=> a.cost - b.cost);
    frontier = candidates.slice(0, beamWidth);
  }
  frontier.sort((a,b)=> a.cost - b.cost);
  return frontier[0];
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"planner/cli_cost_eta.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { beamPlanCostedETA } from "./costed_eta";

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const rooms = (args.get("rooms") || "101,201").split(",").map(s=>s.trim());
const depth = parseInt(args.get("depth")||"8");
const beam = parseInt(args.get("beam")||"3");
const eta = args.get("eta") || ""; // e.g., "101=2025-10-14T09:10:00Z,201=2025-10-14T09:30:00Z"

const plan = await beamPlanCostedETA("housekeeping", rooms, eta, beam, depth);
for (const [i, step] of plan.actions.entries()) {
  process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ i, action: step.action, params: step.params, eta_penalty: step.eta_penalty||0, reasons: step.policy?.reasons||[], delta: step.delta }) + "\\n");
}
process.stderr.write(`COST=${plan.cost} TIME_MS=${plan.time_ms} TOKENS=${plan.tokens} VIOLATIONS=${plan.violations}\\n`);
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"policy/v2/waivers.json").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
{
  "waivers": [
    { "policy_id": "sla_on_release", "reason": "VIP late arrival", "start": "2025-10-14T08:00:00Z", "end": "2025-10-14T12:00:00Z" }
  ]
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"policy/v2/eval.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
type Policy = { id: string; applies_to: string[]; severity: "low"|"medium"|"high"; check: string };
type PolicySet = { version: string; policies: Policy[] };
type Waiver = { policy_id: string; reason: string; start?: string; end?: string };
type WaiverSet = { waivers: Waiver[] };

function withinWindow(nowMs: number, w: Waiver): boolean {
  const s = w.start ? Date.parse(w.start) : -Infinity;
  const e = w.end ? Date.parse(w.end) : Infinity;
  return nowMs >= s && nowMs <= e;
}

function roomFromDelta(delta: any): string|undefined {
  for (const k of ["assignments","rooms","inspection"]) {
    if (delta?.[k]) {
      const keys = Object.keys(delta[k]);
      if (keys.length) return keys[0];
    }
  }
}

function slaMet(pre: any, delta: any): boolean {
  const room = roomFromDelta(delta); if (!room) return true;
  const assigned_at = pre?.assigned_at_ms?.[room];
  const now = pre?.clock_ms ?? 0;
  const rtype = pre?.room_type?.[room] ?? "standard";
  const limit = pre?.sla_by_type?.[rtype] ?? (pre?.sla_ms ?? 20*60*1000);
  return assigned_at != null && (now - assigned_at) <= limit;
}

function roomIsClean(pre: any, delta: any): boolean {
  const room = roomFromDelta(delta); if (!room) return true;
  return pre?.rooms?.[room] === "clean";
}

function staffIdle(pre: any, delta: any): boolean {
  const a = delta?.assignments || {};
  for (const [room, op] of Object.entries(a)) {
    if (typeof op === "string" && op.startsWith("+")) {
      const staff = (op as string).slice(1);
      return (pre?.staff?.[staff] ?? "idle") === "idle";
    }
  }
  return true;
}

const CHECKS: Record<string, (pre:any, delta:any)=>boolean> = {
  "sla_met": slaMet,
  "room_is_clean": roomIsClean,
  "staff_idle": staffIdle
};

export function evaluatePoliciesV2(action: string, pre: any, delta: any, policySet: PolicySet, waiverSet?: WaiverSet, nowMs?: number) {
  const violated: string[] = []; const reasons: string[] = [];
  const waivers = new Set<string>((waiverSet?.waivers||[]).filter(w => withinWindow(nowMs ?? Date.now(), w)).map(w => w.policy_id));

  for (const p of policySet.policies) {
    if (!p.applies_to.includes(action)) continue;
    const fn = CHECKS[p.check]; if (!fn) continue;
    const ok = fn(pre, delta);
    const tag = p.id;
    if (!ok) {
      if (waivers.has(p.id)) reasons.push(`WAIVED:${tag}`);
      else { violated.push(tag); reasons.push(`VIOLATION:${tag}`); }
    }
  }
  return { ok: violated.length === 0, reasons, violated };
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"policy/check.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { evaluatePoliciesV2 } from "./v2/eval";
import pol from "./v2/default.json";
import waiv from "./v2/waivers.json";

// small smoke test
const action = "hk.release";
const pre = { room_type: { "101": "standard" }, assigned_at_ms: {"101": 0}, clock_ms: 25*60*1000, sla_by_type: { standard: 20*60*1000 } };
const delta = { assignments: { "101": "-" } };

const res = evaluatePoliciesV2(action, pre, delta, pol as any, waiv as any, Date.parse("2025-10-14T09:00:00Z"));
console.log(JSON.stringify(res, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 4) Shadow→Hotel API adapter (mock) + pilot -----------------------------------
(src/"adapters/hotel_api.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
export type RoomId = string;
export type StaffId = string;
export type HotelState = any;

export interface HotelAPI {
  fetchState(): Promise<HotelState>;
  assign(room: RoomId, staff: StaffId): Promise<{ ok: boolean }>;
  clean(room: RoomId): Promise<{ ok: boolean }>;
  inspect(room: RoomId): Promise<{ ok: boolean }>;
  release(room: RoomId): Promise<{ ok: boolean }>;
}

export class MockHotelAPI implements HotelAPI {
  private state: any;
  constructor(seed: any) { this.state = seed; }
  async fetchState(){ return this.state; }
  async assign(room: RoomId, staff: StaffId){ this.state.assignments[room]=staff; this.state.staff[staff] = `assigned:${room}`; return { ok: true }; }
  async clean(room: RoomId){ this.state.rooms[room]='clean'; return { ok: true }; }
  async inspect(room: RoomId){ this.state.inspection[room]='ok'; return { ok: true }; }
  async release(room: RoomId){ delete this.state.assignments[room]; delete this.state.inspection[room]; return { ok: true }; }
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"shadow/hotel_adapter_pilot.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { beamPlanCostedETA } from "../planner/costed_eta";
import { initialState } from "../env/housekeeping";
import { MockHotelAPI } from "../adapters/hotel_api";
import { makeReceipt } from "../runtime/receipts";
import { evaluatePoliciesV2 } from "../policy/v2/eval";
import pol from "../policy/v2/default.json";
import waiv from "../policy/v2/waivers.json";

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const rooms = (args.get("rooms") || "101,201").split(",").map(s=>s.trim());
const eta = args.get("eta") || "";
const outdir = args.get("out") || "artifacts";

await Bun.$`mkdir -p ${outdir}`;

const plan = await beamPlanCostedETA("housekeeping", rooms, eta, 3, 8);
const api = new MockHotelAPI(initialState());

const logs: any[] = []; const receipts: any[] = [];

for (const step of plan.actions) {
  const state = await api.fetchState();

  // Apply via adapter
  if (step.action === "hk.assign") await api.assign(step.params.room, step.params.staff||"alice");
  if (step.action === "hk.clean") await api.clean(step.params.room);
  if (step.action === "hk.inspect") await api.inspect(step.params.room);
  if (step.action === "hk.release") await api.release(step.params.room);

  const polres = evaluatePoliciesV2(step.action, state, step.delta, pol as any, waiv as any);
  const span = { id: `spn_${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2,10)}`, execution: { action: step.action, transform: step.params }, output: { state_delta: step.delta, effects: step.effects||["state.mutate"], cost: { time_ms: 400, tokens: 8, cents: 0 } } };
  const rcpt = makeReceipt({ span, decision: step, confidence: polres.ok?0.95:0.7, policies: polres.reasons, violations: polres.violated.length });
  receipts.push(rcpt);
  logs.push({ action: step.action, params: step.params, reasons: polres.reasons });
}

await Bun.write(`${outdir}/hotel_adapter_log.ndjson`, logs.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
await Bun.write(`${outdir}/hotel_adapter_receipts.ndjson`, receipts.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");

console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, steps: plan.actions.length, outdir }, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")
````

````python
# Retry v6 build with correct imports
from pathlib import Path
import json, textwrap, zipfile

root = Path("/mnt/data/spllm-ts")
assert root.exists(), "TS skeleton not found—please ensure v1–v5 was created."

src = root/"src"
(src/"model").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

(src/"planner").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

(src/"shadow").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# 1) LayerNorm + Residuals (CPU) + WGSL stub
(src/"model/layernorm.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
export function layernorm(x: Float32Array, eps = 1e-5): Float32Array {
  const n = x.length;
  let mean = 0; for (let i=0;i<n;i++) mean += x[i]; mean /= n;
  let varsum = 0; for (let i=0;i<n;i++) { const d = x[i]-mean; varsum += d*d; }
  const invStd = 1 / Math.sqrt(varsum / n + eps);
  const out = new Float32Array(n);
  for (let i=0;i<n;i++) out[i] = (x[i]-mean) * invStd;
  return out;
}

export function residualAdd(a: Float32Array, b: Float32Array): Float32Array {
  const n = a.length, out = new Float32Array(n);
  for (let i=0;i<n;i++) out[i] = a[i] + b[i];
  return out;
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"model/wgsl/layernorm.wgsl").write_text("// Placeholder WGSL for LayerNorm; CPU path active in v6.\n", encoding="utf-8")

# Update model to use residual+LN after attention
model_ts = src/"model/model.ts"
if model_ts.exists():
    model_code = model_ts.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    if "layernorm" not in model_code:
        model_code = model_code.replace(
            'import { attention1D } from "./attention";',
            'import { attention1D } from "./attention";\nimport { layernorm, residualAdd } from "./layernorm";'
        )
        model_code = model_code.replace(
            "    for (let l=0; l<this.config.n_layers; l++) h = attention1D(h, this.config.n_heads);",
            "    for (let l=0; l<this.config.n_layers; l++) { const att = attention1D(h, this.config.n_heads); h = layernorm(residualAdd(h, att)); }"
        )
        model_ts.write_text(model_code, encoding="utf-8")

# 2) Planner with ETA prioritization & penalty
(src/"planner/costed_eta.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { constrainedStep } from "../decoding/decoder";
import { apply, initialState } from "../env/housekeeping";
import { estimateBaseCost, loadPolicyScores, policyPenalty } from "../model/cost";

type PlanNode = { actions: any[]; state: any; cost: number; violations: number; time_ms: number; tokens: number; done: Record<string, boolean> };

function parseETA(arg?: string): Record<string, number> {
  const out: Record<string, number> = {};
  if (!arg) return out;
  for (const part of arg.split(",")) {
    const [room, iso] = part.split("=");
    const ts = Date.parse(iso || "");
    if (room && !Number.isNaN(ts)) out[room.trim()] = ts;
  }
  return out;
}

function etaPenalty(room: string, curClock: number, stepTime: number, etaAbs: number): number {
  if (!etaAbs) return 0;
  const after = curClock + stepTime;
  const late = after - etaAbs;
  return late > 0 ? late * 0.5 : 0;
}

export async function beamPlanCostedETA(goal: string, rooms: string[], etaMapIso?: string, beamWidth = 3, maxDepth = 8) {
  const etaMap = parseETA(etaMapIso);
  let frontier: PlanNode[] = [{ actions: [], state: initialState(), cost: 0, violations: 0, time_ms: 0, tokens: 0, done: {} }];
  const intents = ["hk.assign","hk.clean","hk.inspect","hk.release"];
  const scores = await loadPolicyScores();

  for (let depth=0; depth<maxDepth; depth++) {
    const candidates: PlanNode[] = [];
    for (const node of frontier) {
      const available = rooms.filter(r => !node.done[r]);
      const nextRooms = (available.length ? available : rooms).slice();
      nextRooms.sort((a,b)=> (etaMap[a]||Infinity) - (etaMap[b]||Infinity));

      for (const room of nextRooms.slice(0, Math.max(1, Math.min(2, nextRooms.length)))) {
        for (const intent of intents) {
          const step = constrainedStep({ intent, params: { room, staff: "alice" }, state_view: node.state });
          const base = estimateBaseCost(step.action, step.params, node.state);
          const polPenalty = policyPenalty(step.policy?.reasons||[], scores);
          const etaPen = etaPenalty(room, node.time_ms, base.time_ms, etaMap[room]);
          const stepCost = base.time_ms + polPenalty + Math.round(base.tokens * 2) + etaPen;
          const span = { execution: { action: step.action, transform: step.params }, output: { state_delta: step.delta, effects: ["state.mutate"], cost: { time_ms: base.time_ms, tokens: base.tokens, cents: 0.0 } } };
          const nextState = apply(span as any, node.state);
          const done = { ...node.done }; if (step.action === "hk.release") done[room] = true;
          candidates.push({ actions: [...node.actions, { ...step, eta_penalty: etaPen }], state: nextState, cost: node.cost + stepCost, violations: node.violations + (step.policy?.violated?.length||0), time_ms: node.time_ms + base.time_ms, tokens: node.tokens + base.tokens, done });
        }
      }
    }
    candidates.sort((a,b)=> a.cost - b.cost);
    frontier = candidates.slice(0, beamWidth);
  }
  frontier.sort((a,b)=> a.cost - b.cost);
  return frontier[0];
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

const rooms = (args.get("rooms") || "101,201").split(",").map(s=>s.trim());
const depth = parseInt(args.get("depth")||"8");
const beam = parseInt(args.get("beam")||"3");
const eta = args.get("eta") || "";

const plan = await beamPlanCostedETA("housekeeping", rooms, eta, beam, depth);
for (const [i, step] of plan.actions.entries()) {
  process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ i, action: step.action, params: step.params, eta_penalty: step.eta_penalty||0, reasons: step.policy?.reasons||[], delta: step.delta }) + "\\n");
}
process.stderr.write(`COST=${plan.cost} TIME_MS=${plan.time_ms} TOKENS=${plan.tokens} VIOLATIONS=${plan.violations}\\n`);

{

    { "id":"sla_on_release", "applies_to":["hk.release"], "severity":"high", "check":"sla_met" },
    { "id":"clean_before_inspect", "applies_to":["hk.inspect"], "severity":"high", "check":"room_is_clean" },

"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"policy/v2/waivers.json").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
{
  "waivers": [
    { "policy_id": "sla_on_release", "reason": "VIP late arrival", "start": "2025-10-14T08:00:00Z", "end": "2025-10-14T12:00:00Z" }
  ]
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"policy/v2/eval.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
type Policy = { id: string; applies_to: string[]; severity: "low"|"medium"|"high"; check: string };
type PolicySet = { version: string; policies: Policy[] };
type Waiver = { policy_id: string; reason: string; start?: string; end?: string };
type WaiverSet = { waivers: Waiver[] };

function withinWindow(nowMs: number, w: Waiver): boolean {
  const s = w.start ? Date.parse(w.start) : -Infinity;
  const e = w.end ? Date.parse(w.end) : Infinity;
  return nowMs >= s && nowMs <= e;
}

function roomFromDelta(delta: any): string|undefined {
  for (const k of ["assignments","rooms","inspection"]) {
    if (delta?.[k]) {
      const keys = Object.keys(delta[k]);
      if (keys.length) return keys[0];
    }
  }
}

function slaMet(pre: any, delta: any): boolean {
  const room = roomFromDelta(delta); if (!room) return true;
  const assigned_at = pre?.assigned_at_ms?.[room];
  const now = pre?.clock_ms ?? 0;
  const rtype = pre?.room_type?.[room] ?? "standard";
  const limit = pre?.sla_by_type?.[rtype] ?? (pre?.sla_ms ?? 20*60*1000);
  return assigned_at != null && (now - assigned_at) <= limit;
}

function roomIsClean(pre: any, delta: any): boolean {
  const room = roomFromDelta(delta); if (!room) return true;
  return pre?.rooms?.[room] === "clean";
}

function staffIdle(pre: any, delta: any): boolean {
  const a = delta?.assignments || {};
  for (const [room, op] of Object.entries(a)) {
    if (typeof op === "string" && op.startsWith("+")) {
      const staff = (op as string).slice(1);
      return (pre?.staff?.[staff] ?? "idle") === "idle";
    }
  }
  return true;
}

const CHECKS: Record<string, (pre:any, delta:any)=>boolean> = {
  "sla_met": slaMet,
  "room_is_clean": roomIsClean,
  "staff_idle": staffIdle
};

export function evaluatePoliciesV2(action: string, pre: any, delta: any, policySet: PolicySet, waiverSet?: WaiverSet, nowMs?: number) {
  const violated: string[] = []; const reasons: string[] = [];
  const waivers = new Set<string>((waiverSet?.waivers||[]).filter(w => withinWindow(nowMs ?? Date.now(), w)).map(w => w.policy_id));

  for (const p of policySet.policies) {
    if (!p.applies_to.includes(action)) continue;
    const fn = CHECKS[p.check]; if (!fn) continue;
    const ok = fn(pre, delta);
    const tag = p.id;
    if (!ok) {
      if (waivers.has(p.id)) reasons.push(`WAIVED:${tag}`);
      else { violated.push(tag); reasons.push(`VIOLATION:${tag}`); }
    }
  }
  return { ok: violated.length === 0, reasons, violated };
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"policy/check.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { evaluatePoliciesV2 } from "./v2/eval";

const delta = { assignments: { "101": "-" } };

const res = evaluatePoliciesV2(action, pre, delta, pol as any, waiv as any, Date.parse("2025-10-14T09:00:00Z"));
console.log(JSON.stringify(res, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 4) Shadow→Hotel API adapter (mock) + pilot
(src/"adapters/hotel_api.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
export type RoomId = string;
export type StaffId = string;
export type HotelState = any;

export interface HotelAPI {
  fetchState(): Promise<HotelState>;
  assign(room: RoomId, staff: StaffId): Promise<{ ok: boolean }>;
  clean(room: RoomId): Promise<{ ok: boolean }>;
  inspect(room: RoomId): Promise<{ ok: boolean }>;
  release(room: RoomId): Promise<{ ok: boolean }>;
}

export class MockHotelAPI implements HotelAPI {
  private state: any;
  constructor(seed: any) { this.state = seed; }
  async fetchState(){ return this.state; }
  async assign(room: RoomId, staff: StaffId){ this.state.assignments[room]=staff; this.state.staff[staff] = `assigned:${room}`; return { ok: true }; }
  async clean(room: RoomId){ this.state.rooms[room]='clean'; return { ok: true }; }
  async inspect(room: RoomId){ this.state.inspection[room]='ok'; return { ok: true }; }
  async release(room: RoomId){ delete this.state.assignments[room]; delete this.state.inspection[room]; return { ok: true }; }
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"shadow/hotel_adapter_pilot.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { beamPlanCostedETA } from "../planner/costed_eta";
import { initialState } from "../env/housekeeping";
import { MockHotelAPI } from "../adapters/hotel_api";
import { makeReceipt } from "../runtime/receipts";
import { evaluatePoliciesV2 } from "../policy/v2/eval";
import pol from "../policy/v2/default.json";
import waiv from "../policy/v2/waivers.json";

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const rooms = (args.get("rooms") || "101,201").split(",").map(s=>s.trim());
const eta = args.get("eta") || "";
const outdir = args.get("out") || "artifacts";

await Bun.$`mkdir -p ${outdir}`;

const plan = await beamPlanCostedETA("housekeeping", rooms, eta, 3, 8);
const api = new MockHotelAPI(initialState());

const logs: any[] = []; const receipts: any[] = [];

for (const step of plan.actions) {
  const pre = await api.fetchState();

  if (step.action === "hk.assign") await api.assign(step.params.room, step.params.staff||"alice");
  if (step.action === "hk.clean") await api.clean(step.params.room);
  if (step.action === "hk.inspect") await api.inspect(step.params.room);
  if (step.action === "hk.release") await api.release(step.params.room);

  const polres = evaluatePoliciesV2(step.action, pre, step.delta, pol as any, waiv as any);
  const span = { id: `spn_${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2,10)}`, execution: { action: step.action, transform: step.params }, output: { state_delta: step.delta, effects: step.effects||["state.mutate"], cost: { time_ms: 400, tokens: 8, cents: 0 } } };
  const rcpt = makeReceipt({ span, decision: step, confidence: polres.ok?0.95:0.7, policies: polres.reasons, violations: polres.violated.length });
  receipts.push(rcpt);
  logs.push({ action: step.action, params: step.params, reasons: polres.reasons });
}

await Bun.write(`${outdir}/hotel_adapter_log.ndjson`, logs.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
await Bun.write(`${outdir}/hotel_adapter_receipts.ndjson`, receipts.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");

console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, steps: plan.actions.length, outdir }, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")
````

perfeito, Dan — fechei **todos** os itens em um **v6** redondo:

👉 **baixar SpLLM TS Skeleton v6**

o que entrou no v6 (tudo que você pediu)
----------------------------------------

*   **LayerNorm + Residuals (CPU)** integrados no `model.ts`  
    (`src/model/layernorm.ts`; bloco residual + LN por camada).  
    _Stub WGSL_ incluído para futura aceleração.
*   **Planner com ETA em tempo real**  
    Novo `beamPlanCostedETA` aplica **priorização por ETA** + **penalidade por atraso**.  
    CLI: `bun run planner-cost-eta --rooms 101,201 --eta 101=2025-10-14T09:10:00Z,201=2025-10-14T09:30:00Z --beam=3 --depth=8`
*   **Policy DSL v2 (versionada + waivers temporais)**  
    `src/policy/v2/default.json`, `src/policy/v2/waivers.json`, `src/policy/v2/eval.ts`  
    CLI de smoke test: `bun run policy-check`
*   **Adapter Shadow → Hotel (mock pronto pra trocar por API real)**  
    `src/adapters/hotel_api.ts` com `MockHotelAPI` e  
    `src/shadow/hotel_adapter_pilot.ts` para rodar o plano via adapter e **emitir receipts**.

como rodar (do zero)
--------------------

```bash
unzip spllm-ts-skeleton-v6.zip && cd spllm-ts
bun install

# (opcional) gerar dados do pilot do v4 e policy_scores
bun run src/shadow/pilot.ts --rooms 101,201 --beam=3 --depth=6 --out artifacts
bun run feedback --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson --out artifacts/policy_scores.json

# ETA-aware planning
bun run planner-cost-eta --rooms 101,201 --eta 101=2025-10-14T09:10:00Z,201=2025-10-14T09:30:00Z --beam=3 --depth=8 | head

# policy DSL v2 (com waivers)
bun run policy-check

# pilot com adapter (mock)
bun run hotel-pilot --rooms 101,201 --eta 101=2025-10-14T09:10:00Z,201=2025-10-14T09:30:00Z --out artifacts
# outputs:
# - artifacts/hotel_adapter_log.ndjson
# - artifacts/hotel_adapter_receipts.ndjson
```

próximos degraus sugeridos (quando quiser, viro v7)

````python
# Build TS Skeleton v7:
# - WebGPU LayerNorm (WGSL) with CPU fallback helper
# - Policy Panel UI (create/edit policies & waivers, versioning, simple diff)
# - Small CLIs and README updates
# - Package zip

from pathlib import Path
import json, textwrap, zipfile

root = Path("/mnt/data/spllm-ts")
assert root.exists(), "TS skeleton base not found; please ensure v1–v6 exists."

src = root/"src"
(src/"model/wgsl").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"model").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"panel").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"policy/v2/versions").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# 1) WGSL LayerNorm kernel (simple 1D LN, single-workgroup implementation)
(src/"model/wgsl/layernorm.wgsl").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
// LayerNorm for a single 1D vector x of length LEN (provided in uniform).
// Not optimized (single-thread loop); suitable as correctness baseline.
struct VecIn { data: array<f32>; };
struct VecOut { data: array<f32>; };
struct ULen { len: u32; };

@group(0) @binding(0) var<storage, read> X: VecIn;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read_write> Y: VecOut;
@group(0) @binding(2) var<uniform> U: ULen;

const EPS: f32 = 1e-5;

@compute @workgroup_size(1)
fn main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) gid: vec3<u32>) {
  if (gid.x > 0u) { return; }
  let n: u32 = U.len;
  var mean: f32 = 0.0;
  for (var i: u32 = 0u; i < n; i = i + 1u) {
    mean = mean + X.data[i];
  }
  mean = mean / f32(n);
  var varsum: f32 = 0.0;
  for (var j: u32 = 0u; j < n; j = j + 1u) {
    let d = X.data[j] - mean;
    varsum = varsum + d * d;
  }
  let invstd = inverseSqrt(varsum / f32(n) + EPS);
  for (var k: u32 = 0u; k < n; k = k + 1u) {
    Y.data[k] = (X.data[k] - mean) * invstd;
  }
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 1b) GPU helper for LayerNorm + CPU fallback
(src/"model/layernorm_auto.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { layernorm as layernormCPU } from "./layernorm";

export async function layernormAuto(x: Float32Array): Promise<Float32Array> {
  if (process.env.USE_WEBGPU_LN === '1') {
    try {
      const anyNav: any = (globalThis as any).navigator;
      if (!anyNav || !anyNav.gpu) throw new Error("WebGPU not available");
      const adapter = await anyNav.gpu.requestAdapter();
      const device = await adapter!.requestDevice();

      const out = new Float32Array(x.length);
      const xBuf = device.createBuffer({ size: x.byteLength, usage: GPUBufferUsage.STORAGE | GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST });
      const yBuf = device.createBuffer({ size: out.byteLength, usage: GPUBufferUsage.STORAGE | GPUBufferUsage.COPY_SRC | GPUBufferUsage.STORAGE });
      device.queue.writeBuffer(xBuf, 0, x.buffer, x.byteOffset, x.byteLength);

      const u = new Uint32Array([x.length|0]);
      const uBuf = device.createBuffer({ size: u.byteLength, usage: GPUBufferUsage.UNIFORM | GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST });
      device.queue.writeBuffer(uBuf, 0, u);

      const code = await (await fetch(new URL("./wgsl/layernorm.wgsl", import.meta.url))).text();
      const module = device.createShaderModule({ code });
      const pipeline = device.createComputePipeline({ layout: "auto", compute: { module, entryPoint: "main" } });

      const bindGroup = device.createBindGroup({
        layout: pipeline.getBindGroupLayout(0),
        entries: [
          { binding: 0, resource: { buffer: xBuf } },
          { binding: 1, resource: { buffer: yBuf } },
          { binding: 2, resource: { buffer: uBuf } }
        ]
      });

      const encoder = device.createCommandEncoder();
      const pass = encoder.beginComputePass();
      pass.setPipeline(pipeline);
      pass.setBindGroup(0, bindGroup);
      pass.dispatchWorkgroups(1,1,1);
      pass.end();

      const readBuf = device.createBuffer({ size: out.byteLength, usage: GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST | GPUBufferUsage.MAP_READ });
      encoder.copyBufferToBuffer(yBuf, 0, readBuf, 0, out.byteLength);
      device.queue.submit([encoder.finish()]);
      await readBuf.mapAsync(GPUMapMode.READ);
      out.set(new Float32Array(readBuf.getMappedRange().slice(0)));
      readBuf.unmap();
      return out;
    } catch (e) {
      // fallback to CPU on any error
      return layernormCPU(x);
    }
  }
  return layernormCPU(x);
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 1c) Small GPU LN test
(src/"model/layernorm_test.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { layernorm } from "./layernorm";
import { layernormAuto } from "./layernorm_auto";

async function main(){
  const x = new Float32Array([1,2,3,4,5]);
  const cpu = layernorm(x);
  const gpu = await layernormAuto(x);
  console.log(JSON.stringify({ cpu: Array.from(cpu), gpu: Array.from(gpu) }));
}
main();
"""), encoding="utf-8")

<div class="card"><h2>Policy Editor (v2)</h2>
  <div style="display:flex; gap:12px; align-items:center; margin-bottom:8px;">
    <button id="btnLoad">Load</button>
    <button id="btnSave">Save (versioned)</button>
    <span id="status" style="color:#666"></span>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px">
    <div>
      <h3>Policies JSON</h3>
      <textarea id="pol" style="width:100%; height:240px; font-family:monospace"></textarea>
    </div>
    <div>
      <h3>Waivers JSON</h3>
      <textarea id="waiv" style="width:100%; height:240px; font-family:monospace"></textarea>
    </div>
  </div>
  <pre id="diff" class="card" style="margin-top:12px; white-space:pre-wrap; font-size:12px"></pre>
</div>
<script>
async function loadJSON(path){ const r = await fetch(path); return r.ok ? r.json() : {}; }
function pretty(j){ return JSON.stringify(j, null, 2); }
async function loadAll(){
  const pol = await loadJSON('/policy'); const wa = await loadJSON('/waivers');
  document.getElementById('pol').value = pretty(pol);
  document.getElementById('waiv').value = pretty(wa);
  document.getElementById('diff').textContent = 'Loaded.';
}
async function saveAll(){
  const status = document.getElementById('status');
  try {
    const pol = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('pol').value);
    const wa = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('waiv').value);
    const r = await fetch('/policy/save', { method:'POST', headers:{'content-type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({ pol, wa }) });
    const info = await r.json();
    status.textContent = 'Saved v=' + info.version + ' at ' + new Date(info.ts).toLocaleString();
    document.getElementById('diff').textContent = info.diff || '(diff unavailable)';
  } catch (e) {
    status.textContent = 'Save failed: ' + e;
  }
}
document.getElementById('btnLoad').onclick = loadAll;
document.getElementById('btnSave').onclick = saveAll;
</script>
""")

    if (url.pathname === "/policy") {
      try { const txt = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/default.json`, "utf8"); return new Response(txt, { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }); }
      catch { return new Response("{}", { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }); }
    }
    if (url.pathname === "/waivers") {
      try { const txt = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/waivers.json`, "utf8"); return new Response(txt, { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }); }
      catch { return new Response("{\\"waivers\\":[]}", { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }); }
    }
    if (url.pathname === "/policy/save" && req.method === "POST") {
      const body = await req.json().catch(()=>({}));
      const oldPol = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/default.json`, "utf8").catch(()=>"{\\"policies\\":[]}");
      const oldWa = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/waivers.json`, "utf8").catch(()=>"{\\"waivers\\":[]}");
      const ts = Date.now();
      // snapshot versions
      await Bun.write(`src/policy/v2/versions/default-${ts}.json`, JSON.stringify(body.pol, null, 2));
      await Bun.write(`src/policy/v2/versions/waivers-${ts}.json`, JSON.stringify(body.wa, null, 2));
      // write current
      await Bun.write(`src/policy/v2/default.json`, JSON.stringify(body.pol, null, 2));
      await Bun.write(`src/policy/v2/waivers.json`, JSON.stringify(body.wa, null, 2));
      // naive diff summary
      function summarizeDiff(a, b){
        try {
          const aj = JSON.parse(a); const bj = b;
          const ak = Object.keys(aj).sort(); const bk = Object.keys(bj).sort();
          const added = bk.filter(k=>!ak.includes(k));
          const removed = ak.filter(k=>!bk.includes(k));
          return 'keys added: ' + JSON.stringify(added) + '\\nkeys removed: ' + JSON.stringify(removed);
        } catch { return ''; }
      }
      const diff = summarizeDiff(oldPol, body.pol) + '\\n' + summarizeDiff(oldWa, body.wa);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ ok:true, ts, version: ts, diff }), { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } });
    }
""")

else:

    (src/"panel/server.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { serve } from "bun";
import { readFile } from "node:fs/promises";

const port = Number(process.env.PORT || 8787);
const artifacts = "artifacts";

const indexHtml = `<!doctype html>
<html><head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<title>SpLLM Panel</title>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>
<style>
body{font-family:system-ui, -apple-system, Arial, sans-serif; margin:20px;}
.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:24px}
.card{border:1px solid #eee;border-radius:12px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)}
h2{margin:0 0 12px}
canvas{max-width:100%;}
textarea{border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:8px;padding:8px}
</style>
</head><body>
<h1>SpLLM — Painel</h1>
<div class="grid">
  <div class="card"><h2>Violations por passo</h2><canvas id="viol"></canvas></div>
  <div class="card"><h2>Clock (ms) ao longo do plano</h2><canvas id="clock"></canvas></div>
</div>
<div class="card"><h2>Policy Editor (v2)</h2>
  <div style="display:flex; gap:12px; align-items:center; margin-bottom:8px;">
    <button id="btnLoad">Load</button>
    <button id="btnSave">Save (versioned)</button>
    <span id="status" style="color:#666"></span>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px">
    <div>
      <h3>Policies JSON</h3>
      <textarea id="pol" style="width:100%; height:240px; font-family:monospace"></textarea>
    </div>
    <div>
      <h3>Waivers JSON</h3>
      <textarea id="waiv" style="width:100%; height:240px; font-family:monospace"></textarea>
    </div>
  </div>
  <pre id="diff" class="card" style="margin-top:12px; white-space:pre-wrap; font-size:12px"></pre>
</div>
<script>
async function loadNDJSON(path){ const r = await fetch(path); const t = await r.text(); return t.split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean).map(JSON.parse); }
async function loadJSON(path){ const r = await fetch(path); return r.ok ? r.json() : {}; }
function pretty(j){ return JSON.stringify(j, null, 2); }
(async ()=>{
  const log = await loadNDJSON('/data/pilot_log');
  const labels = log.map((x,i)=>String(i+1));
  const vio = log.map(x=> (x.policy_ok?0:1));
  const clk = log.map(x=> x.clock_ms||0);
  new Chart(document.getElementById('viol'), {type:'bar', data:{labels, datasets:[{label:'violations', data:vio}]}});
  new Chart(document.getElementById('clock'), {type:'line', data:{labels, datasets:[{label:'clock_ms', data:clk}]}});
})();
async function loadAll(){
  const pol = await loadJSON('/policy'); const wa = await loadJSON('/waivers');
  document.getElementById('pol').value = pretty(pol);
  document.getElementById('waiv').value = pretty(wa);
  document.getElementById('diff').textContent = 'Loaded.';
}
async function saveAll(){
  const status = document.getElementById('status');
  try {
    const pol = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('pol').value);
    const wa = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('waiv').value);
    const r = await fetch('/policy/save', { method:'POST', headers:{'content-type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({ pol, wa }) });
    const info = await r.json();
    status.textContent = 'Saved v=' + info.version + ' at ' + new Date(info.ts).toLocaleString();
    document.getElementById('diff').textContent = info.diff || '(diff unavailable)';
  } catch (e) { status.textContent = 'Save failed: ' + e; }
}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  document.getElementById('btnLoad')!.addEventListener('click', loadAll);
  document.getElementById('btnSave')!.addEventListener('click', saveAll);
});
</script>
</body></html>`;

export default serve({
  port,
  async fetch(req) {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    if (url.pathname === "/") return new Response(indexHtml, { headers: { "content-type": "text/html" } });
    if (url.pathname === "/data/pilot_log") {
      try { const txt = await readFile(`${artifacts}/pilot_log.ndjson`, "utf8"); return new Response(txt, { headers: { "content-type": "text/plain" } }); }
      catch { return new Response("", { status: 200 }); }
    }
    if (url.pathname === "/data/receipts") {
      try { const txt = await readFile(`${artifacts}/receipts.ndjson`, "utf8"); return new Response(txt, { headers: { "content-type": "text/plain" } }); }
      catch { return new Response("", { status: 200 }); }
    }
    if (url.pathname === "/policy") {
      try { const txt = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/default.json`, "utf8"); return new Response(txt, { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }); }
      catch { return new Response("{}", { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }); }
    }
    if (url.pathname === "/waivers") {
      try { const txt = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/waivers.json`, "utf8"); return new Response(txt, { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }); }
      catch { return new Response("{\\"waivers\\":[]}", { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }); }
    }
    if (url.pathname === "/policy/save" && req.method === "POST") {
      const body = await req.json().catch(()=>({}));
      const oldPol = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/default.json`, "utf8").catch(()=>"{\\"policies\\":[]}");
      const oldWa = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/waivers.json`, "utf8").catch(()=>"{\\"waivers\\":[]}");
      const ts = Date.now();
      await Bun.write(`src/policy/v2/versions/default-${ts}.json`, JSON.stringify(body.pol, null, 2));
      await Bun.write(`src/policy/v2/versions/waivers-${ts}.json`, JSON.stringify(body.wa, null, 2));
      await Bun.write(`src/policy/v2/default.json`, JSON.stringify(body.pol, null, 2));
      await Bun.write(`src/policy/v2/waivers.json`, JSON.stringify(body.wa, null, 2));
      function summarizeDiff(a, b){
        try {
          const aj = JSON.parse(a); const bj = b;
          const ak = Object.keys(aj).sort(); const bk = Object.keys(bj).sort();
          const added = bk.filter(k=>!ak.includes(k));
          const removed = ak.filter(k=>!bk.includes(k));
          return 'keys added: ' + JSON.stringify(added) + '\\nkeys removed: ' + JSON.stringify(removed);
        } catch { return ''; }
      }
      const diff = summarizeDiff(oldPol, body.pol) + '\\n' + summarizeDiff(oldWa, body.wa);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ ok:true, ts, version: ts, diff }), { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } });
    }
    return new Response("Not Found", { status: 404 });
  }
});
"""), encoding="utf-8")
````

o que entrou no v7
------------------

como rodar rápido

```bash
bun run panel

```
