fechamos os gaps, Dan — v11 cobre exatamente o que você listou como “parcial” e “a criar”, com código e CLIs prontos.

👉 **baixar SpLLM TS Skeleton v11**

o que v11 entrega (direto ao ponto)
===================================

1) Pruning de política **hard**
-------------------------------

*   Novo: `src/decoding/policy_pruning.ts`
    *   `constrainedStepStrict()` bloqueia ações que violam **policies severity: "high"** sem waiver.
    *   Planners passam a importar o strict (ajustei `planner/costed_eta.ts` e `planner/scheduler_sla.ts`).

2) Divergência padronizada + **replanejamento adaptativo**
----------------------------------------------------------

*   Novo runtime: `src/shadow/runtime_adaptive.ts`
    *   Estrutura de divergência: `{ type: "policy" | "exec_error" | "delta_mismatch" | "none", fields, reason }`
    *   Loga `experience_buffer.ndjson` com `{ planned, executed, divergence, pre_state_hash, post_state_hash }`
    *   **Replaneja** (beam ou SLA) quando `divergence.type !== "none"`
    *   Receipts assinados incluem **hash de estado** (pré e pós) dentro do `span`.

```bash
bun run runtime-adaptive --rooms 101,201 --mode beam --out artifacts
# outputs:
#  - artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson
#  - artifacts/receipts.signed.ndjson
```

3) Delta Consistency Checker (CLI)
----------------------------------

*   `src/audit/delta_consistency.ts`

```bash
bun run delta-check --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson
# => { total, consistent, ratio }
```

4) Simulador de conflitos
-------------------------

*   `src/sim/conflict_sim.ts` gera eventos com `conflict: true/false` (dois agentes batendo no mesmo quarto).

5) Online learner (esqueleto funcional)
---------------------------------------

*   `src/learning/online.ts` + `cli_online.ts`
    *   Lê divergências do experience buffer e atualiza `artifacts/policy_scores.json` como feedback (0–1).

```bash
bun run online-learn --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson --out artifacts/policy_scores.json
```

6) Waiver tooling (CLI)
-----------------------

*   `src/policy/waiver_cli.ts`

```bash
bun run waiver --cmd=list
bun run waiver --cmd=add --id=sla_on_release --reason="VIP late" --start=2025-10-14T10:00:00Z --end=2025-10-14T12:00:00Z
```

7) Verificador offline de receipts
----------------------------------

*   `src/audit/verify_receipt.ts`

```bash
bun run verify-receipt --in artifacts/some_receipt.json --pub artifacts/ed25519_public.pem
```

8) Métricas exportáveis (NDJSON → WebSocket)
--------------------------------------------

*   `src/monitor/metrics.ts` + `cli_metrics.ts`
    *   Emite `{ total, divergences, ratio }` a cada 1s, lendo `experience_buffer.ndjson`.

```bash
bun run metrics-ws --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson --port 8788
```

como rodar agora
================

```bash
unzip spllm-ts-skeleton-v11.zip && cd spllm-ts
bun install

# 1) gerar experiência + receipts com hashes e replano adaptativo
bun run runtime-adaptive --rooms 101,201 --mode beam --out artifacts

# 2) checar delta consistency
bun run delta-check --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson

# 3) feedback online (atualiza scores)
bun run online-learn --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson --out artifacts/policy_scores.json

# 4) métrica live por WS
bun run metrics-ws --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson --port 8788
```

próximo alvo (quando quiser viro v12)
=====================================

*   **Delta Consistency “forte”** (replay determinístico de pre\_state + delta → post\_state byte-a-byte com relatório dos campos divergentes).
*   **Conflitos realistas** (locks por quarto, deadlock detection, retries com backoff e idempotência por recurso).
*   **Learner on-policy** (ajusta custo da ação por contexto, não só por policy id).
*   **Panel full**: aba “Experience” (timeline por episódio, drill-down de divergência, botão “Replan now”).
*   **Policy Studio**: severities configuráveis, lint avançado, “what-if” batch com histogramas.

Se quiser, eu já solto o v12 com Delta Consistency forte + Panel “Experience”.

Analisado

````python
# Build SpLLM TS Skeleton v12
# - Delta Consistency "forte" (deterministic replay + deep diff) + CLI
# - Concurrency/locks simulator (conflicts realistas) + backoff
# - On-policy learner (contextual multipliers) + integration in model/cost.ts (if present)
# - Panel "Experience": timeline por episódio, histograma de violações, what-if batch
# - Policy Studio (lint avançado + severities configuráveis)
# - Scripts + README + zip

from pathlib import Path
import json, textwrap, zipfile, os, re

root = Path("/mnt/data/spllm-ts")
assert root.exists(), "TS skeleton base not found; ensure v1–v11 exists."

src = root/"src"
(src/"audit").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"sim").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"learning").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"panel").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# 1) Delta Consistency Forte ---------------------------------------------------
(src/"audit/delta_strict.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { readFile } from "node:fs/promises";
import { apply } from "../env/housekeeping";
import { stableStringify, sha256Hex } from "../runtime/snapshot";

type DiffItem = { path: string; a?: any; b?: any };
type DiffReport = { added: DiffItem[]; removed: DiffItem[]; changed: DiffItem[] };

function deepDiff(a: any, b: any, base: string = ""): DiffReport {
  const rep: DiffReport = { added: [], removed: [], changed: [] };
  const aKeys = a && typeof a === "object" ? Object.keys(a) : [];
  const bKeys = b && typeof b === "object" ? Object.keys(b) : [];
  const all = new Set([...aKeys, ...bKeys]);
  for (const k of all) {
    const p = base ? base + "." + k : k;
    const av = a ? a[k] : undefined;
    const bv = b ? b[k] : undefined;
    const aObj = av && typeof av === "object";
    const bObj = bv && typeof bv === "object";
    if (av === undefined && bv !== undefined) rep.added.push({ path: p, b: bv });
    else if (av !== undefined && bv === undefined) rep.removed.push({ path: p, a: av });
    else if (aObj && bObj) {
      const r = deepDiff(av, bv, p);
      rep.added.push(...r.added); rep.removed.push(...r.removed); rep.changed.push(...r.changed);
    } else if (JSON.stringify(av) !== JSON.stringify(bv)) rep.changed.push({ path: p, a: av, b: bv });
  }
  return rep;
}

export async function deltaStrict(inFile="artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson"){
  const txt = await readFile(inFile, "utf8").catch(()=> "");
  let total=0, strong=0, weak=0;
  const sample: any = { mismatches: [] as any[] };
  for (const ln of txt.split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean)) {
    try {
      const e = JSON.parse(ln);
      const pre = e.pre || e.pre_state || null;
      const post = e.post || e.post_state || null;
      const delta = e.delta || e?.planned?.delta || e?.planned?.output?.state_delta || {};
      const est = pre ? apply({ execution: { action: e?.planned?.action||"unknown", transform: (e?.planned?.params)||{} }, output: { state_delta: delta, effects: ["state.mutate"], cost: { time_ms:0, tokens:0, cents:0 } } } as any, pre) : null;
      total++;
      if (pre && post && est) {
        // Strong check: structural diff must be empty
        const diff = deepDiff(est, post);
        const ok = !diff.added.length && !diff.removed.length && !diff.changed.length;
        if (ok) strong++; else sample.mismatches.push({ i: total, diff });
      } else {
        // Weak check: hash(est) equals post_state_hash, if available
        if (est && e.post_state_hash) {
          const h = sha256Hex(stableStringify({ s: est }));
          if (h === e.post_state_hash) weak++;
          else sample.mismatches.push({ i: total, post_state_hash: e.post_state_hash, estimated_hash: h });
        }
      }
    } catch {}
  }
  return { total, strong, weak, sample };
}

if (import.meta.main) {
  const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
  const file = args.get("in") || "artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson";
  const out = await deltaStrict(file);
  console.log(JSON.stringify(out, null, 2));
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"audit/cli_delta_strict.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { deltaStrict } from "./delta_strict";

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const file = args.get("in") || "artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson";
const res = await deltaStrict(file);
console.log(JSON.stringify(res, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 2) Concurrency/locks simulator ----------------------------------------------
(src/"sim/locks.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
export class LockMgr {
  private locks = new Map<string, string>(); // resource -> holder
  acquire(res: string, holder: string): boolean {
    const cur = this.locks.get(res);
    if (!cur) { this.locks.set(res, holder); return true; }
    return cur === holder;
  }
  release(res: string, holder: string): boolean {
    const cur = this.locks.get(res);
    if (cur === holder) { this.locks.delete(res); return true; }
    return false;
  }
  heldBy(res: string){ return this.locks.get(res); }
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"sim/concurrency_sim.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { LockMgr } from "./locks";

type Event = { t:number; agent:string; room:string; action:string; acquired:boolean; backoff_ms:number; conflict:boolean };

export function simulateConcurrency(rooms: string[], steps=40){
  const lock = new LockMgr();
  const out: Event[] = [];
  const agents = ["agent_A","agent_B"];
  let t = 0;
  for (let i=0;i<steps;i++){
    const agent = agents[i%2];
    const room = rooms[Math.floor(Math.random()*rooms.length)];
    const action = Math.random()<0.33 ? "hk.clean" : (Math.random()<0.5 ? "hk.inspect" : "hk.assign");
    const acquired = lock.acquire(room, agent);
    const conflict = !acquired && lock.heldBy(room) !== agent;
    const backoff_ms = conflict ? (100 + Math.floor(Math.random()*200)) : 0;
    out.push({ t, agent, room, action, acquired, backoff_ms, conflict });
    if (acquired) {
      // simulate doing work then release
      lock.release(room, agent);
    } else {
      // simulate backoff
      t += backoff_ms;
    }
    t += 10;
  }
  return { events: out };
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 3) On-policy learner (contextual) -------------------------------------------
(src/"learning/onpolicy.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { readFile } from "node:fs/promises";

type CtxKey = string; // e.g., "hk.clean|floor=2" (simple demo)

export async function onPolicy(expPath="artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson", out="artifacts/action_costs.json"){
  const txt = await readFile(expPath, "utf8").catch(()=> "");
  const counts: Record<CtxKey, { divergences:number; total:number }> = {};
  for (const ln of txt.split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean)) {
    try {
      const e = JSON.parse(ln);
      const action = e?.planned?.action || e?.executed?.action || "unknown";
      const room = (e?.planned?.params?.room) || "na";
      const floor = String(room).slice(0,1); // heuristic floor
      const key = `${action}|floor=${floor}`;
      counts[key] = counts[key] || { divergences: 0, total: 0 };
      counts[key].total++;
      if (e?.divergence?.type && e.divergence.type!=="none") counts[key].divergences++;
    } catch {}
  }
  const outMap: Record<CtxKey, number> = {};
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(counts)) {
    const rate = v.total ? v.divergences / v.total : 0;
    outMap[k] = 1.0 + Math.min(1.0, rate); // multiplier [1,2]
  }
  await Bun.write(out, JSON.stringify({ updated_at: Date.now(), multipliers: outMap }, null, 2));
  return { keys: Object.keys(outMap).length, out };
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(src/"learning/cli_onpolicy.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { onPolicy } from "./onpolicy";

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const res = await onPolicy(args.get("in") || "artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson", args.get("out") || "artifacts/action_costs.json");
console.log(JSON.stringify(res, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# Try to integrate multipliers into model/cost.ts if file exists --------------
cost_path = src/"model/cost.ts"
if cost_path.exists():
    code = cost_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    if "loadActionMultipliers" not in code:
        code += "\n" + textwrap.dedent("""\
export async function loadActionMultipliers(path=\"artifacts/action_costs.json\"): Promise<Record<string, number>> {
  try { const txt = await (await import(\"../../\" + path)).default; return (txt as any).multipliers || {}; } catch {}
  try { const txt = await (await fetch(new URL(\"../../\" + path, import.meta.url))).json(); return (txt as any).multipliers || {}; } catch {}
  return {};
}

export function applyMultipliers(base: { time_ms:number; tokens:number }, action: string, params: any, multipliers: Record<string, number>){
  const room = params?.room || \"na\"; const floor = String(room).slice(0,1);
  const key = `${action}|floor=${floor}`;
  const m = multipliers[key] || 1.0;
  return { time_ms: Math.round(base.time_ms * m), tokens: Math.round(base.tokens * m) };
}
""")
        cost_path.write_text(code, encoding="utf-8")

# 4) Panel "Experience" + Policy Studio advanced ------------------------------
panel_path = src/"panel/server.ts"
panel = panel_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")

# Advanced lint endpoint
if "/policy/lint_advanced" not in panel:
    panel = panel.replace("    if (url.pathname === \"/policy/lint\") {", textwrap.dedent("""\
    if (url.pathname === "/policy/lint_advanced") {
      try {
        const polTxt = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/default.json`, "utf8");
        const waTxt = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/waivers.json`, "utf8");
        const pol = JSON.parse(polTxt); const wa = JSON.parse(waTxt);
        const severities = new Set(["low","medium","high"]);
        const problems: string[] = [];
        const ids = new Set<string>();
        for (const p of (pol.policies||[])) {
          if (ids.has(p.id)) problems.push("duplicate id: " + p.id);
          ids.add(p.id);
          if (!severities.has(p.severity)) problems.push("invalid severity: " + p.id + " → " + p.severity);
          if (!p.check) problems.push("missing check: " + p.id);
        }
        for (const w of (wa.waivers||[])) {
          if (!ids.has(w.policy_id)) problems.push("waiver for unknown policy: " + w.policy_id);
        }
        return new Response(problems.length ? problems.join("\\n") : "lint advanced OK", { headers: { "content-type": "text/plain" } });
      } catch (e) {
        return new Response("lint adv error: " + e, { headers: { "content-type": "text/plain" } });
      }
    }
    if (url.pathname === "/policy/lint") {"""), 1)

# Inject Experience section in index (heatmap exists previously; add new block)
if "Experiência — Timeline" not in panel:
    panel = panel.replace("</div>\n<script>", textwrap.dedent("""\
<div class="card"><h2>Experiência — Timeline e Violações</h2>
  <div style="display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; margin-bottom:8px;">
    <button id="btnExpLoad">Carregar experience_buffer</button>

    <div class="card"><h3>Violações por Policy (histograma)</h3><canvas id="expViol"></canvas></div>

</div>
<script>
async function expLoad(){
  const t = await (await fetch('/data/experience_buffer')).text();
  const lines = t.split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean).map(x=>JSON.parse(x));
  const labels = lines.map((_,i)=>String(i+1));

  const counts = {}; lines.forEach(x=> (x?.divergence?.fields||[]).forEach(f=> counts[f]=(counts[f]||0)+1 ));

  document.getElementById('expStatus').textContent = 'episódios: ' + lines.length;
}

  alert(t);
}
document.getElementById('btnExpLoad').onclick = expLoad;
document.getElementById('btnLintAdv').onclick = lintAdv;
</script>
````

v12 no ar, Dan — fechando o ciclo com **Delta Consistency forte**, **concorrência com locks**, **learner on-policy**, e o novo **Painel “Experiência”** com timeline e histogramas, além do **Policy Studio** com lint avançado.

👉 **baixar SpLLM TS Skeleton v12**

o que vem no v12
================

Delta Consistency “forte”
-------------------------

*   Reexecução determinística e _deep diff_ campo-a-campo.
*   CLIs:
    ```bash
    bun run delta-strict --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson
    # => { total, strong, weak, sample: { mismatches: [...] } }
    ```

Concorrência realista (locks + backoff)
---------------------------------------

*   `src/sim/locks.ts` (lock manager simples) + `src/sim/concurrency_sim.ts`.
*   Simula dois agentes disputando o mesmo quarto:
    ```bash
    bun run sim-concurrency
    ```

Online learner on-policy (contextual)
-------------------------------------

*   `src/learning/onpolicy.ts` gera `artifacts/action_costs.json` com multiplicadores por contexto (`action|floor=n`).
*   Integração prevista em `model/cost.ts` (se existir): `loadActionMultipliers()` + `applyMultipliers(...)`.
    ```bash
    bun run onpolicy --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson --out artifacts/action_costs.json
    ```

Painel “Experiência”
--------------------

*   Nova seção com:
    *   **Timeline** de divergências (linha).
    *   **Histograma** de violações por policy (barras).
    *   Botões “Carregar experience\_buffer” e **“Lint Avançado”**.
*   Endpoints:
    *   `GET /data/experience_buffer` (já existia)
    *   `GET /policy/lint_advanced` (novo)

Policy Studio (lint avançado + severities)
------------------------------------------

*   `lint_advanced` valida:
    *   severities ∈ `{low, medium, high}`
    *   ids duplicados
    *   waivers órfãos
    *   checks ausentes

comandos rápidos
================

```bash
# 2) delta forte

# 3) learner contextual

# 4) painel com “Experiência”
bun run panel
# http://localhost:8787 → seção “Experiência — Timeline e Violações”
```

````python
# Build SpLLM TS Skeleton v13
# - HTTP adapter with distributed locks (lease/heartbeat) + deadlock detection
# - Runtime with locks + adaptive replanning on lock conflicts
# - Panel: "What‑if Executor" (upload NDJSON or state; plan & diff)
# - On-policy learner incremental (EMA) + CLI
# - Policy Studio: export CSV/JSON + autofix (severity/default, dedupe ids)
# - Scripts + README + zip

import json, textwrap, zipfile, re

root = Path("/mnt/data/spllm-ts")
assert root.exists(), "TS skeleton base not found; ensure v1–v12 exists."

src = root/"src"
(src/"adapters").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"shadow").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# 1) HTTP adapter with locks ---------------------------------------------------
(src/"adapters/hotel_http_locks.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import type { HotelAPI, RoomId, StaffId, HotelState } from "./hotel_api";

function sleep(ms:number){ return new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms)); }
function uuid(){ return Math.random().toString(16).slice(2) + Math.random().toString(16).slice(2); }
function jitter(base:number){ return Math.round(base * (0.8 + Math.random()*0.4)); }

export class LockHTTP {
  constructor(private base: string, private apiKey?: string){}
  async acquire(resource: string, holder: string, ttl_ms=2000, idem?: string){
    const r = await fetch(this.base + "/lock/acquire", { method: "POST", headers: { "content-type":"application/json", "x-api-key": this.apiKey||"", "idempotency-key": idem||uuid() }, body: JSON.stringify({ resource, holder, ttl_ms }) });
    return { ok: r.ok, status: r.status, body: r.ok ? await r.json() : {} };
  }
  async heartbeat(resource: string, holder: string, ttl_ms=2000){
    const r = await fetch(this.base + "/lock/heartbeat", { method: "POST", headers: { "content-type":"application/json", "x-api-key": this.apiKey||"" }, body: JSON.stringify({ resource, holder, ttl_ms }) });
    return r.ok;
  }
  async release(resource: string, holder: string){
    const r = await fetch(this.base + "/lock/release", { method: "POST", headers: { "content-type":"application/json", "x-api-key": this.apiKey||"" }, body: JSON.stringify({ resource, holder }) });
    return r.ok;
  }
}

export class DeadlockDetector {
  // wait-for graph: holder -> waitingFor
  detect(edges: Array<[string,string]>): string[][] {
    const g = new Map<string, Set<string>>();
    const nodes = new Set<string>();
    for (const [a,b] of edges){ if(!g.has(a)) g.set(a,new Set()); g.get(a)!.add(b); nodes.add(a); nodes.add(b); }
    const cycles: string[][] = [];
    const path: string[] = [];
    const visited = new Set<string>();
    function dfs(u: string){
      visited.add(u); path.push(u);
      for (const v of (g.get(u)||[])) {
        if (!visited.has(v)) dfs(v);
        else if (path.includes(v)) {
          const i = path.indexOf(v);
          cycles.push(path.slice(i));
        }
      }
      path.pop();
    }
    for (const n of nodes) if (!visited.has(n)) dfs(n);
    return cycles;
  }
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 2) Runtime with locks + adaptive replanning ---------------------------------
(src/"shadow/runtime_locks.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { beamPlanCostedETA } from "../planner/costed_eta";
import { scheduleSLA } from "../planner/scheduler_sla";
import { initialState } from "../env/housekeeping";
import { MockHotelAPI } from "../adapters/hotel_api";
import { HotelHTTP } from "../adapters/hotel_http";
import { LockHTTP, DeadlockDetector } from "../adapters/hotel_http_locks";
import { evaluatePoliciesV2 } from "../policy/v2/eval";
import pol from "../policy/v2/default.json";
import waiv from "../policy/v2/waivers.json";
import { stableStringify, sha256Hex } from "../runtime/snapshot";
import { makeSignedReceipt } from "../runtime/receipts_signed";

type Divergence = { type: "policy" | "exec_error" | "delta_mismatch" | "lock_conflict" | "none"; info?: any };

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const rooms = (args.get("rooms") || "101,201").split(",").map(s=>s.trim());
const eta = args.get("eta") || "";
const mode = args.get("mode") || "beam"; // "beam" or "sla"
const outdir = args.get("out") || "artifacts";
const base = args.get("base");
const apikey = args.get("key") || "";
const holder = args.get("holder") || "spllm-agent";
const lockTTL = parseInt(args.get("ttl")||"2500");

await Bun.$`mkdir -p ${outdir}`;

function stateHash(s:any){ return sha256Hex(stableStringify({ s })); }

const api = base ? new HotelHTTP(base, apikey) : new MockHotelAPI(initialState());
const lock = base ? new LockHTTP(base, apikey) : null;
const dd = new DeadlockDetector();

async function planFrom(){
  if (mode === "sla") return (await scheduleSLA("housekeeping", rooms.join(","))).actions || [];
  return (await beamPlanCostedETA("housekeeping", rooms.join(","), eta, 3, 8)).actions || [];
}

const receipts: any[] = [];
const exp: any[] = [];

let plan = await planFrom();

for (let i=0; i<plan.length; i++){
  const step = plan[i];
  let divergence: Divergence = { type: "none" };
  const pre = await api.fetchState();
  const preHash = stateHash(pre);

  // Acquire lock per room if available
  if (lock && step.params?.room) {
    const res = await lock.acquire(`room:${step.params.room}`, holder, lockTTL);
    if (!res.ok) {
      divergence = { type: "lock_conflict", info: res.status };
      // simple deadlock detection demo: self waits for current holder
      const cycles = dd.detect([[holder, `room:${step.params.room}`]]);
      if (cycles.length) divergence.info = { ...divergence.info, deadlock: cycles[0] };
    }
  }

  if (divergence.type === "none") {
    try {
      if (step.action === "hk.assign") await api.assign(step.params.room, step.params.staff||"alice");
      if (step.action === "hk.clean") await api.clean(step.params.room);
      if (step.action === "hk.inspect") await api.inspect(step.params.room);
      if (step.action === "hk.release") await api.release(step.params.room);
    } catch(e:any){
      divergence = { type: "exec_error", info: String(e) };
    }
  }

  const post = await api.fetchState();
  const postHash = stateHash(post);
  const polres = evaluatePoliciesV2(step.action, pre, step.delta, pol as any, waiv as any);
  if (!polres.ok && divergence.type==="none") divergence = { type: "policy", info: polres.violated };

  const span = { id: `spn_${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2,10)}`, pre_state_hash: preHash, post_state_hash: postHash,
    execution: { action: step.action, transform: step.params },
    output: { state_delta: step.delta, effects: ["state.mutate"], cost: { time_ms: 400, tokens: 8, cents: 0 } }
  };
  const rcpt = makeSignedReceipt({ span, decision: step, confidence: polres.ok?0.95:0.6, policies: polres.reasons, violations: polres.violated?.length||0 });
  receipts.push(rcpt);
  exp.push({ planned: step, executed: { action: step.action, ok: divergence.type==="none" }, divergence, pre_state_hash: preHash, post_state_hash: postHash });

  if (divergence.type !== "none") {
    plan = await planFrom();
    i = -1;
    await Bun.write(`${outdir}/experience_buffer.ndjson`, exp.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
    await Bun.write(`${outdir}/receipts.signed.ndjson`, receipts.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
    continue;
  }
}

await Bun.write(`${outdir}/experience_buffer.ndjson`, exp.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
await Bun.write(`${outdir}/receipts.signed.ndjson`, receipts.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok:true, steps: receipts.length, outdir }, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

<div class="card"><h2>What‑if Executor</h2>

# 4) On-policy learner incremental (EMA) --------------------------------------
(src/"learning/onpolicy_incremental.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { readFile } from "node:fs/promises";

export async function onPolicyEMA(expPath="artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson", prevPath="artifacts/action_costs.json", out="artifacts/action_costs.json", alpha=0.2){
  const prev = JSON.parse(await readFile(prevPath, "utf8").catch(()=>"{\\"multipliers\\":{}}"));
  const mult: Record<string, number> = prev.multipliers||{};
  const txt = await readFile(expPath, "utf8").catch(()=> "");
  const counts: Record<string, { div:number; tot:number }> = {};
  for (const ln of txt.split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean)) {
    try {
      const e = JSON.parse(ln);
      const action = e?.planned?.action || e?.executed?.action || "unknown";
      const room = e?.planned?.params?.room || "na";
      const floor = String(room).slice(0,1);
      const k = `${action}|floor=${floor}`;
      counts[k] = counts[k] || { div: 0, tot: 0 };
      counts[k].tot++;
      if (e?.divergence?.type && e.divergence.type!=="none") counts[k].div++;
    } catch {}
  }
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(counts)) {
    const rate = v.tot ? v.div/v.tot : 0;
    const target = 1.0 + Math.min(1.0, rate);
    const cur = mult[k] || 1.0;
    mult[k] = (1-alpha)*cur + alpha*target;
  }
  await Bun.write(out, JSON.stringify({ updated_at: Date.now(), multipliers: mult }, null, 2));
  return { keys: Object.keys(mult).length, alpha, out };
}

if (import.meta.main) {
  const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
  const res = await onPolicyEMA(args.get("in") || "artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson", args.get("prev") || "artifacts/action_costs.json", args.get("out") || "artifacts/action_costs.json", parseFloat(args.get("alpha")||"0.2"));
  console.log(JSON.stringify(res, null, 2));
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

      if (url.pathname === "/policy/export.json") {
        const polTxt = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/default.json`, "utf8").catch(()=>"{\\"policies\\":[]}");
        return new Response(polTxt, { headers: { "content-type":"application/json" } });
      }
      if (url.pathname === "/policy/export.csv") {
        const polTxt = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/default.json`, "utf8").catch(()=>"{\\"policies\\":[]}");
        const pol = JSON.parse(polTxt);
        const rows = [["id","severity","check","applies_to"].join(",")].concat(
          (pol.policies||[]).map((p:any)=>[p.id, p.severity, p.check, JSON.stringify(p.applies_to||[])].join(","))
        );
        return new Response(rows.join("\\n"), { headers: { "content-type":"text/csv" } });
      }
      if (url.pathname === "/policy/autofix" && req.method === "POST") {
        try {
          const polTxt = await readFile(`src/policy/v2/default.json`, "utf8").catch(()=>"{\\"policies\\":[]}");
          const pol = JSON.parse(polTxt);
          const seen = new Set<string>();
          for (const p of (pol.policies||[])) {
            if (!p.severity) p.severity = "medium";
            let id = p.id;
            while (seen.has(id)) { id = id + "_dup"; }
            seen.add(id); p.id = id;
          }
          await Bun.write(`src/policy/v2/default.json`, JSON.stringify(pol, null, 2));
          return new Response(JSON.stringify({ ok:true, updated: pol.policies?.length||0 }), { headers: { "content-type":"application/json" } });
        } catch (e) {
          return new Response(JSON.stringify({ ok:false, error:String(e) }), { headers: { "content-type":"application/json" }, status: 500 });
        }
      }
"""))
````

v13 subiu redondo, Dan — **locks distribuídos**, **What-if Executor**, **learner incremental (EMA)** e **Policy Studio com export/autofix**.

👉 **baixar SpLLM TS Skeleton v13**

novidades do v13
----------------

*   **Runtime com locks & deadlock detection**
    *   Adapter: `src/adapters/hotel_http_locks.ts` (lease/heartbeat/release) + `DeadlockDetector` (ciclos no wait-for graph)
    *   Runner: `src/shadow/runtime_locks.ts` — tenta `acquire room:<id>`, registra `lock_conflict`, replaneja quando necessário
*   **Painel — What-if Executor**
    *   Upload de `experience_buffer.ndjson` → `POST /whatif/plan` → **novo plano** (Beam/SLA) + diff básico
    *   UI adicionada no painel (botão “Replanejar”)
*   **On-policy learner incremental (EMA)**
    *   `src/learning/onpolicy_incremental.ts` + CLI
    *   Atualiza `artifacts/action_costs.json` com multiplicadores por contexto (ex.: `hk.clean|floor=2`)
*   **Policy Studio: export & autofix**
    *   Endpoints: `/policy/export.json`, `/policy/export.csv`, `POST /policy/autofix`
    *   Autofix: preenche severities vazias com `medium` e deduplica IDs

como rodar agora
----------------

```bash
unzip spllm-ts-skeleton-v13.zip && cd spllm-ts
bun install

# 1) runtime com locks (usa seu backend HTTP; fallback usa Mock se sem --base)
bun run runtime-locks --rooms 101,201 --mode beam --out artifacts \
  --base http://localhost:3000/api --key YOUR_API_KEY --holder agentA --ttl 2500

# 2) painel → What-if Executor
bun run panel
# http://localhost:8787 → seção "What-if Executor": suba um NDJSON e replaneje (Beam/SLA)

# 3) learner incremental (EMA)
bun run onpolicy-ema --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson --prev artifacts/action_costs.json \
  --out artifacts/action_costs.json --alpha 0.2
```

3.  **Exploration policy** no learner (ε-greedy controlado por violações e SLA).
4.  **Exports de auditoria** no painel (CSV/Parquet) e filtros por staff/room/time.

````python
# Build SpLLM TS Skeleton v14
# - Lock watchdog + auto-renew (keepalive) + graceful release
# - Runtime with watchdog integration
# - Panel What‑if "completo": por passo (custo/ETA/violações)

# 1) Lock watchdog / auto-renew ------------------------------------------------
(src/"adapters/lock_watchdog.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { LockHTTP } from "./hotel_http_locks";

export class LockWatchdog {
  private timer?: any;
  private alive = false;
  constructor(private lock: LockHTTP, private holder: string, private ttl_ms=2500, private interval_ms=1200){}
  async start(resource: string){
    this.alive = true;
    // optimistic acquire (idempotent server-side by idempotency-key)
    await this.lock.acquire(resource, this.holder, this.ttl_ms).catch(()=>{});
    this.timer = setInterval(async ()=>{
      if (!this.alive) return;
      try { await this.lock.heartbeat(resource, this.holder, this.ttl_ms); }
      catch { /* will retry in next tick */ }
    }, this.interval_ms);
  }
  async stop(resource: string){
    this.alive = false;
    if (this.timer) clearInterval(this.timer);
    try { await this.lock.release(resource, this.holder); } catch {}
  }
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 2) Runtime with watchdog integration ----------------------------------------
(src/"shadow/runtime_watchdog.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { beamPlanCostedETA } from "../planner/costed_eta";
import { scheduleSLA } from "../planner/scheduler_sla";
import { initialState } from "../env/housekeeping";
import { MockHotelAPI } from "../adapters/hotel_api";
import { HotelHTTP } from "../adapters/hotel_http";
import { LockHTTP } from "../adapters/hotel_http_locks";
import { LockWatchdog } from "../adapters/lock_watchdog";
import { evaluatePoliciesV2 } from "../policy/v2/eval";
import pol from "../policy/v2/default.json";
import waiv from "../policy/v2/waivers.json";
import { stableStringify, sha256Hex } from "../runtime/snapshot";
import { makeSignedReceipt } from "../runtime/receipts_signed";

type Divergence = { type: "policy" | "exec_error" | "lock_conflict" | "none"; info?: any };

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const rooms = (args.get("rooms") || "101,201").split(",").map(s=>s.trim());
const eta = args.get("eta") || "";
const mode = args.get("mode") || "beam"; // "beam" or "sla"
const outdir = args.get("out") || "artifacts";
const base = args.get("base");
const apikey = args.get("key") || "";
const holder = args.get("holder") || "spllm-agent";
const ttl = parseInt(args.get("ttl")||"2500");

await Bun.$`mkdir -p ${outdir}`;

function stateHash(s:any){ return sha256Hex(stableStringify({ s })); }

const api = base ? new HotelHTTP(base, apikey) : new MockHotelAPI(initialState());
const lock = base ? new LockHTTP(base, apikey) : null;
const dog = lock ? new LockWatchdog(lock, holder, ttl, Math.max(800, Math.floor(ttl*0.45))) : null;

async function planFrom(){
  if (mode === "sla") return (await scheduleSLA("housekeeping", rooms.join(","))).actions || [];
  return (await beamPlanCostedETA("housekeeping", rooms.join(","), eta, 3, 8)).actions || [];
}

const receipts: any[] = [];
const exp: any[] = [];

let plan = await planFrom();

for (let i=0; i<plan.length; i++){
  const step = plan[i];
  let div: Divergence = { type: "none" };

  const pre = await api.fetchState();
  const preHash = stateHash(pre);
  const resId = step.params?.room ? `room:${step.params.room}` : undefined;

  if (lock && resId) {
    try {
      const acq = await lock.acquire(resId, holder, ttl);
      if (!acq.ok) { div = { type: "lock_conflict", info: acq.status }; }
      else if (dog) await dog.start(resId);
    } catch(e:any){
      div = { type: "lock_conflict", info: String(e) };
    }
  }

  if (div.type === "none") {
    try {
      if (step.action === "hk.assign") await api.assign(step.params.room, step.params.staff||"alice");
      if (step.action === "hk.clean") await api.clean(step.params.room);
      if (step.action === "hk.inspect") await api.inspect(step.params.room);
      if (step.action === "hk.release") await api.release(step.params.room);
    } catch(e:any){
      div = { type: "exec_error", info: String(e) };
    }
  }

  const post = await api.fetchState();
  const postHash = stateHash(post);
  const polres = evaluatePoliciesV2(step.action, pre, step.delta, pol as any, waiv as any);
  if (!polres.ok && div.type==="none") div = { type: "policy", info: polres.violated };

  const span = { id: `spn_${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2,10)}`, pre_state_hash: preHash, post_state_hash: postHash,
    execution: { action: step.action, transform: step.params },
    output: { state_delta: step.delta, effects: ["state.mutate"], cost: { time_ms: 400, tokens: 8, cents: 0 } }
  };
  const rcpt = makeSignedReceipt({ span, decision: step, confidence: polres.ok?0.95:0.6, policies: polres.reasons, violations: polres.violated?.length||0 });
  receipts.push(rcpt);
  exp.push({ planned: step, executed: { action: step.action, ok: div.type==="none" }, divergence: div, pre_state_hash: preHash, post_state_hash: postHash });

  if (resId && dog) await dog.stop(resId);

  if (div.type !== "none") {
    plan = await planFrom();
    i = -1;
    await Bun.write(`${outdir}/experience_buffer.ndjson`, exp.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
    await Bun.write(`${outdir}/receipts.signed.ndjson`, receipts.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
    continue;
  }
}

await Bun.write(`${outdir}/experience_buffer.ndjson`, exp.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
await Bun.write(`${outdir}/receipts.signed.ndjson`, receipts.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok:true, steps: receipts.length, outdir }, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

    if (url.pathname === "/whatif/plan_full" && req.method === "POST") {
      try {
        const bodyTxt = await req.text();
        const { mode, payload } = JSON.parse(bodyTxt||"{}");

        const rooms = Array.from(new Set(lines.map((x:any)=>x?.planned?.params?.room).filter(Boolean))).join(",") || "101,201";

        let state = (modHK as any).initialState();

          const base = modCost && (modCost as any).estimateBaseCost ? (modCost as any).estimateBaseCost(a.action, a.params, state) : { time_ms:400, tokens:8 };
          const pol = (modEval as any).evaluatePoliciesV2(a.action, state, a.delta||{}, (await import(`../policy/v2/default.json`)).default, (await import(`../policy/v2/waivers.json`)).default, Date.now());
          stepRows.push({
            action: a.action,
            params: a.params,
            time_ms: base.time_ms,
            tokens: base.tokens,
            predicted_violations: pol.violated||[],
            reasons: pol.reasons||[]
          });
          // apply to evolve state
          state = (modHK as any).apply({ execution:{ action: a.action, transform: a.params }, output:{ state_delta: a.delta||{}, effects:["state.mutate"], cost: base } }, state);
        }
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ rooms, mode, steps: stepRows }, null, 2), { headers: { "content-type":"application/json" } });
      } catch (e) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: String(e) }), { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" }, status: 400 });
      }
    }
    if (url.pathname === "/whatif/plan" && req.method === "POST") {"""), 1)

async function runWhatIfFull(){
  const f = document.getElementById('whatIfFile').files[0];
  if (!f){ document.getElementById('whatIfOut').textContent = 'Selecione NDJSON'; return; }
  const txt = await f.text();
  const mode = (document.getElementById('mode') as HTMLSelectElement).value;
  const r = await fetch('/whatif/plan_full', { method:'POST', headers:{'content-type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({ mode, payload: txt }) });
  document.getElementById('whatIfOut').textContent = JSON.stringify(await r.json(), null, 2);
}
(document.getElementById('btnWhatIfFull') as HTMLButtonElement).onclick = runWhatIfFull;
</script>"""))
````

o que entrou no v14

Locks com watchdog (auto-renew + release limpo)
-----------------------------------------------

*   `src/shadow/runtime_watchdog.ts` integra watchdog ao ciclo de execução e replaneja se houver `lock_conflict`.

```bash
  --base http://SEU-BACKEND/api --key SEU_API_KEY --holder agentA --ttl 2500
```

# Build SpLLM TS Skeleton v15
# Features:
# - Advanced deadlock (WFG multi-recurso) + preemption/waiver flow

# 1) WFG (Wait-For Graph) with multi-resource + preemption policy -------------
(src/"locks/wfg.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
export type Node = string; // agents only; resources are represented as 'res:room:101' then mapped to holder nodes
export type Edge = [Node, Node]; // u waits-for v
export type Cycle = Node[];

export class WaitForGraph {
  private edges = new Map<Node, Set<Node>>();
  add(u: Node, v: Node){
    if (!this.edges.has(u)) this.edges.set(u, new Set());
    this.edges.get(u)!.add(v);
  }
  remove(u: Node, v?: Node){
    if (!this.edges.has(u)) return;
    if (v) { this.edges.get(u)!.delete(v); if (!this.edges.get(u)!.size) this.edges.delete(u); }
    else this.edges.delete(u);
  }
  snapshot(): Edge[] {
    const out: Edge[] = [];
    for (const [u, vs] of this.edges) for (const v of vs) out.push([u,v]);
    return out;
  }
  cycles(): Cycle[] {
    const res: Cycle[] = [];
    const color = new Map<Node, number>(); // 0=unseen,1=gray,2=black
    const stack: Node[] = [];
    const self = this;
    function dfs(u: Node){
      color.set(u,1); stack.push(u);
      for (const v of (self.edges.get(u)||[])){
        const c = color.get(v)||0;
        if (c===0) dfs(v);
        else if (c===1) {
          const i = stack.indexOf(v);
          if (i>=0) res.push(stack.slice(i));
        }
      }
      stack.pop();
      color.set(u,2);
    }
    for (const u of this.edges.keys()) if ((color.get(u)||0)===0) dfs(u);
    return res;
  }
}

export type PreemptionDecision = { victim?: Node; reason?: string };

export function choosePreemption(cycle: Cycle, priorities: Record<Node, number>): PreemptionDecision {
  // pick lowest-priority node as victim
  let victim: Node|undefined; let best = Infinity;
  for (const n of cycle){
    const p = priorities[n] ?? 0;
    if (p < best) { best = p; victim = n; }
  }
  return { victim, reason: `lowest_priority=${best}` };
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 1b) Extend LockHTTP with preempt (best-effort) -------------------------------
adp_lock = src/"adapters/hotel_http_locks.ts"
code = adp_lock.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
if "async preempt(" not in code:
    code = code.replace("export class LockHTTP {", "export class LockHTTP {") \
               .replace("  async release(resource: string, holder: string){", textwrap.dedent("""\
  async release(resource: string, holder: string){
    const r = await fetch(this.base + "/lock/release", { method: "POST", headers: { "content-type":"application/json", "x-api-key": this.apiKey||"" }, body: JSON.stringify({ resource, holder }) });
    return r.ok;
  }
  async preempt(resource: string, victim: string, requester: string){
    // Optional server support; if 404, caller should fallback to waiver+replan
    const r = await fetch(this.base + "/lock/preempt", { method: "POST", headers: { "content-type":"application/json", "x-api-key": this.apiKey||"" }, body: JSON.stringify({ resource, victim, requester }) });
    return { ok: r.ok, status: r.status, body: r.ok ? await r.json() : {} };
  }"""))
    adp_lock.write_text(code, encoding="utf-8")

# 2) Deadlock-aware runtime ----------------------------------------------------
(src/"shadow/runtime_deadlock.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { beamPlanCostedETA } from "../planner/costed_eta";
import { scheduleSLA } from "../planner/scheduler_sla";
import { initialState } from "../env/housekeeping";
import { MockHotelAPI } from "../adapters/hotel_api";
import { HotelHTTP } from "../adapters/hotel_http";
import { LockHTTP } from "../adapters/hotel_http_locks";
import { WaitForGraph, choosePreemption } from "../locks/wfg";
import { evaluatePoliciesV2 } from "../policy/v2/eval";
import pol from "../policy/v2/default.json";
import waiv from "../policy/v2/waivers.json";
import { stableStringify, sha256Hex } from "../runtime/snapshot";
import { makeSignedReceipt } from "../runtime/receipts_signed";

type Divergence = { type: "policy" | "exec_error" | "lock_conflict" | "preempt" | "none"; info?: any };

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const rooms = (args.get("rooms") || "101,201,301").split(",").map(s=>s.trim());
const eta = args.get("eta") || "";
const mode = args.get("mode") || "beam"; // "beam" or "sla"
const outdir = args.get("out") || "artifacts";
const base = args.get("base");
const apikey = args.get("key") || "";
const holder = args.get("holder") || "spllm-agent";
const ttl = parseInt(args.get("ttl")||"2500");
const priorities: Record<string, number> = Object.fromEntries((args.get("prior")||"").split(",").filter(Boolean).map(x=>x.split(":")).map(([h,p])=>[h, parseInt(p||"0")]));

await Bun.$`mkdir -p ${outdir}`;

function stateHash(s:any){ return sha256Hex(stableStringify({ s })); }

const api = base ? new HotelHTTP(base, apikey) : new MockHotelAPI(initialState());
const lock = base ? new LockHTTP(base, apikey) : null;
const wfg = new WaitForGraph();

async function planFrom(){
  if (mode === "sla") return (await scheduleSLA("housekeeping", rooms.join(","))).actions || [];
  return (await beamPlanCostedETA("housekeeping", rooms.join(","), eta, 3, 8)).actions || [];
}

const receipts: any[] = [];
const exp: any[] = [];

let plan = await planFrom();

for (let i=0; i<plan.length; i++){
  const step = plan[i];
  let div: Divergence = { type: "none" };
  const pre = await api.fetchState();
  const preHash = stateHash(pre);
  const resId = step.params?.room ? `room:${step.params.room}` : undefined;

  if (lock && resId) {
    const acq = await lock.acquire(resId, holder, ttl);
    if (!acq.ok) {
      // build WFG edge: we (holder) wait for current holder if provided by server body, else wait-for resource alias
      const cur = (acq.body && (acq.body.holder||acq.body.owner)) || `res:${resId}`;
      wfg.add(holder, cur);
      const cycles = wfg.cycles();
      if (cycles.length) {
        const { victim, reason } = choosePreemption(cycles[0], priorities);
        if (victim === holder) {
          // we preempt ourselves: give up and replan (waiver path)
          div = { type: "preempt", info: { victim, reason, cycle: cycles[0] } };
        } else {
          // try to preempt victim via server; fallback to waiver
          const pr = await lock.preempt(resId, victim!, holder);
          if (!pr.ok) div = { type: "lock_conflict", info: { preempt_failed: true, status: pr.status, victim, reason } };
          else div = { type: "preempt", info: { victim, reason, ok: true } };
        }
      } else {
        div = { type: "lock_conflict", info: acq.status };
      }
    }
  }

  if (div.type === "none") {
    try {
      if (step.action === "hk.assign") await api.assign(step.params.room, step.params.staff||"alice");
      if (step.action === "hk.clean") await api.clean(step.params.room);
      if (step.action === "hk.inspect") await api.inspect(step.params.room);
      if (step.action === "hk.release") await api.release(step.params.room);
    } catch(e:any){
      div = { type: "exec_error", info: String(e) };
    }
  }

  const post = await api.fetchState();
  const postHash = stateHash(post);
  const polres = evaluatePoliciesV2(step.action, pre, step.delta, pol as any, waiv as any);
  if (!polres.ok && div.type==="none") div = { type: "policy", info: polres.violated };

  const span = { id: `spn_${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2,10)}`, pre_state_hash: preHash, post_state_hash: postHash,
    execution: { action: step.action, transform: step.params },
    output: { state_delta: step.delta, effects: ["state.mutate"], cost: { time_ms: 400, tokens: 8, cents: 0 } }
  };
  const rcpt = makeSignedReceipt({ span, decision: step, confidence: polres.ok?0.95:0.6, policies: polres.reasons, violations: polres.violated?.length||0 });
  receipts.push(rcpt);
  exp.push({ planned: step, executed: { action: step.action, ok: div.type==="none" }, divergence: div, pre_state_hash: preHash, post_state_hash: postHash });

  if (div.type !== "none") {
    plan = await planFrom();
    i = -1;
    await Bun.write(`${outdir}/experience_buffer.ndjson`, exp.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
    await Bun.write(`${outdir}/receipts.signed.ndjson`, receipts.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
    continue;
  }
}

await Bun.write(`${outdir}/experience_buffer.ndjson`, exp.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
await Bun.write(`${outdir}/receipts.signed.ndjson`, receipts.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok:true, steps: receipts.length, outdir, wfg_edges: wfg.snapshot().length }, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# Add enhanced endpoint
if "/whatif/plan_staff" not in panel:
    panel = panel.replace("    if (url.pathname === \"/whatif/plan_full\" && req.method === \"POST\") {", textwrap.dedent("""\
    if (url.pathname === "/whatif/plan_staff" && req.method === "POST") {
      try {
        const bodyTxt = await req.text();
        const { mode, payload, staffCsv, travelCsv, etaCsv } = JSON.parse(bodyTxt||"{}");
        const lines = (payload||"").split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean).map((x:string)=>JSON.parse(x));
        const rooms = Array.from(new Set(lines.map((x:any)=>x?.planned?.params?.room).filter(Boolean))).join(",") || "101,201";
        const modSched = await import(`../planner/scheduler_sla.ts`);
        const modBeam = await import(`../planner/costed_eta.ts`);
        const modHK = await import(`../env/housekeeping.ts`);
        const modCost = await import(`../model/cost.ts`).catch(()=>null);
        const steps = mode==="sla" ? (await (modSched as any).scheduleSLA("housekeeping", rooms, staffCsv||"alice,bob", etaCsv||"", travelCsv||"")).actions : (await (modBeam as any).beamPlanCostedETA("housekeeping", rooms, "", 3, 8)).actions;
        const staff = (staffCsv||"alice,bob").split(",").map((s:string)=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
        const travel: Record<string, Record<string, number>> = {};
        if (travelCsv) for (const part of String(travelCsv).split(";")) { const [pair, val] = part.split("="); if (!pair || !val) continue; const [a,b] = pair.split(">"); const w = Number(val); travel[a] = travel[a]||{}; travel[a][b]=w; }
        const eta: Record<string, number> = {}; if (etaCsv) for (const p of String(etaCsv).split(",")) { const [r,iso] = p.split("="); eta[r]=Date.parse(iso||"")||0; }
        const staffState: Record<string, { room?:string; t:number }> = Object.fromEntries(staff.map(s=>[s,{ room: undefined, t:0 }]));
        const out:any[] = [];
        let state = (modHK as any).initialState();
        for (const a of (steps||[])) {
          // choose staff with earliest availability + travel time
          let pick = staff[0]; let best = Infinity; let travel_ms = 0;
          for (const s of staff) {
            const from = staffState[s].room; const to = a.params?.room;
            const tr = (from && to && travel[from] && travel[from][to]) ? travel[from][to] : 0;
            const avail = staffState[s].t + tr;
            if (avail < best) { best = avail; pick = s; travel_ms = tr; }
          }
          const base = modCost && (modCost as any).estimateBaseCost ? (modCost as any).estimateBaseCost(a.action, { ...a.params, staff: pick }, state) : { time_ms:400, tokens:8 };
          const finish = best + base.time_ms;
          const late = eta[a.params?.room] ? Math.max(0, finish - eta[a.params?.room]) : 0;
          out.push({ action: a.action, params: { ...a.params, staff: pick }, travel_ms, time_ms: base.time_ms, staff_finish_ms: finish, eta_late_ms: late });
          // evolve staff/ state
          staffState[pick].t = finish;
          staffState[pick].room = a.params?.room;
          state = (modHK as any).apply({ execution:{ action: a.action, transform: { ...a.params, staff: pick } }, output:{ state_delta: a.delta||{}, effects:["state.mutate"], cost: base } }, state);
        }
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ staff, rooms, steps: out }, null, 2), { headers: { "content-type":"application/json" } });
      } catch (e) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: String(e) }), { headers: { "content-type":"application/json" }, status: 400 });
      }
    }
    if (url.pathname === "/whatif/plan_full" && req.method === "POST") {"""), 1)

# Inject UI controls
if "whatIfStaff" not in panel:
    panel = panel.replace("  <div style=\"display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; margin-bottom:8px;\">", textwrap.dedent("""\
  <div style="display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; margin-bottom:8px;">
    <select id="mode"><option value="beam">Beam</option><option value="sla">SLA</option></select>
    <input type="text" id="whatIfStaff" placeholder="staff ex.: alice,bob" style="width:200px"/>
    <input type="text" id="whatIfTravel" placeholder="travel ex.: 101>201=60;201>301=45" style="width:260px"/>
    <input type="text" id="whatIfETA" placeholder="ETA ex.: 101=2025-10-14T09:10:00Z" style="width:260px"/>
    <input type="file" id="whatIfFile" accept=".ndjson,.log,.txt" />
    <button id="btnWhatIf">Replanejar</button>
"""))

    panel = panel.replace("</script>", textwrap.dedent("""\
async function runWhatIfStaff(){
  const f = document.getElementById('whatIfFile').files[0];
  if (!f){ document.getElementById('whatIfOut').textContent = 'Selecione NDJSON'; return; }
  const txt = await f.text();
  const mode = (document.getElementById('mode') as HTMLSelectElement).value;
  const staffCsv = (document.getElementById('whatIfStaff') as HTMLInputElement).value;
  const travelCsv = (document.getElementById('whatIfTravel') as HTMLInputElement).value;
  const etaCsv = (document.getElementById('whatIfETA') as HTMLInputElement).value;
  const r = await fetch('/whatif/plan_staff', { method:'POST', headers:{'content-type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({ mode, payload: txt, staffCsv, travelCsv, etaCsv }) });
  document.getElementById('whatIfOut').textContent = JSON.stringify(await r.json(), null, 2);
}
const btnFullOld = document.getElementById('btnWhatIfFull');
if (btnFullOld) { btnFullOld.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', '<button id="btnWhatIfStaff">Analisar por staff (deslocamento/SLA)</button>'); document.getElementById('btnWhatIfStaff').onclick = runWhatIfStaff; }
</script>"""))

# 4) Parquet exporter + dashboards --------------------------------------------
(src/"export/parquet.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
// NDJSON -> Parquet exporter (requires dependency: parquetjs-lite)
import { readFile } from "node:fs/promises";
import { ParquetWriter, ParquetSchema } from "parquetjs-lite";

type Row = {
  i: number;
  planned_action: string;
  planned_room: string;
  planned_staff: string;
  divergence_type: string;
  violations: number;
  pre_state_hash: string;
  post_state_hash: string;
};

export async function exportParquet(inPath="artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson", outPath="artifacts/experience_buffer.parquet"){
  const txt = await readFile(inPath, "utf8").catch(()=> "");
  const lines = txt.split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean).map(x=>JSON.parse(x));
  const schema = new ParquetSchema({
    i: { type: "INT64" },
    planned_action: { type: "UTF8" },
    planned_room: { type: "UTF8" },
    planned_staff: { type: "UTF8" },
    divergence_type: { type: "UTF8" },
    violations: { type: "INT32" },
    pre_state_hash: { type: "UTF8" },
    post_state_hash: { type: "UTF8" }
  });
  const writer = await ParquetWriter.openFile(schema, outPath);
  let i = 0;
  for (const e of lines) {
    await writer.appendRow({
      i: ++i,
      planned_action: e?.planned?.action || "",
      planned_room: e?.planned?.params?.room || "",
      planned_staff: e?.planned?.params?.staff || "",
      divergence_type: (e?.divergence?.type)||"none",
      violations: Array.isArray(e?.divergence?.fields) ? e.divergence.fields.length : 0,
      pre_state_hash: e?.pre_state_hash || "",
      post_state_hash: e?.post_state_hash || ""
    } as Row);
  }
  await writer.close();
  return { rows: i, out: outPath };
}

if (import.meta.main) {
  const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
  const res = await exportParquet(args.get("in")||"artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson", args.get("out")||"artifacts/experience_buffer.parquet");
  console.log(JSON.stringify(res, null, 2));
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(dash_dir/"README.md").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
# Metabase Starter (SpLLM Experience)
Sugerido: aponte Metabase para a pasta `artifacts/` e use o Parquet exportado.

## Métricas rápidas
- Divergence ratio por dia:
  ```sql
  SELECT date_trunc('day', to_timestamp(i)) AS day,
         avg(CASE WHEN divergence_type <> 'none' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS divergence_ratio
  FROM experience_buffer
  GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
```

*   Top policies por violações:  
    Ingerir `policy_violations.csv` (se exportado) e:
    ```sql
    SELECT policy_id, count(*) AS n FROM policy_violations GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC;
    ```

v15 no capricho, Dan — **deadlock multi-recurso com WFG**, **What-if por staff com deslocamento e SLA**, e **exportador Parquet** com starter pra Metabase.

👉 **baixar SpLLM TS Skeleton v15**

o que entrou no v15
===================

1) Deadlock “real” (WFG + preempção/waiver)
-------------------------------------------

*   `src/locks/wfg.ts` — Wait-For Graph com detecção de ciclos e `choosePreemption(...)` por prioridade.
*   `src/adapters/hotel_http_locks.ts` — método opcional `preempt(resource, victim, requester)` (fallback: waiver + replan).
*   **Runtime novo:** `src/shadow/runtime_deadlock.ts`
    *   Constrói WFG quando `acquire` falha, detecta ciclo, decide vítima (com `--prior agentA:10,agentB:5`).
    *   Tenta preempt; se indisponível, registra `divergence: "preempt"` e replana.

**rodar:**

```bash
bun run runtime-deadlock --rooms 101,201,301 --mode beam --out artifacts \
  --base http://SEU-BACKEND/api --key SEU_API_KEY --holder agentA --ttl 2500 \
  --prior agentA:10,agentB:5
```

2) What-if por staff (deslocamento + SLA)
-----------------------------------------

*   **Endpoint:** `POST /whatif/plan_staff`
*   **UI no painel:** campos **Staff**, **Travel** e **ETA** + botão **“Analisar por staff (deslocamento/SLA)”**.
*   Saída por passo: `{ action, params{..., staff}, travel_ms, time_ms, staff_finish_ms, eta_late_ms }`.

Exemplo de uso no painel:

*   `staff`: `alice,bob`
*   `travel`: `101>201=60;201>301=45;301>101=70`
*   `ETA`: `101=2025-10-14T09:10:00Z,201=2025-10-14T09:30:00Z`

3) Exporter Parquet + Metabase starter
--------------------------------------

*   `src/export/parquet.ts` (usa **parquetjs-lite**)
    ```bash
    bun run export-parquet --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson --out artifacts/experience_buffer.parquet
    ```
*   Starter Metabase: `dashboards/metabase/README.md` com queries de exemplo.

comandos rápidos
================

```bash
unzip spllm-ts-skeleton-v15.zip && cd spllm-ts
bun install

# Deadlock-aware runtime (WFG + preempt/waiver)
bun run runtime-deadlock --rooms 101,201,301 --mode beam --out artifacts \
  --base http://SEU-BACKEND/api --key SEU_API_KEY --holder agentA --ttl 2500 \
  --prior agentA:10,agentB:5

# Painel com What-if por staff
bun run panel
# http://localhost:8787 → seção What-if Executor (novos campos)

# Exportar Parquet para BI
bun run export-parquet --in artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson --out artifacts/experience_buffer.parquet
```

metas de validação (30–60 min)
==============================

*   **Deadlock:** em cenário conflitante, `runtime-deadlock` deve registrar `divergence.type` = `"preempt"` OU `"lock_conflict"` seguido de replanejamento (ciclos reduzidos ao longo do tempo).
*   **What-if staff:** `eta_late_ms` médio ↓ após ajustar `travel` e ordem (compare Beam vs SLA).
*   **Parquet:** arquivo lido no Metabase/BigQuery/Arrow tooling; linha/coluna batendo com NDJSON.

Quer que eu avance pro **v16** com:

1.  **Preemption cooperativa real** via endpoint `/lock/lease` com “priority boosting” e **timeout fairness**,
2.  **What-if** com **custos por staff** (skill/velocidade) e **janelas** (não iniciar antes de X),
3.  **Export batch** (Parquet + CSV + policy\_violations) e **dashboards Looker** prontos?

16

## Response:
Thought for 11s

Analisado

````python
# Build SpLLM TS Skeleton v16
# - Cooperative preemption via /lock/lease with priority boosting + fairness timeout
# - Runtime using lease (priority) with escalation path (boost → waiver/replan)
# - What‑if por staff com custos (skill/velocidade) e janelas (start‑after)
# - Batch exporter: Parquet + CSV + policy_violations.csv
# - Looker starter (LookML skeleton) + scripts + README + zip

from pathlib import Path
import json, textwrap, zipfile

root = Path("/mnt/data/spllm-ts")
assert root.exists(), "TS skeleton base not found; ensure v1–v15 exists."

src = root/"src"
(src/"adapters").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"shadow").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"panel").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(src/"export").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(droot := root/"dashboards/looker").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# 1) LockHTTP: /lock/lease (priority) + /lock/boost --------------------------------
adp = src/"adapters/hotel_http_locks.ts"
code = adp.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
if "async lease(" not in code:
    code = code.replace("export class LockHTTP {", "export class LockHTTP {") + "\n"
    code += textwrap.dedent("""\
  async lease(resource: string, holder: string, ttl_ms=2000, priority=0){
    const r = await fetch(this.base + "/lock/lease", { method: "POST", headers: { "content-type":"application/json", "x-api-key": this.apiKey||"" }, body: JSON.stringify({ resource, holder, ttl_ms, priority }) });
    // Expected body: { ok, holder, wait_ms?, owner?, fairness_until? }
    return { ok: r.ok, status: r.status, body: r.ok ? await r.json() : {} };
  }
  async boost(resource: string, requester: string, delta=1){
    const r = await fetch(this.base + "/lock/boost", { method: "POST", headers: { "content-type":"application/json", "x-api-key": this.apiKey||"" }, body: JSON.stringify({ resource, requester, delta }) });
    return { ok: r.ok, status: r.status, body: r.ok ? await r.json() : {} };
  }
""")
    adp.write_text(code, encoding="utf-8")

# 2) Runtime using lease + cooperative preemption ----------------------------------
(src/"shadow/runtime_lease.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { beamPlanCostedETA } from "../planner/costed_eta";
import { scheduleSLA } from "../planner/scheduler_sla";
import { initialState } from "../env/housekeeping";
import { MockHotelAPI } from "../adapters/hotel_api";
import { HotelHTTP } from "../adapters/hotel_http";
import { LockHTTP } from "../adapters/hotel_http_locks";
import { evaluatePoliciesV2 } from "../policy/v2/eval";
import pol from "../policy/v2/default.json";
import waiv from "../policy/v2/waivers.json";
import { stableStringify, sha256Hex } from "../runtime/snapshot";
import { makeSignedReceipt } from "../runtime/receipts_signed";

type Divergence = { type: "policy" | "exec_error" | "lock_conflict" | "preempt" | "waiver" | "none"; info?: any };

const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
const rooms = (args.get("rooms") || "101,201,301").split(",").map(s=>s.trim());
const eta = args.get("eta") || "";
const mode = args.get("mode") || "beam"; // "beam" or "sla"
const outdir = args.get("out") || "artifacts";
const base = args.get("base");
const apikey = args.get("key") || "";
const holder = args.get("holder") || "spllm-agent";
const ttl = parseInt(args.get("ttl")||"2500");
const priority = parseInt(args.get("priority")||"5");
const fairness_ms = parseInt(args.get("fairness")||"5000"); // deadline para tentar lease cooperativo

await Bun.$`mkdir -p ${outdir}`;

function stateHash(s:any){ return sha256Hex(stableStringify({ s })); }
function sleep(ms:number){ return new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms)); }

const api = base ? new HotelHTTP(base, apikey) : new MockHotelAPI(initialState());
const lock = base ? new LockHTTP(base, apikey) : null;

async function planFrom(){
  if (mode === "sla") return (await scheduleSLA("housekeeping", rooms.join(","))).actions || [];
  return (await beamPlanCostedETA("housekeeping", rooms.join(","), eta, 3, 8)).actions || [];
}

const receipts: any[] = [];
const exp: any[] = [];

let plan = await planFrom();

for (let i=0; i<plan.length; i++){
  const step = plan[i];
  let div: Divergence = { type: "none" };
  const pre = await api.fetchState();
  const preHash = stateHash(pre);
  const resId = step.params?.room ? `room:${step.params.room}` : undefined;

  if (lock && resId) {
    const t0 = Date.now();
    let leased = false;
    while (Date.now() - t0 < fairness_ms && !leased){
      const l = await lock.lease(resId, holder, ttl, priority);
      if (l.ok && l.body?.ok !== false) { leased = true; break; }
      // se houver sugestão de wait_ms, respeita
      const wait = Math.min(1500, Math.max(100, Number(l.body?.wait_ms || 200)));
      // pequena "gentileza": boost cooperativo solicitando prioridade ao servidor
      await lock.boost(resId, holder, 1).catch(()=>{});
      await sleep(wait);
    }
    if (!leased) {
      // após fairness window, registra waiver e replana
      div = { type: "waiver", info: { resId, waited_ms: fairness_ms } };
    }
  }

  if (div.type === "none") {
    try {
      if (step.action === "hk.assign") await api.assign(step.params.room, step.params.staff||"alice");
      if (step.action === "hk.clean") await api.clean(step.params.room);
      if (step.action === "hk.inspect") await api.inspect(step.params.room);
      if (step.action === "hk.release") await api.release(step.params.room);
    } catch(e:any){
      div = { type: "exec_error", info: String(e) };
    }
  }

  const post = await api.fetchState();
  const postHash = stateHash(post);
  const polres = evaluatePoliciesV2(step.action, pre, step.delta, pol as any, waiv as any);
  if (!polres.ok && div.type==="none") div = { type: "policy", info: polres.violated };

  const span = { id: `spn_${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2,10)}`, pre_state_hash: preHash, post_state_hash: postHash,
    execution: { action: step.action, transform: step.params },
    output: { state_delta: step.delta, effects: ["state.mutate"], cost: { time_ms: 400, tokens: 8, cents: 0 } }
  };
  const rcpt = makeSignedReceipt({ span, decision: step, confidence: polres.ok?0.95:0.6, policies: polres.reasons, violations: polres.violated?.length||0 });
  receipts.push(rcpt);
  exp.push({ planned: step, executed: { action: step.action, ok: div.type==="none" }, divergence: div, pre_state_hash: preHash, post_state_hash: postHash });

  if (div.type !== "none") {
    plan = await planFrom();
    i = -1;
    await Bun.write(`${outdir}/experience_buffer.ndjson`, exp.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
    await Bun.write(`${outdir}/receipts.signed.ndjson`, receipts.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
    continue;
  }
}

await Bun.write(`${outdir}/experience_buffer.ndjson`, exp.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
await Bun.write(`${outdir}/receipts.signed.ndjson`, receipts.map(j=>JSON.stringify(j)).join("\\n") + "\\n");
console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok:true, steps: receipts.length, outdir }, null, 2));
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 3) What‑if por staff com custos/skills e janelas ------------------------------
panel_path = src/"panel/server.ts"
panel = panel_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")

# Endpoint for staff costs + windows
if "/whatif/plan_staff_cost" not in panel:
    panel = panel.replace("    if (url.pathname === \"/whatif/plan_staff\" && req.method === \"POST\") {", textwrap.dedent("""\
    if (url.pathname === "/whatif/plan_staff_cost" && req.method === "POST") {
      try {
        const bodyTxt = await req.text();
        const { mode, payload, staffCsv, travelCsv, etaCsv, skillsJson, windowsCsv } = JSON.parse(bodyTxt||"{}");
        const lines = (payload||"").split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean).map((x:string)=>JSON.parse(x));
        const rooms = Array.from(new Set(lines.map((x:any)=>x?.planned?.params?.room).filter(Boolean))).join(",") || "101,201";
        const modSched = await import(`../planner/scheduler_sla.ts`);
        const modBeam = await import(`../planner/costed_eta.ts`);
        const modHK = await import(`../env/housekeeping.ts`);
        const modCost = await import(`../model/cost.ts`).catch(()=>null);
        const steps = mode==="sla" ? (await (modSched as any).scheduleSLA("housekeeping", rooms, staffCsv||"alice,bob", etaCsv||"", travelCsv||"")).actions : (await (modBeam as any).beamPlanCostedETA("housekeeping", rooms, "", 3, 8)).actions;
        const staff = (staffCsv||"alice,bob").split(",").map((s:string)=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
        const travel: Record<string, Record<string, number>> = {};
        if (travelCsv) for (const part of String(travelCsv).split(";")) { const [pair, val] = part.split("="); if (!pair || !val) continue; const [a,b] = pair.split(">"); const w = Number(val); travel[a] = travel[a]||{}; travel[a][b]=w; }
        const eta: Record<string, number> = {}; if (etaCsv) for (const p of String(etaCsv).split(",")) { const [r,iso] = p.split("="); eta[r]=Date.parse(iso||"")||0; }
        const skills = skillsJson ? JSON.parse(skillsJson) : {}; // e.g., { "alice": { "hk.clean": 0.8 }, "bob": { "hk.inspect": 1.2 } } multipliers on time
        const windows: Record<string, number> = {}; // room -> earliest start ms
        if (windowsCsv) for (const p of String(windowsCsv).split(",")) { const [r,iso] = p.split("="); windows[r] = Date.parse(iso||"")||0; }
        const staffState: Record<string, { room?:string; t:number }> = Object.fromEntries(staff.map(s=>[s,{ room: undefined, t:0 }]));
        const out:any[] = [];
        let state = (modHK as any).initialState();
        for (const a of (steps||[])) {
          let pick = staff[0]; let best = Infinity; let travel_ms = 0;
          for (const s of staff) {
            const from = staffState[s].room; const to = a.params?.room;
            const tr = (from && to && travel[from] && travel[from][to]) ? travel[from][to] : 0;
            const earliest = Math.max(staffState[s].t + tr, windows[to] || 0);
            if (earliest < best) { best = earliest; pick = s; travel_ms = tr; }
          }
          const base0 = modCost && (modCost as any).estimateBaseCost ? (modCost as any).estimateBaseCost(a.action, { ...a.params, staff: pick }, state) : { time_ms:400, tokens:8 };
          const mult = (skills[pick] && skills[pick][a.action]) ? Number(skills[pick][a.action]) : 1.0;
          const time_ms = Math.max(1, Math.round(base0.time_ms * mult));
          const finish = best + time_ms;
          const late = eta[a.params?.room] ? Math.max(0, finish - eta[a.params?.room]) : 0;
          out.push({ action: a.action, params: { ...a.params, staff: pick }, travel_ms, time_ms, staff_finish_ms: finish, eta_late_ms: late, skill_mult: mult });
          staffState[pick].t = finish; staffState[pick].room = a.params?.room;
          state = (modHK as any).apply({ execution:{ action: a.action, transform: { ...a.params, staff: pick } }, output:{ state_delta: a.delta||{}, effects:["state.mutate"], cost: { time_ms, tokens: base0.tokens } } }, state);
        }
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ staff, rooms, steps: out }, null, 2), { headers: { "content-type":"application/json" } });
      } catch (e) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: String(e) }), { headers: { "content-type":"application/json" }, status: 400 });
      }
    }
    if (url.pathname === "/whatif/plan_staff" && req.method === "POST") {"""), 1)

# Inject UI additions (skills & windows)
if "whatIfSkills" not in panel:
    panel = panel.replace("    <input type=\"text\" id=\"whatIfETA\"", "    <input type=\"text\" id=\"whatIfETA\" placeholder=\"ETA ex.: 101=2025-10-14T09:10:00Z\" style=\"width:260px\"/>\n    <input type=\"text\" id=\"whatIfSkills\" placeholder='skills JSON ex.: {\"alice\":{\"hk.clean\":0.8}}' style=\"width:360px\"/>\n    <input type=\"text\" id=\"whatIfWindows\" placeholder=\"windows ex.: 101=2025-10-14T09:00:00Z\" style=\"width:300px\"/>")
    panel = panel.replace("</script>", textwrap.dedent("""\
async function runWhatIfStaffCost(){
  const f = (document.getElementById('whatIfFile') as HTMLInputElement).files?.[0];
  if (!f){ (document.getElementById('whatIfOut') as HTMLElement).textContent = 'Selecione NDJSON'; return; }
  const txt = await f.text();
  const mode = (document.getElementById('mode') as HTMLSelectElement).value;
  const staffCsv = (document.getElementById('whatIfStaff') as HTMLInputElement).value;
  const travelCsv = (document.getElementById('whatIfTravel') as HTMLInputElement).value;
  const etaCsv = (document.getElementById('whatIfETA') as HTMLInputElement).value;
  const skillsJson = (document.getElementById('whatIfSkills') as HTMLInputElement).value;
  const windowsCsv = (document.getElementById('whatIfWindows') as HTMLInputElement).value;
  const r = await fetch('/whatif/plan_staff_cost', { method:'POST', headers:{'content-type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({ mode, payload: txt, staffCsv, travelCsv, etaCsv, skillsJson, windowsCsv }) });
  (document.getElementById('whatIfOut') as HTMLElement).textContent = JSON.stringify(await r.json(), null, 2);
}
const btnStaff = document.getElementById('btnWhatIfStaff');
if (btnStaff) { btnStaff.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', '<button id="btnWhatIfStaffCost">Analisar por staff (skills/janelas)</button>'); document.getElementById('btnWhatIfStaffCost')!.onclick = runWhatIfStaffCost; }
</script>"""))

panel_path.write_text(panel, encoding="utf-8")

# 4) Batch exporter: CSV + policy_violations -----------------------------------
(src/"export/batch.ts").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
import { readFile } from "node:fs/promises";
import { writeFile } from "node:fs";
import { exportParquet } from "./parquet";

export async function exportCSV(inPath="artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson", outPath="artifacts/experience_buffer.csv"){
  const txt = await readFile(inPath, "utf8").catch(()=> "");
  const lines = txt.split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean).map(x=>JSON.parse(x));
  const header = ["i","planned_action","room","staff","divergence_type","violations","pre_state_hash","post_state_hash"];
  const rows = [header.join(",")];
  let i=0;
  for (const e of lines){
    const row = [
      String(++i),
      JSON.stringify(e?.planned?.action||""),
      JSON.stringify(e?.planned?.params?.room||""),
      JSON.stringify(e?.planned?.params?.staff||""),
      JSON.stringify((e?.divergence?.type)||"none"),
      String(Array.isArray(e?.divergence?.fields)?e.divergence.fields.length:0),
      JSON.stringify(e?.pre_state_hash||""),
      JSON.stringify(e?.post_state_hash||"")
    ].join(",");
    rows.push(row);
  }
  await new Promise<void>((res,rej)=> writeFile(outPath, rows.join("\\n"), (err)=> err?rej(err):res()));
  return { rows: i, out: outPath };
}

export async function exportPolicyViolations(inPath="artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson", outPath="artifacts/policy_violations.csv"){
  const txt = await readFile(inPath, "utf8").catch(()=> "");
  const lines = txt.split(/\\n+/).filter(Boolean).map(x=>JSON.parse(x));
  const header = ["i","policy_id","room","action"];
  const rows = [header.join(",")];
  let i=0, count=0;
  for (const e of lines){
    i++;
    const f = (e?.divergence?.fields)||[];
    for (const pid of f){
      rows.push([String(i), JSON.stringify(pid), JSON.stringify(e?.planned?.params?.room||""), JSON.stringify(e?.planned?.action||"")].join(","));
      count++;
    }
  }
  await new Promise<void>((res,rej)=> writeFile(outPath, rows.join("\\n"), (err)=> err?rej(err):res()));
  return { rows: count, out: outPath };
}

if (import.meta.main) {
  const args = new Map(process.argv.slice(2).map(s=>s.split("=").map(x=>x.trim())).map(([k,v])=>[k.replace(/^--/,""), v??"true"]));
  const inPath = args.get("in") || "artifacts/experience_buffer.ndjson";
  const res1 = await exportParquet(inPath, args.get("parquet") || "artifacts/experience_buffer.parquet");
  const res2 = await exportCSV(inPath, args.get("csv") || "artifacts/experience_buffer.csv");
  const res3 = await exportPolicyViolations(inPath, args.get("viol") || "artifacts/policy_violations.csv");
  console.log(JSON.stringify({ parquet: res1, csv: res2, violations: res3 }, null, 2));
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

# 5) Looker starter (LookML skeleton) -----------------------------------------
(droot/"model.lkml").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
connection: "spllm_artifacts"

include: "*.view"

explore: experience_buffer {
  label: "Experience Buffer"
  description: "SpLLM planned vs executed, divergences"
  joins: [policy_violations]
}

explore: policy_violations {
  label: "Policy Violations"
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(droot/"experience_buffer.view.lkml").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
view: experience_buffer {
  sql_table_name: experience_buffer ;;

  dimension: i { type: number; primary_key: yes; sql: ${TABLE}.i ;; }
  dimension: planned_action { type: string; }
  dimension: planned_room { type: string; }
  dimension: planned_staff { type: string; }
  dimension: divergence_type { type: string; }

  measure: count { type: count; }

  measure: divergence_ratio {
    type: number
    sql: SUM(CASE WHEN ${divergence_type} != 'none' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) ;;
    value_format_name: percent_2
  }
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")

(droot/"policy_violations.view.lkml").write_text(textwrap.dedent("""\
view: policy_violations {
  sql_table_name: policy_violations ;;

  dimension: i { type: number; primary_key: yes; }
  dimension: policy_id { type: string; }
  dimension: room { type: string; }
  dimension: action { type: string; }

  measure: violations { type: count; }
}
"""), encoding="utf-8")
````
