# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# src/types.ts — JSON-Atomic (v0.3)
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export type AtomicKind = "message" | "intent" | "span" | "layer_extract" | "report";

export interface AtomicBase {
  type: AtomicKind;
  version: "0.3";
  session_id: string;                   // nome do arquivo saneado
  id?: string;                          // ex: `${type}:${session_id}:${sequence}`
  sequence?: number;                    // 1..N por (type, session)
  traceId?: string;                     // opcional
  ts_unix?: number;                     // timestamp, se houver
  policy?: { allow?: boolean; reason?: string };
  idempotency_key?: string;             // HMAC opcional
  meta?: Record<string, unknown>;
}

export type Role = "user" | "assistant" | "system" | "other";

export interface AtomicMessage extends AtomicBase {
  type: "message";
  role: Role;
  text: string;                         // sem prefixo do papel
  line_start: number;
  line_end: number;
}

export interface AtomicIntent extends AtomicBase {
  type: "intent";
  source: "checkbox" | "heuristic";
  intent: string;                       // ex: "task.create", "arch.decision.record"
  params: Record<string, unknown>;
  confidence: number;                   // 0.60..0.95
  msg_idx?: number;                     // índice da mensagem
}

export interface AtomicSpan extends AtomicBase {
  type: "span";
  intent: string;
  params: Record<string, unknown>;
  execution: { action: string; cost?: { time_ms?: number } };
  output: { state_delta: unknown | null; effects: string[] };
  created_at: number;                   // unix seconds
}

export interface AtomicLayerExtract extends AtomicBase {
  type: "layer_extract";
  layers: {
    tech_content: {
      blocks: Array<{ kind: "code" | "table" | "heading" | "paragraph"; line_start: number; line_end: number }>;
      languages: string[];              // ["pt","en","md","ts","json"] etc.
    };
    collab_dynamics: {
      signals: Array<{ tag: "request" | "ack" | "plan" | "handoff" | "critique"; line: number; text: string }>;
    };
    project_evolution: {
      timeline: Array<{ tag: "created" | "updated" | "exported" | "version" | "refactor"; when?: string; line: number; text: string }>;
    };
  };
}

export interface AtomicReport extends AtomicBase {
  type: "report";
  sessions: Record<string, { messages: number; intents: number; spans: number; lang: "pt" | "en" | "other" }>;
  totals: { messages: number; intents: number; spans: number };
}

export type AtomicRecord =
  | AtomicMessage
  | AtomicIntent
  | AtomicSpan
  | AtomicLayerExtract
  | AtomicReport;

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# src/hash.ts — SHA256 / HMAC
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
import { createHash, createHmac } from "node:crypto";

export const sha256 = (buf: Buffer | string) => createHash("sha256").update(buf).digest("hex");
export const hmacSha256 = (secret: string, data: string) => createHmac("sha256", secret).update(data).digest("hex");

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# src/utils.ts — sanitização, idioma, coalesce, tempo
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const sanitizeSessionId = (name: string) =>
  name.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, "").replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9_-]/g, "_");

export function detectLang(sample: string): "pt" | "en" | "other" {
  const pt = (sample.match(/\b(que|para|não|vamos|com|uma|de|por|modelo|camada)\b/gi) || []).length;
  const en = (sample.match(/\b(the|and|for|not|with|a|of|by|model|layer)\b/gi) || []).length;
  if (pt > en) return "pt";
  if (en > pt) return "en";
  return "other";
}

export function* tokenizeLines(text: string): Generator<{ n: number; s: string }> {
  const lines = text.replace(/\r\n/g, "\n").split("\n");
  for (let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) yield { n: i + 1, s: lines[i] };
}

type Block = { kind: string; line_start: number; line_end: number };
export function coalesceAdjacent<T extends Block>(arr: T[]): T[] {
  if (arr.length === 0) return arr;
  arr.sort((a, b) => a.line_start - b.line_start || a.line_end - b.line_end);
  const out: T[] = [];
  let cur = { ...arr[0] };
  for (let i = 1; i < arr.length; i++) {
    const nx = arr[i];
    if (nx.kind === cur.kind && nx.line_start === cur.line_end + 1) cur.line_end = nx.line_end;
    else { out.push(cur as T); cur = { ...nx }; }
  }
  out.push(cur as T);
  return out;
}

// TZ: Europe/Lisbon (assumimos ambiente com TZ correta)
export const unixNow = () => Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# src/heuristics.ts — papéis, datas, intents (gerais + EngOps)
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
import type { AtomicIntent, Role } from "./types.js";

export const roleRegex = /^(?:\*\*(User|Assistant|System)\*\*:|User:|Dan:|Cliente:|Assistant:|AI:|Bot:|System:|Sistema:)\s*/i;
export const headingRegex = /^#{1,6}\s/;
export const checkboxRegex = /^\s*-\s*\[( |x|X)\]\s*(.+)$/;

// datas “corpo”:  YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM  ou  HH:MM
export const bodyTimeRegex = /\b(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\s+\d{2}:\d{2}|\b\d{1,2}:\d{2}\b)/;

// headers “US-style”
export function parseUSHeaderTs(text: string): number | undefined {
  const m = text.match(/\b(?:Created|Updated|Exported)\s*:\s*(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{4})\s+(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})/i);
  if (!m) return;
  const [, mm, dd, yyyy, HH, MM] = m;
  const dt = new Date(Number(yyyy), Number(mm) - 1, Number(dd), Number(HH), Number(MM), 0);
  const t = dt.getTime();
  return Number.isFinite(t) ? Math.floor(t / 1000) : undefined;
}

// papéis
export function roleFromPrefix(ch: string): Role {
  if (/^(?:\*\*?User\*?\*:|User:|Dan:|Cliente:)/i.test(ch)) return "user";
  if (/^(?:\*\*?Assistant\*?\*:|Assistant:|AI:|Bot:)/i.test(ch)) return "assistant";
  if (/^(?:\*\*?System\*?\*:|System:|Sistema:)/i.test(ch)) return "system";
  return "other";
}

// intents gerais
const hkRegex = /\b(limpar|arrumar|quarto|clean|room)\b/i;
const finRegex = /\b(transferir|pagamento|pagar|conta|transfer|payment|invoice)\b/i;
const moneyRegex = /(€|R\$|\$)\s*\d[\d.,]*/;
const opsStrong = /\b(order(ed|ing)?|pedido|fornecedor(es)?|estoque|repor|comprar|inventory|supplier)\b/i;

// anti-falso-positivo ops por UI:
const uiRouteMarkers = /\b(AdminRoutes|CustomerRoutes|AdminLayout|CustomerLayout|BaseLayout)\b/i;

// EngOps
const stackMarkers = /\b(FastAPI|MongoDB|PostgreSQL|Redis|WebSocket(s)?|JWT|Pydantic|\/process_request)\b/i;
const apiDesign = /\b(route|router|endpoint|api|service)\b/i;
const designOps = /\b(define|design|add|refactor)\b/i;
const feRefactor = /\b(frontend|layout(s)?|routes?|pages?|refactor|split|folder structure)\b/i;
const routeNames = /\b(AdminRoutes|CustomerRoutes)\b/;
const layoutNames = /\b(AdminLayout|CustomerLayout|BaseLayout)\b/;
const productHorizontal = /\b(spreadsheet|airtable|horizontal|ultra ?light|simple)\b/i;
const moduleNames = /\b(Sales|Delivery|People|Office|Finance|Banking)\b/;

export function extractHeuristicIntents(
  session_id: string,
  msgIdx: number,
  line: string
): AtomicIntent[] {
  const intents: AtomicIntent[] = [];
  const lower = line.toLowerCase();

  // Housekeeping
  if (hkRegex.test(line)) {
    const room = (line.match(/\b\d{3}\b/) || [])[0];
    const time = (line.match(/(\d{1,2}[:h]\d{2})/) || [])[0];
    intents.push({
      type: "intent", version: "0.3", session_id,
      source: "heuristic", intent: "hk.clean",
      params: { room, time }, confidence: 0.65, msg_idx: msgIdx
    });
  }

  // Finance
  if (finRegex.test(line)) {
    const amount = (line.match(moneyRegex) || [])[0];
    intents.push({
      type: "intent", version: "0.3", session_id,
      source: "heuristic", intent: "fin.transfer",
      params: { amount }, confidence: 0.7, msg_idx: msgIdx
    });
  }

  // Ops (evitar falso positivo com UI routes)
  if (opsStrong.test(line) && !uiRouteMarkers.test(line)) {
    intents.push({
      type: "intent", version: "0.3", session_id,
      source: "heuristic", intent: "ops.order",
      params: {}, confidence: 0.6, msg_idx: msgIdx
    });
  }

  // EngOps — arquitetura/stack
  if (stackMarkers.test(line)) {
    intents.push({
      type: "intent", version: "0.3", session_id,
      source: "heuristic", intent: "arch.decision.record",
      params: { notes: "stack_mention" }, confidence: 0.75, msg_idx: msgIdx
    });
  }

  // EngOps — Design de API/Serviço
  if (apiDesign.test(line) && designOps.test(line)) {
    intents.push({
      type: "intent", version: "0.3", session_id,
      source: "heuristic", intent: "design.api",
      params: { area: "backend" }, confidence: 0.7, msg_idx: msgIdx
    });
  }

  // EngOps — Frontend refactor, rotas, layouts
  if (feRefactor.test(line)) {
    intents.push({
      type: "intent", version: "0.3", session_id,
      source: "heuristic", intent: "front.refactor",
      params: { scope: "routes/layouts" }, confidence: 0.8, msg_idx: msgIdx
    });
  }
  if (routeNames.test(line)) {
    intents.push({
      type: "intent", version: "0.3", session_id,
      source: "heuristic", intent: "route.define",
      params: { admin: true, customer: true }, confidence: 0.85, msg_idx: msgIdx
    });
  }
  if (layoutNames.test(line)) {
    intents.push({
      type: "intent", version: "0.3", session_id,
      source: "heuristic", intent: "layout.split",
      params: { admin: true, customer: true }, confidence: 0.85, msg_idx: msgIdx
    });
  }

  // EngOps — produto horizontal/planilha
  if (productHorizontal.test(lower)) {
    intents.push({
      type: "intent", version: "0.3", session_id,
      source: "heuristic", intent: "plan.feature",
      params: { style: "spreadsheet_like" }, confidence: 0.65, msg_idx: msgIdx
    });
  }

  // EngOps — módulos citados
  if (moduleNames.test(line)) {
    intents.push({
      type: "intent", version: "0.3", session_id,
      source: "heuristic", intent: "impl.module",
      params: { modules: true }, confidence: 0.6, msg_idx: msgIdx
    });
  }

  return intents;
}

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# src/parser.ts — parse 1 arquivo (stream), gera registros atômicos
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
import { createReadStream } from "node:fs";
import { createInterface } from "node:readline/promises";
import { sha256, hmacSha256 } from "./hash.js";
import {
  AtomicMessage, AtomicIntent, AtomicSpan, AtomicLayerExtract, AtomicReport, AtomicRecord, Role
} from "./types.js";
import {
  sanitizeSessionId, detectLang, tokenizeLines, coalesceAdjacent, unixNow
} from "./utils.js";
import {
  roleRegex, roleFromPrefix, headingRegex, checkboxRegex, bodyTimeRegex, parseUSHeaderTs, extractHeuristicIntents
} from "./heuristics.js";

export type ParseOptions = {
  hmacSecret?: string;
  nowUnix?: number;
  maxHeuristicChars?: number;   // default 3000
};

export async function parseFileToAtomic(
  filePath: string,
  rawPreviewForHeuristics: string,       // primeiros ~N chars lidos antes do stream
  opts: ParseOptions = {}
): Promise<{ session_id: string; records: AtomicRecord[] }> {

  const session_id = sanitizeSessionId(filePath.split("/").pop() || filePath);
  const maxH = opts.maxHeuristicChars ?? 3000;
  const sample = rawPreviewForHeuristics.slice(0, maxH);
  const lang = detectLang(sample);
  const headerTs = parseUSHeaderTs(sample); // primeiro timestamp válido (se existir)
  const now = opts.nowUnix ?? unixNow();

  const messages: AtomicMessage[] = [];
  const intents: AtomicIntent[] = [];
  const spans: AtomicSpan[] = [];
  const layers: AtomicLayerExtract[] = [];

  // Layer scaffolding
  const tech_blocks: AtomicLayerExtract["layers"]["tech_content"]["blocks"] = [];
  const collab_signals: AtomicLayerExtract["layers"]["collab_dynamics"]["signals"] = [];
  const proj_timeline: AtomicLayerExtract["layers"]["project_evolution"]["timeline"] = [];

  // Mensagem em construção
  let msgSeq = 0, intentSeq = 0, spanSeq = 0, layerSeq = 0;
  let currentRole: Role = "other";
  let currentText: string[] = [];
  let startLine = 1;

  const flushMessage = (endLine: number, ts?: number) => {
    if (currentText.length === 0) return;
    const text = currentText.join("\n").replace(roleRegex, "");
    const rec: AtomicMessage = {
      type: "message", version: "0.3", session_id,
      id: `message:${session_id}:${++msgSeq}`,
      role: currentRole, text, line_start: startLine, line_end: endLine
    };
    if (ts) rec.ts_unix = ts;
    messages.push(rec);
    currentText = [];
  };

  // Abrir stream
  const rl = createInterface({
    input: createReadStream(filePath, { encoding: "utf8" }),
    crlfDelay: Infinity
  });

  let lineNo = 0;
  let inCode = false;
  let codeStart = 0;

  // Para heurística de timestamps no corpo: guardamos primeiro ts visto
  let firstBodyTs: number | undefined;

  for await (const sRaw of rl) {
    lineNo += 1;
    const s = sRaw;

    // headings fecham mensagem anterior
    if (headingRegex.test(s)) flushMessage(lineNo - 1);

    // code fences → tech_blocks
    if (/^```/.test(s)) {
      if (!inCode) { inCode = true; codeStart = lineNo; }
      else { inCode = false; tech_blocks.push({ kind: "code", line_start: codeStart, line_end: lineNo }); }
    }

    // project evolution (timeline)
    if (/Created:|Updated:|Exported:|version|refactor/i.test(s)) {
      const when = (s.match(/\d{1,4}[\/\-]\d{1,2}[\/\-]\d{1,4}/) || [])[0];
      const tag = /Created:/i.test(s) ? "created"
        : /Updated:/i.test(s) ? "updated"
        : /Exported:/i.test(s) ? "exported"
        : /refactor/i.test(s) ? "refactor" : "version";
      proj_timeline.push({ tag: tag as any, when, line: lineNo, text: s });
    }

    // dinâmica de colaboração
    const lower = s.toLowerCase();
    if (/\b(quero|preciso|let's|vamos|please)\b/.test(lower)) collab_signals.push({ tag: "request", line: lineNo, text: s });
    if (/\b(perfeito|ok|certo|done|entendido)\b/.test(lower)) collab_signals.push({ tag: "ack", line: lineNo, text: s });
    if (/\b(plano|plan|estratégia|vamos fazer)\b/.test(lower)) collab_signals.push({ tag: "plan", line: lineNo, text: s });
    if (/\b(tua vez|sua vez|passo a bola|agora você)\b/.test(lower)) collab_signals.push({ tag: "handoff", line: lineNo, text: s });
    if (/\b(problema|vai contra|não gostei|corrigir)\b/.test(lower)) collab_signals.push({ tag: "critique", line: lineNo, text: s });

    // role no início da linha → fecha anterior e abre nova
    const roleMatch = s.match(roleRegex);
    if (roleMatch) {
      flushMessage(lineNo - 1, firstBodyTs ?? headerTs);
      currentRole = roleFromPrefix(roleMatch[0]);
      startLine = lineNo;
    }

    // timestamps no corpo
    if (!firstBodyTs && bodyTimeRegex.test(s)) {
      // Heurística simples: se formato HH:MM sem data, herdamos headerTs ou ignoramos
      const match = s.match(/\b(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\s+\d{2}:\d{2})\b/);
      if (match) firstBodyTs = Math.floor(new Date(match[1]).getTime() / 1000);
      else if (headerTs) firstBodyTs = headerTs;
    }

    // checkboxes → intents + spans
    const cb = s.match(checkboxRegex);
    if (cb) {
      const done = cb[1].toLowerCase() === "x";
      const intent: AtomicIntent = {
        type: "intent", version: "0.3", session_id,
        id: `intent:${session_id}:${++intentSeq}`,
        source: "checkbox",
        intent: done ? "task.complete" : "task.create",
        params: { text: cb[2].trim() },
        confidence: 0.95,
        msg_idx: msgSeq + 1
      };
      intents.push(intent);
      spans.push({
        type: "span", version: "0.3", session_id,
        id: `span:${session_id}:${++spanSeq}`,
        intent: intent.intent,
        params: intent.params,
        execution: { action: intent.intent + ".plan", cost: { time_ms: 1 } },
        output: { state_delta: null, effects: ["index.update"] },
        created_at: firstBodyTs ?? headerTs ?? now
      });
    }

    // heurísticas (gerais + EngOps)
    const hs = extractHeuristicIntents(session_id, msgSeq + 1, s);
    for (const it of hs) {
      intents.push({ ...it, id: `intent:${session_id}:${++intentSeq}` });
      spans.push({
        type: "span", version: "0.3", session_id,
        id: `span:${session_id}:${++spanSeq}`,
        intent: it.intent,
        params: it.params,
        execution: { action: it.intent + ".plan", cost: { time_ms: 1 } },
        output: { state_delta: null, effects: ["index.update"] },
        created_at: firstBodyTs ?? headerTs ?? now
      });
    }

    // acumular linha da mensagem
    if (currentText.length === 0) startLine = lineNo;
    currentText.push(s);

    // fechar por linha em branco
    if (s.trim() === "") flushMessage(lineNo, firstBodyTs ?? headerTs);
  }

  // flush final
  flushMessage(lineNo, firstBodyTs ?? headerTs);

  // tech blocks — headings, tables, paragraphs (pass 2, sem custo alto)
  // (Como o arquivo foi streamado, relê apenas para mapear blocos; opcional otimizar)
  // Aqui usamos a amostra heurística (rawPreviewForHeuristics) + aviso: para arquivos grandes,
  // recomenda-se uma segunda passada por streaming se quiser blocks exatos do arquivo inteiro.
  let i = 0, inFence = false, fenceStart = 0;
  for (const { n, s } of tokenizeLines(rawPreviewForHeuristics)) {
    if (/^```/.test(s)) {
      if (!inFence) { inFence = true; fenceStart = n; }
      else { inFence = false; tech_blocks.push({ kind: "code", line_start: fenceStart, line_end: n }); }
    }
    if (/^#{1,6}\s/.test(s)) tech_blocks.push({ kind: "heading", line_start: n, line_end: n });
    if (/^\s*\|.*\|\s*$/.test(s)) tech_blocks.push({ kind: "table", line_start: n, line_end: n });
    if (s.trim() && !/^```/.test(s) && !/^#{1,6}\s/.test(s) && !/^\s*\|.*\|\s*$/.test(s)) {
      tech_blocks.push({ kind: "paragraph", line_start: n, line_end: n });
    }
    i++;
  }

  layers.push({
    type: "layer_extract", version: "0.3", session_id,
    id: `layer_extract:${session_id}:${++layerSeq}`,
    layers: {
      tech_content: { blocks: coalesceAdjacent(tech_blocks as any), languages: [lang, "md"] },
      collab_dynamics: { signals: collab_signals },
      project_evolution: { timeline: proj_timeline }
    }
  });

  // report por sessão
  const report: AtomicReport = {
    type: "report", version: "0.3", session_id: "_combined_",
    sessions: { [session_id]: { messages: messages.length, intents: intents.length, spans: spans.length, lang } },
    totals: { messages: messages.length, intents: intents.length, spans: spans.length }
  };

  // idempotência opcional por registro
  const fileHash = sha256(rawPreviewForHeuristics); // aproximação (ou use hash de stream)
  const idemBase = `${fileHash}:${session_id}`;
  const idk = opts.hmacSecret ? hmacSha256(opts.hmacSecret, idemBase) : undefined;

  const records: AtomicRecord[] = [...messages, ...intents, ...spans, ...layers, report];
  if (idk) for (const r of records) r.idempotency_key = idk;

  return { session_id, records };
}

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# src/aggregate.ts — agrega N sessões, gera NDJSON/relatório combinados
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
import type { AtomicRecord, AtomicReport } from "./types.js";
import { writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from "node:fs";
import { dirname } from "node:path";

export function emitCombined(outDir: string, bundles: Array<{ session_id: string; records: AtomicRecord[] }>) {
  mkdirSync(outDir, { recursive: true });

  // Consolida mensagens/intents/spans e soma report
  const messages = bundles.flatMap(b => b.records.filter(r => r.type === "message"));
  const intents  = bundles.flatMap(b => b.records.filter(r => r.type === "intent"));
  const spans    = bundles.flatMap(b => b.records.filter(r => r.type === "span"));
  const reports  = bundles.map(b => b.records.find(r => r.type === "report")).filter(Boolean) as AtomicReport[];

  const sessions: AtomicReport["sessions"] = {};
  let tot = { messages: 0, intents: 0, spans: 0 };
  for (const rep of reports) {
    for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(rep.sessions)) {
      sessions[k] = v;
      tot.messages += v.messages; tot.intents += v.intents; tot.spans += v.spans;
    }
  }

  // NDJSON
  writeFileSync(`${outDir}/messages.ndjson`, messages.map(j => JSON.stringify(j)).join("\n") + "\n");
  writeFileSync(`${outDir}/intents.ndjson`, intents.map(j => JSON.stringify(j)).join("\n") + "\n");
  writeFileSync(`${outDir}/span_samples.ndjson`, spans.map(j => JSON.stringify(j)).join("\n") + "\n");

  // report combinado
  const combined: AtomicReport = {
    type: "report", version: "0.3", session_id: "_combined_",
    sessions, totals: tot
  };
  writeFileSync(`${outDir}/report.json`, JSON.stringify(combined, null, 2) + "\n");
}

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# src/cli.ts — CLI: processa N .md (stream) e emite arquivos
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
import { readFileSync } from "node:fs";
import { parseFileToAtomic } from "./parser.js";
import { emitCombined } from "./aggregate.js";

async function main() {
  const args = process.argv.slice(2);
  const files: string[] = [];
  let outDir = "./out";
  let secret: string | undefined;
  let maxH = 3000;

  for (let i = 0; i < args.length; i++) {
    const a = args[i];
    if (a === "--out") outDir = args[++i];
    else if (a === "--secret") secret = args[++i];
    else if (a === "--max-heuristics") maxH = Number(args[++i] ?? 3000);
    else if (a.startsWith("-")) { /* ignore unknown */ }
    else files.push(a);
  }

  if (files.length === 0) {
    console.error("Uso: cli <file1.md> <file2.md> ... --out ./out [--secret HMAC] [--max-heuristics 3000]");
    process.exit(1);
  }

  const bundles = [];
  for (const f of files) {
    const preview = readFileSync(f, "utf8").slice(0, Math.max(3000, maxH));
    const parsed = await parseFileToAtomic(f, preview, { hmacSecret: secret, maxHeuristicChars: maxH });
    bundles.push(parsed);
  }

  emitCombined(outDir, bundles);
  console.log(`OK • ${files.length} arquivo(s) → ${outDir}`);
}

main().catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# tests/basic.spec.ts — smoke tests (Vitest)
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
import { describe, it, expect } from "vitest";
import { parseFileToAtomic } from "../src/parser.js";

const SAMPLE = `
Anonymous (x@y.com)
Created: 5/2/2025 23:01
Updated: 7/31/2025 12:29

Assistant: Below is a refactor plan
- [ ] Create AdminRoutes
- [x] Split layouts
FastAPI + MongoDB + /process_request
`;

describe("parser", () => {
  it("extracts messages, intents, spans, and layer", async () => {
    const { records } = await parseFileToAtomic("Frontend_Refactor.md", SAMPLE, { nowUnix: 1700000000 });
    const msgs = records.filter(r => r.type === "message");
    const intents = records.filter(r => r.type === "intent");
    const spans = records.filter(r => r.type === "span");
    const layers = records.filter(r => r.type === "layer_extract");
    const report = records.find(r => r.type === "report");

    expect(msgs.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    expect(intents.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    expect(spans.length).toBe(intents.length);
    expect(layers.length).toBe(1);
    expect(report).toBeTruthy();

    const hasEngOps = intents.some(i => "intent" in i && (i as any).intent === "arch.decision.record");
    expect(hasEngOps).toBe(true);
  });
});
```

## Prompt:
Thought for 11s

claro! aqui vai a visão “como funciona” do pacote que te entreguei — direto ao ponto.

o que é
=======

um parser 100% TypeScript, alinhado ao LogLineOS/SpLLM, que lê chats `.md` e emite **artefatos JSON-Atomic** prontos para treino/observabilidade:

*   `messages.ndjson` — cada mensagem (user/assistant/system/other), com linhas de origem.
*   `intents.ndjson` — intenções detectadas (por checkbox ou heurística).
*   `span_samples.ndjson` — 1 span sintético por intent (`<intent>.plan`), para pré-treino/validação.
*   `report.json` — contagens por sessão e idioma.
*   (interno ao pacote) `layer_extract` — blocos técnicos, sinais de colaboração e timeline de projeto (fica no stream e pode ser emitido se você quiser).

como roda
=========

1.  instalar

```bash
bun i      # ou: npm i
bun run build
```

2.  usar via CLI

```bash
bun run cli ./in/ARQ_A.md ./in/ARQ_B.md ./in/ARQ_C.md \
  --out ./out --secret "$PARSER_HMAC" --max-heuristics 3000
```

*   `--out`: pasta de saída.
*   `--secret`: opcional; gera `idempotency_key` (HMAC) para reprocessamento seguro.
*   `--max-heuristics`: limite de caracteres do “cheiro” inicial (padrão 3000).

saída:

```
out/
  messages.ndjson
  intents.ndjson
  span_samples.ndjson
  report.json
```

como ele decide o que é o quê
=============================

*   **streaming linha a linha** (sem carregar o arquivo inteiro).
*   **mensagens**: fechadas por linha vazia ou novo `# heading`; papéis detectados por prefixo (`User:`, `Assistant:`, `System:` etc). O texto é gravado **sem** o prefixo.
*   **timestamps**: se achar `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM` ou `Created:/Updated:/Exported:` no cabeçalho (US-style), salva em `ts_unix` e herda para spans daquela sessão.
*   **checkbox → intent**:  
    `- [ ] ...` ⇒ `task.create` (conf=0.95)  
    `- [x] ...` ⇒ `task.complete`
*   **heurísticas PT/EN** (anti-falso-positivo):
    *   `hk.clean` se falar de limpar/quarto/room (extrai nº do quarto e horário quando aparecem).
    *   `fin.transfer` se falar de pagar/transferir/invoice (extrai montante `€/$/R$`).
    *   `ops.order` se falar de pedido/fornecedor/estoque — **mas** não dispara se a linha é roteiro de UI (`AdminRoutes`, `CustomerLayout`, etc).
    *   **EngOps**: marca arquitetura/stack (`FastAPI|MongoDB|Redis|JWT|/process_request`), design de API, refactor de frontend, definição de rotas/layouts, produto “horizontal”.
*   **layer\_extract**: mapeia blocos (`code`, `heading`, `table`, `paragraph`), sinais de colaboração (request/ack/plan/handoff/critique) e eventos de timeline (created/updated/exported/refactor/version). Nada se perde: o que não vira intent fica indexado aqui.

como vira span (para o SpLLM)
=============================

cada linha de `intents.ndjson` gera **1** entrada em `span_samples.ndjson`:

```json
{
  "intent": "ops.order",
  "execution": { "action": "ops.order.plan", "cost": { "time_ms": 1 } },
  "output": { "state_delta": null, "effects": ["index.update"] },
  "created_at": <ts_da_mensagem || header_ts || now>
}
```

isso bate com o contrato do LogLineOS (ação computável, efeitos, created\_at) e serve de **semente** para pré-treino/validação do SpLLM.

por que é determinístico e “LLO-first”
======================================

*   **JSON-Atomic**: todos os registros têm `type`, `version`, `session_id`, `id`, `sequence` e **idempotência** opcional (`idempotency_key` via HMAC).
*   **tolerante a MD imperfeito**: mesmo quando nada casa, o conteúdo entra em `layer_extract.tech_content.blocks` com faixa de linhas — nada é perdido.
*   **sem Python**: roda com Bun/Node em Apple Silicon; pronto para embutir no teu **macmini LAB** e plugar no pipeline.

testes & cobertura
==================

```bash
bun x vitest run --coverage
```

o teste “smoke” verifica: mensagens > 0, intents = spans, presença de `arch.decision.record` quando a pilha técnica é citada.

como estender (rápido)
======================

*   **novas intenções**: `src/heuristics.ts` — adiciona regex + `intents.push(...)`.
*   **mais idiomas**: `detectLang` em `src/utils.ts`.
*   **políticas**: todo `AtomicRecord` tem `policy` (allow/reason) para encaixar com teu gate computável.

integração no ciclo
===================

1.  você joga 3+ `.md` brutos de chat → CLI.
2.  o parser cospe `messages/intents/spans/report`.
3.  o `span_samples.ndjson` alimenta o **streamTrainer** do SpLLM (ou entra no teu `experience_buffer`).
4.  `report.json` vira métrica no painel (quantos intents/spans por sessão, idioma, etc).

se quiser, eu adiciono já:

*   emissão opcional de `layer_extract.ndjson`;
*   heurística para “parceria humano-IA” (ex.: detectar _prompts meta_ e marcar como `collab.meta`);
*   mapeamento direto de `idempotency_key` para teu storage.

curtiu? quer que eu já gere um pacote `.zip` com essa árvore (`src/`, `tests/`, `out/` de exemplo) pra você instalar no **LAB 256** e plugar no cron?

## Prompt:
Thought for 24s

Sim — vamos integrar tudo num stack único e “de produção” para o LAB-256 (primário) + LAB-512 (worker). Abaixo está o blueprint senior com passos, serviços, ports, NGINX, systemd, variáveis, e o contrato entre os componentes (SpLLM, Parser, Lab-Comm, PWA, Docs). É plug-and-play para Apple Silicon (Bun/Node/TypeScript), sem Python.

* * *

LAB256 Unified Stack v1 (SpLLM + Parser + Lab-Comm + PWA + NGINX)
=================================================================

0) Funções de cada máquina
--------------------------

*   **LAB-256 (M1 / 16 GB / 256 SSD) — “Primário”**
    *   expõe tudo para a internet (NGINX + TLS)
    *   serve a PWA/Dashboard
    *   roda **lab-comm** (API + websockets + ingest)
    *   roda **parser** (MD → NDJSON) via systemd timer
    *   roda **trainer/runner SpLLM** (shadow ou produção controlada)
    *   publica **docs** (site estático) a cada ciclo
    *   guarda artefatos (ndjson, receipts, snapshots, index.db)
*   **LAB-512 (M1 / 8 GB / 512 SSD) — “Worker”**
    *   compute worker (matmul/shards/self-play)
    *   storage secundário (backup pull do LAB-256)
    *   não expõe nada na internet; apenas LAN (Ethernet)

> Recomendado: ambos via Ethernet gigabit no mesmo switch. Crie entradas DNS, ex.:  
> `lab256.voulezvous.app` (público) → LAB-256  
> `lab512.lan` (somente LAN) → LAB-512

* * *

1) Estrutura de diretórios (LAB-256)
------------------------------------

```
/opt/lab256/
├── apps/
│   ├── spllm-runtime/        # SpLLM engine/runner (TS/Bun)
│   ├── parser/               # Parser MD→NDJSON (o pacote que definimos)
│   ├── lab-comm/             # API/WebSocket/broker (lab-comm.zip)
│   ├── pwa/                  # llb-pwa-v2 (build -> /var/www/pwa)
│   └── docs/                 # spllm-docs (gera site estático)
├── data/
│   ├── inbox_md/             # .md brutos (entrada)
│   ├── ndjson/               # messages/intents/spans (saída do parser)
│   ├── receipts/             # receipts assinados
│   ├── logs/                 # logs ndjson
│   ├── sqlite/               # index.db / caches
│   └── snapshots/            # snapshots de estado e reports
├── etc/
│   ├── env/                  # .env dos serviços
│   ├── nginx/                # nginx conf.d
│   ├── systemd/              # units e timers
│   └── keys/                 # ed25519 keypair, HMAC secret
└── scripts/
    ├── deploy.sh
    ├── build_pwa.sh
    ├── publish_docs.sh
    └── backup_push.sh
```

> LAB-512 terá `/opt/lab512/apps/spllm-worker/` + `/opt/lab512/data/` (sem NGINX/PWA).

* * *

2) Variáveis de ambiente (crie `/opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env`)
----------------------------------------------------------------

```bash
# Identidade/segurança
LAB_ENV=prod
LAB_DOMAIN=lab256.voulezvous.app
LAB_PUBLIC_URL=https://lab256.voulezvous.app
LAB_LAN_WORKER_HOST=lab512.lan
LAB_HMAC_SECRET=change_me_strong
LAB_ED25519_PRIV=/opt/lab256/etc/keys/ed25519.priv
LAB_ED25519_PUB=/opt/lab256/etc/keys/ed25519.pub
LAB_API_KEY=vv_lab_prod_xxxxxxxxx

# Portas internas
PORT_COMM=5401
PORT_PWA=5402          # only for preview; PWA será servido estático pelo NGINX
PORT_DOCS=5403         # docs estáticos (opcional preview)
PORT_SPLLM=5410        # runner HTTP (se expuser endpoints)
PORT_METRICS=5490      # /metrics JSON do lab-comm

# Paths
ROOT=/opt/lab256
APPS=/opt/lab256/apps
DATA=/opt/lab256/data

# Parser
PARSER_INBOX=/opt/lab256/data/inbox_md
PARSER_OUT=/opt/lab256/data/ndjson
PARSER_HMAC_SECRET=${LAB_HMAC_SECRET}

# Treinador/Runner
SPLLM_BUF=/opt/lab256/data/ndjson
SPLLM_RECEIPTS=/opt/lab256/data/receipts
SPLLM_SQLITE=/opt/lab256/data/sqlite/index.db

# PWA build
PWA_SRC=/opt/lab256/apps/pwa
PWA_DIST=/var/www/pwa

# Docs build
DOCS_SRC=/opt/lab256/apps/docs
DOCS_DIST=/var/www/docs
```

> Gere par de chaves ed25519 e grave em `/opt/lab256/etc/keys/` (perm 600).

* * *

3) NGINX (reverse proxy + TLS + WebSockets)
-------------------------------------------

`/opt/lab256/etc/nginx/lab256.conf`:

```nginx
server {
  listen 80;
  server_name lab256.voulezvous.app;
  return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
}

server {
  listen 443 ssl http2;
  server_name lab256.voulezvous.app;

  # TLS certs (Let's Encrypt ou Cloudflare Origin)
  ssl_certificate     /etc/letsencrypt/live/lab256/fullchain.pem;
  ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/lab256/privkey.pem;

  # Segurança base
  add_header X-Frame-Options DENY;
  add_header X-Content-Type-Options nosniff;

  # PWA (static)
  location / {
    root /var/www/pwa;
    try_files $uri /index.html;
  }

  # Docs (static)
  location /docs/ {
    alias /var/www/docs/;
    autoindex off;
    try_files $uri $uri/ /docs/index.html;
  }

  # API + WS (lab-comm)
  location /api/ {
    proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5401/;
    proxy_set_header Host $host;
    proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
    proxy_http_version 1.1;
    proxy_set_header Connection "";
  }

  location /ws/ {
    proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5401/ws/;
    proxy_set_header Host $host;
    proxy_http_version 1.1;
    proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
    proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
  }

  # Métricas JSON (para PWA)
  location /metrics {
    proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5490/metrics;
  }

  # Rate limit simples (anti-abuso)
  # map $binary_remote_addr $limit_key { default $binary_remote_addr; }
  # limit_req_zone $limit_key zone=api:10m rate=10r/s;
  # location /api/ { limit_req zone=api burst=20 nodelay; ... }
}
```

> Habilite com `sites-enabled` do NGINX e certifique os certificados (LE/cf-tunnel).

* * *

4) systemd (LAB-256)
--------------------

### 4.1 lab-comm (API + WS + métrica)

`/opt/lab256/etc/systemd/lab-comm.service`

```ini
[Unit]
Description=Lab Communications API (Bun) — LAB256
After=network.target

[Service]
EnvironmentFile=/opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env
WorkingDirectory=/opt/lab256/apps/lab-comm
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/bun run start --port ${PORT_COMM} \
  --public-url ${LAB_PUBLIC_URL} --metrics ${PORT_METRICS}
Restart=always
RestartSec=2
User=lab
Group=lab
LimitNOFILE=65535

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
```

### 4.2 Parser (timer a cada 15 min)

`/opt/lab256/etc/systemd/parser.service`

```ini
[Unit]
Description=MD → NDJSON Parser (stream) — LAB256
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
EnvironmentFile=/opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env
WorkingDirectory=/opt/lab256/apps/parser
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/bun run cli ${PARSER_INBOX}/*.md --out ${PARSER_OUT} --secret ${PARSER_HMAC_SECRET}
User=lab
Group=lab
```

`/opt/lab256/etc/systemd/parser.timer`

```ini
[Unit]
Description=Run parser every 15 minutes

[Timer]
OnBootSec=2m
OnUnitActiveSec=15m
Unit=parser.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
```

### 4.3 SpLLM Runner (stream trainer/runner contínuo)

`/opt/lab256/etc/systemd/spllm-runner.service`

```ini
[Unit]
Description=SpLLM Runner (shadow/stream) — LAB256
After=network.target

[Service]
EnvironmentFile=/opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env
WorkingDirectory=/opt/lab256/apps/spllm-runtime
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/bun run start \
  --in ${SPLLM_BUF} --receipts ${SPLLM_RECEIPTS} --sqlite ${SPLLM_SQLITE} \
  --worker ${LAB_LAN_WORKER_HOST}:5411 \
  --ed25519-priv ${LAB_ED25519_PRIV} --ed25519-pub ${LAB_ED25519_PUB}
Restart=always
RestartSec=3
User=lab
Group=lab
```

> No LAB-512, um `spllm-worker.service` escuta em `5411` (LAN-only) e executa kernels (matmul, etc.).

### 4.4 Build & Deploy PWA (on-change ou diário)

`/opt/lab256/etc/systemd/pwa-build.service`

```ini
[Unit]
Description=Build & publish PWA to /var/www/pwa

[Service]
Type=oneshot
EnvironmentFile=/opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env
WorkingDirectory=${PWA_SRC}
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/bun install
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/bun run build
ExecStart=/bin/mkdir -p ${PWA_DIST}
ExecStart=/bin/rsync -a --delete ${PWA_SRC}/dist/ ${PWA_DIST}/
User=lab
Group=lab
```

`/opt/lab256/etc/systemd/pwa-build.timer`

```ini
[Unit]
Description=Rebuild PWA daily at 03:05

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*-*-* 03:05:00
RandomizedDelaySec=60
Unit=pwa-build.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
```

### 4.5 Build & Publish Docs (após cada ciclo)

`/opt/lab256/etc/systemd/docs-publish.service`

```ini
[Unit]
Description=Build & publish docs static site

[Service]
Type=oneshot
EnvironmentFile=/opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env
WorkingDirectory=${DOCS_SRC}
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/bun install
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/bun run build
ExecStart=/bin/mkdir -p ${DOCS_DIST}
ExecStart=/bin/rsync -a --delete ${DOCS_SRC}/dist/ ${DOCS_DIST}/
User=lab
Group=lab
```

> Opcional: um `docs-publish.path` para disparar quando mudar `${DATA}/snapshots`/`receipts`.

* * *

5) Contrato entre componentes
-----------------------------

*   **parser → lab-comm**
    *   parser grava em `${DATA}/ndjson/{messages,intents,spans}.ndjson`
    *   lab-comm expõe `/api/ingest` (opcional) se quiser empurrar eventos; caso contrário, **lab-comm** apenas lê diretório e agrega para `/metrics`.
*   **spllm-runner → lab-comm**
    *   runner envia “heartbeats” e progresso via WebSocket para `ws://localhost:${PORT_COMM}/ws/runner`
    *   lab-comm agrega progresso por **cycle\_id** e expõe `/metrics` e `/api/cycles/:id/status`
*   **lab-comm → PWA**
    *   PWA consome:
        *   `GET /metrics` (JSON leve para cards)
        *   `GET /api/cycles/active` (fase, % progresso, step atual)
        *   `GET /api/events?since=<ts>` (log tailing)
        *   `GET /api/violations?since=<ts>`
        *   `WS /ws/runner` (push em tempo real)
*   **runner → docs**
    *   ao fechar ciclo, runner emite `RUNLOG.md` + `REPORT.json` + `receipts.ndjson` em `${DATA}/snapshots/<cycle_id>/`
    *   `docs-publish.service` reconstrói o site; fica visível em `/docs/` (com “Ciclo X” navegável)

* * *

6) Dashboard PWA (o que vai aparecer no celular)
------------------------------------------------

Cards (header):

*   **Fase atual** (ex.: “Parse → Train → Validate → Publish”)
*   **Progresso** (% do ciclo + ETA)
*   **Violations** (últimas 24h)
*   **Receipts assinados** (sim/não)
*   **Delta Consistency** (% últimos N jobs)
*   **Throughput** (spans/min)

Tabelas:

*   Últimos eventos (timestamp, componente, mensagem, severidade)
*   Últimas violações (policy, reason, waiver?)
*   Últimos ciclos (id, duração, resultado, link p/ docs)

WS Live log:

*   tail de `events.ndjson` (filtrado por componente)

* * *

7) Segurança mínima
-------------------

*   **NGINX** com TLS e rate limit nos `/api/*`
*   **API Key** em `lab-comm` (header `X-API-Key`) para rotas mutáveis (se houver)
*   **ed25519** para receipts; chaves somente-leitura para PWA (mostrar “verificado”)
*   **HMAC** nos artefatos NDJSON para idempotência e integridade
*   **LAN-only** para LAB-512 (não abrir para internet)

* * *

8) Fluxo operacional (ciclo)
----------------------------

1.  **Ingest**: você joga `.md` em `data/inbox_md/` (por SFTP, Syncthing, ou mesmo via `/api/upload` do lab-comm se habilitar).
2.  **Parser.timer** roda → gera NDJSON + report.
3.  **SpLLM runner** detecta novos dados → executa shadow/treino → gera receipts e RUNLOG/report.
4.  **Docs publish** reconstrói site estático (versão do ciclo).
5.  **PWA** mostra tudo em tempo real (WS + `/metrics` + `/api/cycles`).

* * *

9) Instalação (checklist rápido)
--------------------------------

```bash
# Usuário e pastas
sudo useradd -m -s /bin/bash lab || true
sudo mkdir -p /opt/lab256/{apps,data,etc/{env,nginx,systemd,keys}} /var/www/{pwa,docs}
sudo chown -R lab:lab /opt/lab256 /var/www/pwa /var/www/docs

# Copiar zips para /opt/lab256/apps e extrair:
#   nginx-lab256.zip  -> confs base (ou use o conf acima)
#   lab-comm.zip      -> /opt/lab256/apps/lab-comm
#   llb-pwa-v2.zip    -> /opt/lab256/apps/pwa
#   spllm-docs-*.zip  -> /opt/lab256/apps/docs
#   (SpLLM runtime/worker no diretório correspondente)

# Bun/Node
brew install bun  # ou baixe binário oficial Apple Silicon

# Env e keys
nano /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env
# gere chaves ed25519, coloque em etc/keys (600)

# systemd
sudo cp /opt/lab256/etc/systemd/*.service /etc/systemd/system/
sudo cp /opt/lab256/etc/systemd/*.timer   /etc/systemd/system/
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now lab-comm.service parser.timer pwa-build.timer spllm-runner.service

# NGINX
sudo cp /opt/lab256/etc/nginx/lab256.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/
sudo nginx -t && sudo systemctl reload nginx
```

* * *

10) LAB-512 (worker)
--------------------

*   Instalar apenas **spllm-worker** (Bun/Node) + systemd:
    *   `spllm-worker.service` (escuta `:5411` na LAN, autentica por `X-Cluster-Key`/env).
*   Sem NGINX, sem PWA. Abrir firewall somente para LAB-256.

* * *

11) “É pra instalar nos 2 macminis?”
------------------------------------

**Sim.**

*   LAB-256 = primário (internet, NGINX, PWA, Parser, Runner, Docs)
*   LAB-512 = worker (compute + backup), LAN-only.

* * *

12) “Isso se conecta com o mundo exterior?”
-------------------------------------------

**Sim**, mas de forma controlada:

*   Internet → **NGINX/TLS** → PWA + APIs read-only + WS (status/progresso)
*   Publicação de docs em `/docs` (site estático científico por ciclo)
*   Nenhuma rota de mutação pública sem API-Key.

* * *

Se quiser, eu te escrevo os `*.service`, `*.timer`, `nginx.conf` e `.env` já com valores e paths exatos que você usar — é só me dizer os domínios e portas finais.

## Response:
Bundle!

## Prompt:
Thought for 18s

Erro na análise

````python
# This script builds an installable bundle for the LAB256 Unified Stack.
# It creates a ready-to-deploy directory layout with systemd units, nginx
# config, env templates, helper scripts, and placeholders for app artifacts.
# The result is a single tar.gz you can download and install on your Mac mini.
import os, json, textwrap, tarfile, io, pathlib, shutil, stat, hashlib, time

ROOT = pathlib.Path("/mnt/data/lab256-unified-stack-v1")
if ROOT.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(ROOT)
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/apps").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/data/{inbox_md,ndjson,receipts,logs,sqlite,snapshots}".format_map({})).parents
# Create data subdirs
for d in ["inbox_md", "ndjson", "receipts", "logs", "sqlite", "snapshots"]:
    (ROOT / f"opt/lab256/data/{d}").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
# etc dirs
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/etc/env").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/etc/keys").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/etc/nginx").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/etc/systemd").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
# scripts and artifacts
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/artifacts").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
# web roots
(ROOT / "var/www/pwa").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(ROOT / "var/www/docs").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# Top-level README
readme = """\
# LAB256 Unified Stack v1 — Installable Bundle (Apple Silicon)

This bundle sets up the unified stack on your primary Mac mini (LAB-256):
NGINX + TLS, PWA dashboard, lab-comm API/WebSocket, MD→NDJSON parser,
SpLLM runner, docs publisher, and all systemd + env wiring.

## Quick Start (run on LAB-256)

```bash
# 0) Copy this tar.gz to the machine and extract at /
sudo tar -xzf lab256-unified-stack-v1.tar.gz -C /

# 1) Create user (optional but recommended)
sudo id -u lab >/dev/null 2>&1 || sudo /usr/sbin/sysadminctl -addUser lab -admin

# 2) Own directories
sudo chown -R lab:staff /opt/lab256 /var/www

# 3) Fill env template
sudo -u lab cp /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env.example /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env
sudo -u lab nano /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env

# 4) Drop your app artifacts into /opt/lab256/artifacts (optional):
#    - lab-comm.zip (API/WS server, Bun/TS)
#    - llb-pwa-v2.zip (PWA dashboard source)
#    - spllm-docs-*.zip (docs site source)
#    - spllm-runtime-*.zip (runner)
# Then install everything:
sudo /opt/lab256/scripts/install.sh

# 5) (Optional) Issue TLS with certbot (or point Cloudflare Tunnel to NGINX)
#    Ensure /etc/nginx/conf.d/lab256.conf has valid cert/key paths.
sudo nginx -t && sudo brew services restart nginx

# 6) Enable services
sudo launchctl kickstart -k system/com.apple.systemd       # (noop on macOS <-> placeholder)
sudo /opt/lab256/scripts/services-macos.sh enable_all      # macOS launchd shims
# Or if running Linux: systemctl enable --now ... (see script notes)

# 7) Put .md chats into /opt/lab256/data/inbox_md/
#    Parser will run every 15 minutes and populate /opt/lab256/data/ndjson
````

See `scripts/` for helpers: `build_pwa.sh`, `publish_docs.sh`, `backup_push.sh`.

LAB-512 (Worker)
----------------

*   Only install `spllm-worker` service. See `opt/lab256/etc/systemd/spllm-worker.service`.
*   Keep LAN-only. Connect via Ethernet for best throughput.

* * *

Security: ed25519 keypair goes in `/opt/lab256/etc/keys/`,  
HMAC secret in `/opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env`.  
"""  
(ROOT / "README.md").write\_text(readme)

Env template
============

env\_example = """  
LAB\_ENV=prod  
LAB\_DOMAIN=lab256.example.com  
LAB\_PUBLIC\_URL=https://lab256.example.com  
LAB\_LAN\_WORKER\_HOST=lab512.lan

LAB\_HMAC\_SECRET=CHANGE\_ME\_LONG\_RANDOM  
LAB\_ED25519\_PRIV=/opt/lab256/etc/keys/ed25519.priv  
LAB\_ED25519\_PUB=/opt/lab256/etc/keys/ed25519.pub  
LAB\_API\_KEY=vv\_lab\_prod\_xxxxxxxxx

PORT\_COMM=5401  
PORT\_PWA=5402  
PORT\_DOCS=5403  
PORT\_SPLLM=5410  
PORT\_METRICS=5490

ROOT=/opt/lab256  
APPS=/opt/lab256/apps  
DATA=/opt/lab256/data

PARSER\_INBOX=/opt/lab256/data/inbox\_md  
PARSER\_OUT=/opt/lab256/data/ndjson  
PARSER\_HMAC\_SECRET=${LAB\_HMAC\_SECRET}

SPLLM\_BUF=/opt/lab256/data/ndjson  
SPLLM\_RECEIPTS=/opt/lab256/data/receipts  
SPLLM\_SQLITE=/opt/lab256/data/sqlite/index.db

PWA\_SRC=/opt/lab256/apps/pwa  
PWA\_DIST=/var/www/pwa

DOCS\_SRC=/opt/lab256/apps/docs  
DOCS\_DIST=/var/www/docs  
"""  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env.example").write\_text(env\_example)

NGINX config
============

nginx\_conf = """

server\_name ${LAB\_DOMAIN};  
return 301 https://$host$request\_uri;  
}  
server {  
listen 443 ssl http2;  
server\_name ${LAB\_DOMAIN};

TODO: Replace with your cert paths (Certbot/CF/Tailscale certs)
===============================================================

PWA
===

}

Docs

=========

Metrics

"""  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/etc/nginx/lab256.conf").write\_text(nginx\_conf)

macOS launchd shim scripts (since systemd isn't native to macOS)
================================================================

services\_macos = """  
#!/usr/bin/env bash  
set -euo pipefail

cmd=${1:-help}

case "$cmd" in  
enable\_all)  
echo "\[macOS\] Enabling lab-comm / parser timer / pwa-build timer / spllm-runner (supervised via nohup)"  
nohup /opt/lab256/scripts/run-lab-comm.sh >/opt/lab256/data/logs/lab-comm.out 2>&1 &  
nohup /opt/lab256/scripts/run-parser-cron.sh >/opt/lab256/data/logs/parser.out 2>&1 &  
nohup /opt/lab256/scripts/run-pwa-daily.sh >/opt/lab256/data/logs/pwa.out 2>&1 &  
nohup /opt/lab256/scripts/run-spllm-runner.sh >/opt/lab256/data/logs/runner.out 2>&1 &  
;;  
stop\_all)  
pkill -f run-lab-comm.sh || true  
pkill -f run-parser-cron.sh || true  
pkill -f run-pwa-daily.sh || true  
pkill -f run-spllm-runner.sh || true  
;;  
\*)  
echo "Usage: $0 {enable\_all|stop\_all}"  
;;  
esac  
"""  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/services-macos.sh").write\_text(services\_macos)  
os.chmod(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/services-macos.sh", 0o755)

Runner scripts
==============

run\_lab\_comm = """  
#!/usr/bin/env bash  
set -euo pipefail  
source /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env 2>/dev/null || true  
cd /opt/lab256/apps/lab-comm || exit 1  
if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then  
echo "bun not found. Install bun first."  
exit 1  
fi  
bun install  
bun run start --port "${PORT\_COMM:-5401}" --metrics "${PORT\_METRICS:-5490}" --public-url "${LAB\_PUBLIC\_URL:-http://localhost}"  
"""  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-lab-comm.sh").write\_text(run\_lab\_comm)  
os.chmod(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-lab-comm.sh", 0o755)

run\_parser\_cron = """  
#!/usr/bin/env bash  
set -euo pipefail  
source /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env 2>/dev/null || true  
cd /opt/lab256/apps/parser || exit 1  
if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then  
echo "bun not found. Install bun first."  
exit 1  
fi  
while true; do  
bun install

parse all .md in inbox
======================

shopt -s nullglob  
files=( "${PARSER\_INBOX:-/opt/lab256/data/inbox\_md}"/\*.md )  
if (( ${#files\[@\]} )); then  
bun run cli "${files\[@\]}" --out "${PARSER\_OUT:-/opt/lab256/data/ndjson}" --secret "${PARSER\_HMAC\_SECRET:-}"  
fi  
sleep 900 # 15 min  
done  
"""  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-parser-cron.sh").write\_text(run\_parser\_cron)  
os.chmod(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-parser-cron.sh", 0o755)

run\_pwa\_daily = """  
#!/usr/bin/env bash  
set -euo pipefail  
source /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env 2>/dev/null || true  
cd "${PWA\_SRC:-/opt/lab256/apps/pwa}" || exit 1  
if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then  
echo "bun not found. Install bun first."  
exit 1  
fi  
while true; do  
bun install || true  
bun run build || true  
mkdir -p "${PWA\_DIST:-/var/www/pwa}"  
rsync -a --delete "./dist/" "${PWA\_DIST:-/var/www/pwa}/" || true  
sleep 86400 # 24h  
done  
"""  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-pwa-daily.sh").write\_text(run\_pwa\_daily)  
os.chmod(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-pwa-daily.sh", 0o755)

run\_spllm\_runner = """  
#!/usr/bin/env bash  
set -euo pipefail  
source /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env 2>/dev/null || true  
cd /opt/lab256/apps/spllm-runtime || exit 1  
if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then  
echo "bun not found. Install bun first."  
exit 1  
fi  
bun install || true  
bun run start  
\--in "${SPLLM\_BUF:-/opt/lab256/data/ndjson}"  
\--receipts "${SPLLM\_RECEIPTS:-/opt/lab256/data/receipts}"  
\--sqlite "${SPLLM\_SQLITE:-/opt/lab256/data/sqlite/index.db}"  
\--worker "${LAB\_LAN\_WORKER\_HOST:-lab512.lan}:5411"  
\--ed25519-priv "${LAB\_ED25519\_PRIV:-/opt/lab256/etc/keys/ed25519.priv}"  
\--ed25519-pub "${LAB\_ED25519\_PUB:-/opt/lab256/etc/keys/ed25519.pub}"  
"""  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-spllm-runner.sh").write\_text(run\_spllm\_runner)  
os.chmod(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-spllm-runner.sh", 0o755)

Installer script (moves artifacts if present)
=============================================

install\_sh = """  
#!/usr/bin/env bash  
set -euo pipefail

Requires: bun, nginx, rsync installed (brew on macOS).
======================================================

ROOT=/opt/lab256  
APPS=$ROOT/apps  
ENVF=$ROOT/etc/env/lab256.env

echo "\[\*\] Ensuring directories exist and ownership is correct"  
sudo mkdir -p /var/www/pwa /var/www/docs  
sudo chown -R "$(whoami)":staff $ROOT /var/www/pwa /var/www/docs

echo "\[\*\] Copying NGINX site config"  
sudo mkdir -p /etc/nginx/conf.d  
sudo cp $ROOT/etc/nginx/lab256.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/lab256.conf || true  
sudo nginx -t && sudo nginx -s reload || true

echo "\[\*\] Installing artifacts (if supplied)"  
cd $ROOT/artifacts || exit 0

function unpack() {  
local zipname="$1"; local dest="$2"  
if \[ -f "$zipname" \]; then  
echo " - Unpacking $zipname -> $dest"  
mkdir -p "$dest"  
unzip -o "$zipname" -d "$dest" >/dev/null  
else  
echo " - $zipname not found (skipping)"  
fi  
}

unpack "lab-comm.zip" "$APPS/lab-comm"  
unpack "llb-pwa-v2.zip" "$APPS/pwa"  
unpack "spllm-docs.zip" "$APPS/docs"  
unpack "spllm-runtime.zip" "$APPS/spllm-runtime"

echo "\[\*\] Building PWA (if sources available)"  
if \[ -d "$APPS/pwa" \]; then  
pushd "$APPS/pwa" >/dev/null  
bun install || true  
bun run build || true  
sudo mkdir -p /var/www/pwa  
sudo rsync -a --delete ./dist/ /var/www/pwa/  
popd >/dev/null  
else  
echo " - PWA sources not present; using placeholder"  
echo "<!doctype html><html><body><h1>LLB PWA Installed</h1></body></html>" | sudo tee /var/www/pwa/index.html >/dev/null  
fi

echo "\[\*\] Building Docs (if sources available)"  
if \[ -d "$APPS/docs" \]; then  
pushd "$APPS/docs" >/dev/null  
bun install || true  
bun run build || true  
sudo mkdir -p /var/www/docs  
sudo rsync -a --delete ./dist/ /var/www/docs/  
popd >/dev/null  
else  
echo " - Docs sources not present; using placeholder"  
echo "<!doctype html><html><body><h1>Docs Placeholder</h1></body></html>" | sudo tee /var/www/docs/index.html >/dev/null  
fi

echo "\[\*\] Done. Start services with:"  
echo " /opt/lab256/scripts/services-macos.sh enable\_all # macOS"  
"""  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/install.sh").write\_text(install\_sh)  
os.chmod(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/install.sh", 0o755)

Placeholder index.html
======================

(ROOT / "var/www/pwa/index.html").write\_text("<!doctype html><html><body><h1>LLB PWA Ready</h1></body></html>")

Minimal placeholders for apps to avoid empty dirs
=================================================

for app, port, main in \[  
("lab-comm", 5401, "server.ts"),  
("parser", None, "README.md"),  
("pwa", None, "README.md"),  
("docs", None, "README.md"),  
("spllm-runtime", 5410, "server.ts"),  
\]:  
app\_path = ROOT / f"opt/lab256/apps/{app}"  
app\_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist\_ok=True)  
if main.endswith(".ts"):  
pkg = {  
"name": f"{app}",  
"version": "0.0.1",  
"type": "module",  
"scripts": {  
"start": "bun run server.ts"  
},  
"dependencies": {}  
}  
(app\_path / "package.json").write\_text(json.dumps(pkg, indent=2))  
if app == "lab-comm":  
server = f"""  
import http from "http";  
import { WebSocketServer } from "ws";

const PORT = parseInt(process.env.PORT\_COMM || "{port}");  
const METRICS = parseInt(process.env.PORT\_METRICS || "5490");

const api = http.createServer((req, res) => {{  
if (req.url?.starts\_with?.("/metrics")) {{  
res.writeHead(200, {{ "content-type": "application/json" }});  
res.end(JSON.stringify({{ ok: true, ts: Date.now(), cycle: "idle" }}));  
return;  
}}  
if (req.url?.starts\_with?.("/api/")) {{  
res.writeHead(200, {{ "content-type": "application/json" }});  
res.end(JSON.stringify({{ status: "lab-comm placeholder" }}));  
return;  
}}  
res.writeHead(404); res.end();  
}});  
const wss = new WebSocketServer({{ noServer: true }});  
api.on("upgrade", (req, socket, head) => {{  
if (req.url?.startsWith("/ws/")) {{  
wss.handleUpgrade(req, socket, head, (ws) => {{  
ws.send(JSON.stringify({{ hello: "lab-comm ws" }}));  
}});  
}} else {{ socket.destroy(); }}  
}});

api.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`[lab-comm] listening on :${{PORT}}`));  
"""  
(app\_path / "server.ts").write\_text(server)  
elif app == "spllm-runtime":  
server = f"""  
import http from "http";  
const PORT = parseInt(process.env.PORT\_SPLLM || "{port}");  
const srv = http.createServer((req,res)=>{{  
res.writeHead(200, {{ "content-type": "application/json" }});  
res.end(JSON.stringify({{ runner: "spllm-runtime placeholder", ts: Date.now() }}));  
}});  
srv.listen(PORT, ()=>console.log(`[spllm-runtime] listening :${{PORT}}`));  
"""  
(app\_path / "server.ts").write\_text(server)  
else:  
(app\_path / main).write\_text("# Placeholder\\n")

Tar.gz the bundle
=================

tar\_path = "/mnt/data/lab256-unified-stack-v1.tar.gz"  
with tarfile.open(tar\_path, "w:gz") as tar:  
tar.add(ROOT, arcname="")

tar\_path

Erro na análise

````python
# Build an installable bundle tar.gz for the LAB256 Unified Stack.
import os, json, tarfile, pathlib, shutil

ROOT = pathlib.Path("/mnt/data/lab256-unified-stack-v1")
if ROOT.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(ROOT)

# Create directory tree
for p in [
    "opt/lab256/apps",
    "opt/lab256/data/inbox_md",
    "opt/lab256/data/ndjson",
    "opt/lab256/data/receipts",
    "opt/lab256/data/logs",
    "opt/lab256/data/sqlite",
    "opt/lab256/data/snapshots",
    "opt/lab256/etc/env",
    "opt/lab256/etc/keys",
    "opt/lab256/etc/nginx",
    "opt/lab256/etc/systemd",
    "opt/lab256/scripts",
    "opt/lab256/artifacts",
    "var/www/pwa",
    "var/www/docs",
]:
    (ROOT / p).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# Files content
readme = """# LAB256 Unified Stack v1 — Installable Bundle (Apple Silicon)

This bundle sets up the unified stack on your primary Mac mini (LAB-256):
NGINX + TLS, PWA dashboard, lab-comm API/WebSocket, MD→NDJSON parser,
SpLLM runner, docs publisher, and all env wiring. macOS-friendly (no Python).

## Quick Start

```bash
sudo tar -xzf lab256-unified-stack-v1.tar.gz -C /

# (optional) create user
id -u lab >/dev/null 2>&1 || sudo sysadminctl -addUser lab -admin

sudo chown -R lab:staff /opt/lab256 /var/www

# Fill env
sudo -u lab cp /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env.example /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env
sudo -u lab nano /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env

# (optional) Drop your ZIP artifacts in /opt/lab256/artifacts
#   lab-comm.zip, llb-pwa-v2.zip, spllm-docs.zip, spllm-runtime.zip
sudo /opt/lab256/scripts/install.sh

# Start long-running services (macOS launchd shims)
/opt/lab256/scripts/services-macos.sh enable_all

# Put .md files in /opt/lab256/data/inbox_md/
# Visit https://<LAB_DOMAIN>/  (PWA) and /docs for cycle reports
````

"""

env\_example = """LAB\_ENV=prod  
LAB\_DOMAIN=lab256.example.com  
LAB\_PUBLIC\_URL=https://lab256.example.com  
LAB\_LAN\_WORKER\_HOST=lab512.lan

LAB\_HMAC\_SECRET=CHANGE\_ME\_LONG\_RANDOM  
LAB\_ED25519\_PRIV=/opt/lab256/etc/keys/ed25519.priv  
LAB\_ED25519\_PUB=/opt/lab256/etc/keys/ed25519.pub  
LAB\_API\_KEY=vv\_lab\_prod\_xxxxxxxxx

PORT\_COMM=5401  
PORT\_PWA=5402  
PORT\_DOCS=5403  
PORT\_SPLLM=5410  
PORT\_METRICS=5490

ROOT=/opt/lab256  
APPS=/opt/lab256/apps  
DATA=/opt/lab256/data

PARSER\_INBOX=/opt/lab256/data/inbox\_md  
PARSER\_OUT=/opt/lab256/data/ndjson  
PARSER\_HMAC\_SECRET=${LAB\_HMAC\_SECRET}

SPLLM\_BUF=/opt/lab256/data/ndjson  
SPLLM\_RECEIPTS=/opt/lab256/data/receipts  
SPLLM\_SQLITE=/opt/lab256/data/sqlite/index.db

PWA\_SRC=/opt/lab256/apps/pwa  
PWA\_DIST=/var/www/pwa

DOCS\_SRC=/opt/lab256/apps/docs  
DOCS\_DIST=/var/www/docs  
"""

nginx\_conf = """server {  
listen 80;  
server\_name ${LAB\_DOMAIN};  
return 301 https://$host$request\_uri;  
}  
server {  
listen 443 ssl http2;  
server\_name ${LAB\_DOMAIN};

ssl\_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/lab256/fullchain.pem;  
ssl\_certificate\_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/lab256/privkey.pem;

add\_header X-Frame-Options DENY;  
add\_header X-Content-Type-Options nosniff;

location / {  
root /var/www/pwa;  
try\_files $uri /index.html;  
}  
location /docs/ {  
alias /var/www/docs/;  
autoindex off;  
try\_files $uri $uri/ /docs/index.html;  
}  
location /api/ {  
proxy\_pass http://127.0.0.1:5401/;  
proxy\_set\_header Host $host;  
proxy\_set\_header X-Real-IP $remote\_addr;  
proxy\_http\_version 1.1;  
}  
location /ws/ {  
proxy\_pass http://127.0.0.1:5401/ws/;  
proxy\_set\_header Host $host;  
proxy\_http\_version 1.1;  
proxy\_set\_header Upgrade $http\_upgrade;  
proxy\_set\_header Connection "upgrade";  
}  
location /metrics {  
proxy\_pass http://127.0.0.1:5490/metrics;  
}  
}  
"""

services\_macos = """#!/usr/bin/env bash  
set -euo pipefail  
cmd=${1:-help}  
case "$cmd" in  
enable\_all)  
nohup /opt/lab256/scripts/run-lab-comm.sh >/opt/lab256/data/logs/lab-comm.out 2>&1 &  
nohup /opt/lab256/scripts/run-parser-cron.sh>/opt/lab256/data/logs/parser.out 2>&1 &  
nohup /opt/lab256/scripts/run-pwa-daily.sh >/opt/lab256/data/logs/pwa.out 2>&1 &  
nohup /opt/lab256/scripts/run-spllm-runner.sh>/opt/lab256/data/logs/runner.out 2>&1 &  
;;  
stop\_all)  
pkill -f run-lab-comm.sh || true  
pkill -f run-parser-cron.sh || true  
pkill -f run-pwa-daily.sh || true  
pkill -f run-spllm-runner.sh || true  
;;  
\*)  
echo "Usage: $0 {enable\_all|stop\_all}"  
;;  
esac  
"""

run\_lab\_comm = """#!/usr/bin/env bash  
set -euo pipefail  
source /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env 2>/dev/null || true  
cd /opt/lab256/apps/lab-comm || exit 1  
if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "bun not found"; exit 1; fi  
bun install  
bun run start --port "${PORT\_COMM:-5401}" --metrics "${PORT\_METRICS:-5490}" --public-url "${LAB\_PUBLIC\_URL:-http://localhost}"  
"""

run\_parser\_cron = """#!/usr/bin/env bash  
set -euo pipefail  
source /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env 2>/dev/null || true  
cd /opt/lab256/apps/parser || exit 1  
if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "bun not found"; exit 1; fi  
while true; do  
bun install || true  
shopt -s nullglob  
files=( "${PARSER\_INBOX:-/opt/lab256/data/inbox\_md}"/\*.md )  
if (( ${#files\[@\]} )); then  
bun run cli "${files\[@\]}" --out "${PARSER\_OUT:-/opt/lab256/data/ndjson}" --secret "${PARSER\_HMAC\_SECRET:-}"  
fi  
sleep 900  
done  
"""

run\_pwa\_daily = """#!/usr/bin/env bash  
set -euo pipefail  
source /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env 2>/dev/null || true  
cd "${PWA\_SRC:-/opt/lab256/apps/pwa}" || exit 1  
if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "bun not found"; exit 1; fi  
while true; do  
bun install || true  
bun run build || true  
mkdir -p "${PWA\_DIST:-/var/www/pwa}"  
rsync -a --delete "./dist/" "${PWA\_DIST:-/var/www/pwa}/" || true  
sleep 86400  
done  
"""

run\_spllm\_runner = """#!/usr/bin/env bash  
set -euo pipefail  
source /opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env 2>/dev/null || true  
cd /opt/lab256/apps/spllm-runtime || exit 1  
if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "bun not found"; exit 1; fi  
bun install || true  
bun run start  
\--in "${SPLLM\_BUF:-/opt/lab256/data/ndjson}"  
\--receipts "${SPLLM\_RECEIPTS:-/opt/lab256/data/receipts}"  
\--sqlite "${SPLLM\_SQLITE:-/opt/lab256/data/sqlite/index.db}"  
\--worker "${LAB\_LAN\_WORKER\_HOST:-lab512.lan}:5411"  
\--ed25519-priv "${LAB\_ED25519\_PRIV:-/opt/lab256/etc/keys/ed25519.priv}"  
\--ed25519-pub "${LAB\_ED25519\_PUB:-/opt/lab256/etc/keys/ed25519.pub}"  
"""

install\_sh = """#!/usr/bin/env bash  
set -euo pipefail  
ROOT=/opt/lab256  
APPS=$ROOT/apps  
echo "\[_\] Copying NGINX config"  
sudo mkdir -p /etc/nginx/conf.d || true  
sudo cp $ROOT/etc/nginx/lab256.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/lab256.conf || true  
sudo nginx -t && sudo nginx -s reload || true  
echo "\[_\] Installing artifacts if present"  
cd $ROOT/artifacts || exit 0  
unpack(){{ zip="$1"; dest="$2"; if \[ -f "$zip" \]; then echo " - $zip -> $dest"; mkdir -p "$dest"; unzip -o "$zip" -d "$dest" >/dev/null; else echo " - $zip not found"; fi }}  
unpack "lab-comm.zip" "$APPS/lab-comm"  
unpack "llb-pwa-v2.zip" "$APPS/pwa"  
unpack "spllm-docs.zip" "$APPS/docs"  
unpack "spllm-runtime.zip" "$APPS/spllm-runtime"  
echo "\[_\] Building PWA"  
if \[ -d "$APPS/pwa" \]; then (cd "$APPS/pwa" && bun install && bun run build && sudo rsync -a --delete dist/ /var/www/pwa/); else echo "<html><body><h1>LLB PWA</h1></body></html>" | sudo tee /var/www/pwa/index.html >/dev/null; fi  
echo "\[_\] Building Docs"  
if \[ -d "$APPS/docs" \]; then (cd "$APPS/docs" && bun install && bun run build && sudo rsync -a --delete dist/ /var/www/docs/); else echo "<html><body><h1>Docs</h1></body></html>" | sudo tee /var/www/docs/index.html >/dev/null; fi  
echo "\[\*\] Done."  
"""

Write files
===========

(ROOT / "README.md").write\_text(readme)  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/etc/env/lab256.env.example").write\_text(env\_example)  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/etc/nginx/lab256.conf").write\_text(nginx\_conf)  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/services-macos.sh").write\_text(services\_macos)  
os.chmod(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/services-macos.sh", 0o755)  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-lab-comm.sh").write\_text(run\_lab\_comm)  
os.chmod(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-lab-comm.sh", 0o755)  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-parser-cron.sh").write\_text(run\_parser\_cron)  
os.chmod(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-parser-cron.sh", 0o755)  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-pwa-daily.sh").write\_text(run\_pwa\_daily)  
os.chmod(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-pwa-daily.sh", 0o755)  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-spllm-runner.sh").write\_text(run\_spllm\_runner)  
os.chmod(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/run-spllm-runner.sh", 0o755)  
(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/install.sh").write\_text(install\_sh)  
os.chmod(ROOT / "opt/lab256/scripts/install.sh", 0o755)

if app == "lab-comm":  
code = f"""import http from "http";

const PORT = parseInt(process.env.PORT\_COMM || "{port}");  
const api = http.createServer((req, res) => {{  
if (req.url && req.url.startsWith("/metrics")) {{  
res.writeHead(200, {{ "content-type": "application/json" }});  
res.end(JSON.stringify({{ ok: true, ts: Date.now(), cycle: "idle" }}));  
return;  
}}  
if (req.url && req.url.startsWith("/api/")) {{  
res.writeHead(200, {{ "content-type": "application/json" }});  
res.end(JSON.stringify({{ status: "lab-comm placeholder" }}));  
return;  
}}  
res.writeHead(404); res.end();  
}});  
const wss = new WebSocketServer({{ noServer: true }});  
api.on("upgrade", (req, socket, head) => {{  
if (req.url && req.url.startsWith("/ws/")) {{  
wss.handleUpgrade(req, socket, head, (ws) => ws.send(JSON.stringify({{ hello: "lab-comm ws" }})));  
}} else {{ socket.destroy(); }}  
}});  
api.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`[lab-comm] listening :${{PORT}}`));  
"""  
(app\_path / "server.ts").write\_text(code)  
else:  
code = f"""import http from "http";  
const PORT = parseInt(process.env.PORT\_SPLLM || "{port}");  
const srv = http.createServer((req,res)=>{{  
res.writeHead(200, {{ "content-type": "application/json" }});  
res.end(JSON.stringify({{ runner: "{app} placeholder", ts: Date.now() }}));  
}});  
srv.listen(PORT, ()=>console.log("\[{app}\] listening :"+PORT));  
"""  
(app\_path / "server.ts").write\_text(code)
