### 3) NEW FILES (código completo)

**`apps/logline-core/compute/src/types.ts`**

```ts
export type JSONValue = string|number|boolean|null|JSONValue[]|{[k:string]:JSONValue};

export type Intent = {
  intent: string;                // ex: "hk.clean", "ops.order"
  params?: Record<string, JSONValue>;
  meta?: Record<string, JSONValue>;
};

export type Span = {
  span_id?: string;
  intent: string;
  params: Record<string, JSONValue>;
  execution: { action: string };
  output?: { state_delta?: JSONValue|null; effects?: string[] };
};

export type Policy = {
  name: string;
  applies_to: string[];          // ["hk.*", "*"]
  when?: "always"|"pre"|"post";
  check: (ctx: { action:string; params:Record<string,JSONValue>; pre:any; post?:any }) => { allow:boolean; reason?:string };
};

export type Receipt = {
  receipt_id: string;             // deterministic
  span_id?: string;
  action: string;
  decision: "allow"|"deny";
  reasons?: string[];
  state_hash_pre?: string;
  state_hash_post?: string;
  signature?: string;             // ed25519 base64 opcional
  ts: string;
};

export type PlanResult = Span[];
```

**`apps/logline-core/compute/src/policies.ts`** (exemplos simples; substituível por pasta polícies)

```ts
import type { Policy } from "./types.ts";

// Exemplo de policies: bloqueios triviais apenas para demo
export const POLICIES: Policy[] = [
  {
    name: "deny.unknown.actions",
    applies_to: ["*"],
    when: "pre",
    check: ({ action }) => {
      // permitir apenas namespaces conhecidos
      if (/^(hk\.|ops\.|task\.|fin\.)/.test(action)) return { allow:true };
      return { allow:false, reason:"unknown_action" };
    }
  },
  {
    name: "hk.clean.requires.room",
    applies_to: ["hk.clean"],
    when: "pre",
    check: ({ params }) => {
      if (params?.room) return { allow:true };
      return { allow:false, reason:"missing_room" };
    }
  },
];
```

**`apps/logline-core/compute/src/crypto.ts`**

```ts
import { createHash } from "crypto";
import { readFileSync } from "fs";

export function sha256Hex(obj: any): string {
  return createHash("sha256").update(JSON.stringify(obj)).digest("hex");
}

// ed25519 opcional via PEM (se não houver, não assina)
let PRIV_PEM = process.env.LAB_ED25519_PRIV_PEM || "";
export function maybeSign(base: any): string|undefined {
  try {
    if (!PRIV_PEM) return undefined;
    // aqui manteríamos uma chamada a WebCrypto (node:crypto.subtle) ou libs ed25519
    // para manter demo TS pura sem deps, retornamos undefined se não houver provider
    // (Integração real: usar @noble/ed25519 ou node:crypto.subtle em Node 20+)
    return undefined;
  } catch { return undefined; }
}
```

**`apps/logline-core/compute/src/engine.ts`**

```ts
import type { Intent, Span, PlanResult, Policy, Receipt } from "./types.ts";
import { POLICIES } from "./policies.ts";
import { sha256Hex, maybeSign } from "./crypto.ts";

const EFFECTS_DEFAULT = ["index.update"];
const DEBUG_PLAN = process.env.LAB_DEBUG_PLAN === "1";

// 1) Planejamento simples (1:1 intent->span) respeitando máscara por policy
export async function planSpans(intents: Intent[], state_view: any): Promise<PlanResult> {
  const out: Span[] = [];
  for (const it of intents) {
    const action = actionForIntent(it.intent);
    const span: Span = {
      span_id: genSpanId(it),
      intent: it.intent,
      params: it.params || {},
      execution: { action },
      output: { state_delta: null, effects: EFFECTS_DEFAULT.slice() }
    };
    // checagem pré-execução
    const pre = runPolicies(span.execution.action, span.params, state_view, undefined, "pre");
    if (!pre.allow) {
      if (DEBUG_PLAN) console.warn("[plan] denied", { intent: it.intent, reason: pre.reason });
      continue;
    }
    out.push(span);
  }
  return out;
}

// 2) Execução de um span: aplica delta (simples), avalia policies e gera receipt
export async function executeSpan(span: Span, pre_state: any): Promise<{ post_state:any; receipt:Receipt }> {
  const pre = runPolicies(span.execution.action, span.params, pre_state, undefined, "pre");
  const state_hash_pre = sha256Hex(pre_state);
  let decision: "allow"|"deny" = pre.allow ? "allow" : "deny";
  const reasons: string[] = [];
  if (!pre.allow && pre.reason) reasons.push(pre.reason);

  let post_state = pre_state;
  if (decision === "allow") {
    // aplicar um delta fake (apenas marca audit flag) — substitua pelo negócio real
    post_state = { ...pre_state, _last_action: span.execution.action, _ts: Date.now() };
    const post = runPolicies(span.execution.action, span.params, pre_state, post_state, "post");
    if (!post.allow) { decision = "deny"; if (post.reason) reasons.push(post.reason); post_state = pre_state; }
  }

  const state_hash_post = sha256Hex(post_state);
  const receipt: Receipt = {
    receipt_id: "rcpt_"+sha256Hex({ span, state_hash_pre }).slice(0,16),
    span_id: span.span_id,
    action: span.execution.action,
    decision,
    reasons: reasons.length? reasons: undefined,
    state_hash_pre,
    state_hash_post,
    signature: maybeSign({ span, state_hash_pre, state_hash_post, decision }),
    ts: new Date().toISOString()
  };

  return { post_state, receipt };
}

// Helpers
function runPolicies(action:string, params:any, pre:any, post:any, when:"pre"|"post") {
  let allow = true; let reason: string|undefined;
  const rules = POLICIES.filter(p => (p.when||"pre")===when && p.applies_to.some(a => matches(a, action)));
  for (const r of rules) {
    const res = r.check({ action, params, pre, post });
    if (!res.allow) { allow = false; reason = res.reason || r.name; break; }
  }
  return { allow, reason };
}
function matches(glob:string, action:string) {
  if (glob==="*") return true;
  if (glob.endsWith(".*")) return action.startsWith(glob.slice(0,-2));
  return action===glob;
}
function actionForIntent(intent: string) {
  // mapeamento minimal — pode ser carregado por domínio
  if (intent==="task.create") return "task.create.plan";
  if (intent==="task.complete") return "task.complete.plan";
  if (intent.startsWith("hk.")) return "hk.clean.plan";
  if (intent.startsWith("ops.")) return "ops.order.plan";
  if (intent.startsWith("fin.")) return "fin.transfer.plan";
  return intent + ".plan";
}
function genSpanId(it: Intent) {
  return "spn_"+sha256Hex({ intent: it.intent, params: it.params||{}, t:0 }).slice(0,10);
}
```

PR-11 — Bridge Parser → Planner → Core (caminho completo)
=========================================================

### 1) HEADER

**Title:** Pipeline completo: `.md → messages/intents → plan → execute`  
**Rationale:** Fechar o loop: ingestir `.md`, gerar `intents` (parser), planejar spans, e opcionalmente executar primeiro span em modo shadow.  
**Risks/No-regret:** Aditivo e opt-in via nova rota `/pipeline/ingest_plan_execute?shadow=1`.  
**ENV:** `LAB_PIPELINE_SHADOW=1` para ativar execução automática (default off).

### 2) PATCHES

**A) API: rota `/pipeline/ingest_plan_execute`**

```diff
--- a/apps/lab-256/api/src/server.ts
+++ b/apps/lab-256/api/src/server.ts
@@
+  if (p==="/pipeline/ingest_plan_execute" && req.method==="POST") {
+    try {
+      const raw = getRawBody(req) ?? Buffer.concat(await Array.fromAsync(req as any));
+      const filename = url.searchParams.get("file") || "pipeline.md";
+      // 1) parse markdown -> intents
+      const txt = raw.toString("utf8");
+      const { parserToNDJSON } = await import("../../../packages/parser-bridge/src/index.ts");
+      const { intents, report } = parserToNDJSON(filename, txt);
+      // 2) plan
+      const state_view = await readJson(join(STATE,"world.json"), { rooms:{}, stock:{} });
+      const planRes = await fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/compute/plan`, {
+        method:"POST", headers:{ "Content-Type":"application/json" },
+        body: JSON.stringify({ intents, state_view })
+      }).then(r=>r.json());
+      // 3) optional execute first span (shadow)
+      let execRes: any = null;
+      const shadow = (process.env.LAB_PIPELINE_SHADOW==="1") || (url.searchParams.get("shadow")==="1");
+      if (shadow && planRes?.plan?.length) {
+        const span = planRes.plan[0];
+        execRes = await fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/compute/execute`, {
+          method:"POST", headers:{ "Content-Type":"application/json" },
+          body: JSON.stringify({ span, pre_state: state_view })
+        }).then(r=>r.json());
+      }
+      await appendEv({ type:"ingest", file:filename, ts:new Date().toISOString(), pipeline:true });
+      res.writeHead(200,{"Content-Type":"application/json"});
+      return res.end(JSON.stringify({ ok:true, report, intents_len:intents.length, plan_len: planRes?.plan?.length||0, exec: execRes }));
+    } catch (e:any) {
+      res.writeHead(400,{"Content-Type":"application/json"});
+      return res.end(JSON.stringify({ ok:false, error: e?.message||"bad_request" }));
+    }
+  }
```

**B) SSE: publica `plan`/`state` já feito em PR-5 (sem mudanças).**

* * *

### 3) NEW FILES

**`packages/parser-bridge/src/index.ts`** — ponte mínima para reuso do parser existente

```ts
import { parseMarkdown } from "../../parser/src/index.ts";

export function parserToNDJSON(filename: string, raw: string): {
  intents: Array<{ intent:string; params?:Record<string,any> }>;
  report: any;
} {
  const { report, ndjson } = parseMarkdown(raw, { filename });
  // extrair intents do NDJSON (já em memória aqui)
  const intents = (ndjson?.intents || "")
    .trim().split("\n").filter(Boolean)
    .map(line => {
      try { return JSON.parse(line); } catch { return null; }
    })
    .filter(Boolean)
    .map((x:any) => ({ intent: x.intent, params: x.params||{} }));
  return { intents, report };
}
```

PR-12 — Hooks de Métricas (Delta Consistency, Violations, Plan Success)
=======================================================================

### 1) HEADER

**Title:** Métricas computáveis no ciclo (`/metrics`) com atualização automática  
**Rationale:** Tornar visível **Delta Consistency**, **Policy Violations** e **Plan Success** na UI/monitor e em snapshots.  
**Risks/No-regret:** Aditivo; nenhuma quebra de contrato.  
**ENV:** `LAB_METRICS_WINDOW=100` (tamanho da janela, default 100 últimos eventos)

### 2) PATCHES

**A) API: atualizar métricas quando planejar/executar**

```diff
--- a/apps/lab-256/api/src/server.ts
+++ b/apps/lab-256/api/src/server.ts
@@
   if (p==="/compute/plan" && req.method==="POST") {
@@
-      const plan = await planSpans(intents, state_view);
+      const plan = await planSpans(intents, state_view);
       await appendEv({ type:"plan", ts:new Date().toISOString(), size: plan?.length||0 });
+      // métricas
+      const s = new StateStore(STATE);
+      await s.setMetric("plans_total", (await s.readMetrics()).plans_total + 1 || 1);
+      await s.setMetric("last_plan_size", plan?.length||0);
@@
   if (p==="/compute/execute" && req.method==="POST") {
@@
-      const result = await executeSpan(span, pre_state);
+      const result = await executeSpan(span, pre_state);
+      // métricas: delta consistency = (hash(pre)+delta -> hash(post)) (aqui simplificada)
+      const s = new StateStore(STATE);
+      const m = await s.readMetrics();
+      const ok = result?.receipt?.decision === "allow";
+      await s.setMetric("exec_total", (m.exec_total||0) + 1);
+      await s.setMetric("exec_success", (m.exec_success||0) + (ok?1:0));
+      const successRate = ((m.exec_success||0) + (ok?1:0)) / ((m.exec_total||0) + 1);
+      await s.setMetric("exec_success_rate", Number(successRate.toFixed(3)));
+      if (result?.receipt?.reasons?.length) {
+        await s.setMetric("policy_violations", (m.policy_violations||0) + 1);
+      }
```

PR-13 — ed25519 real + verificador de receipts
==============================================

### 1) HEADER

**Title:** Assinatura ed25519 de receipts + endpoint `/verify_receipt`  
**Rationale:** Tornar receipts criptograficamente verificáveis, local-first, sem dependências nativas.  
**Risks/No-regret:** Aditivo; se chaves não existirem, continua só com SHA-256 (como antes).  
**ENV (opcional):**

*   `LAB_ED25519_PRIV_HEX` (64 hex chars / 32 bytes)
*   `LAB_ED25519_PUB_HEX` (64 hex chars / 32 bytes)  
    _(Se ausentes, assinatura é omitida; verificação falha com `missing_public_key` se exigida.)_

### 2) PATCHES (diffs)

**A) engine.ts — usar assinatura real (troca do maybeSign)**

```diff
--- a/apps/logline-core/compute/src/engine.ts
+++ b/apps/logline-core/compute/src/engine.ts
@@
-import { sha256Hex, maybeSign } from "./crypto.ts";
+import { sha256Hex, canonicalJson } from "./crypto.ts";
+import { signReceiptPayload } from "./sig.ts";
@@
   const receipt: Receipt = {
     receipt_id: "rcpt_"+sha256Hex({ span, state_hash_pre }).slice(0,16),
     span_id: span.span_id,
     action: span.execution.action,
     decision,
     reasons: reasons.length? reasons: undefined,
     state_hash_pre,
     state_hash_post,
-    signature: maybeSign({ span, state_hash_pre, state_hash_post, decision }),
+    signature: await signReceiptPayload({
+      span, decision, state_hash_pre, state_hash_post
+    }),
     ts: new Date().toISOString()
   };
```

**B) API — novo endpoint `/verify_receipt`**

```diff
--- a/apps/lab-256/api/src/server.ts
+++ b/apps/lab-256/api/src/server.ts
@@
 import { planSpans, executeSpan } from "../../../apps/logline-core/compute/src/engine.ts";
+import { verifyReceipt } from "../../../apps/logline-core/compute/src/sig.ts";
@@
+  if (p==="/verify_receipt" && req.method==="POST") {
+    try {
+      const raw = getRawBody(req) ?? Buffer.concat(await Array.fromAsync(req as any));
+      const body = JSON.parse(raw.toString("utf8"));
+      const result = await verifyReceipt(body);
+      res.writeHead(result.ok ? 200 : 400, {"Content-Type":"application/json"});
+      return res.end(JSON.stringify(result));
+    } catch (e:any) {
+      res.writeHead(400,{"Content-Type":"application/json"});
+      return res.end(JSON.stringify({ ok:false, error: e?.message||"bad_request" }));
+    }
+  }
```

### 3) NEW FILES (código completo)

**`apps/logline-core/compute/src/crypto.ts`**

```ts
import { createHash } from "crypto";

export function sha256Hex(obj: any): string {
  return createHash("sha256").update(
    typeof obj === "string" ? obj : canonicalJson(obj)
  ).digest("hex");
}

export function canonicalJson(obj: any): string {
  // JSON canônico estável (ordem alfabética)
  return JSON.stringify(order(obj));
}

function order(v: any): any {
  if (Array.isArray(v)) return v.map(order);
  if (v && typeof v === "object") {
    return Object.keys(v).sort().reduce((acc, k) => {
      acc[k] = order(v[k]); return acc;
    }, {} as any);
  }
  return v;
}
```

**`apps/logline-core/compute/src/sig.ts`**

```ts
import * as ed from "@noble/ed25519";
import { canonicalJson, sha256Hex } from "./crypto.ts";

const PRIV_HEX = (process.env.LAB_ED25519_PRIV_HEX || "").trim().toLowerCase();
const PUB_HEX  = (process.env.LAB_ED25519_PUB_HEX  || "").trim().toLowerCase();

type ReceiptPayload = {
  span: any;
  decision: "allow"|"deny";
  state_hash_pre: string;
  state_hash_post: string;
};

export async function signReceiptPayload(p: ReceiptPayload): Promise<string|undefined> {
  if (!PRIV_HEX) return undefined;                    // assinatura opcional
  const msg = canonicalJson({
    span: p.span, decision: p.decision,
    state_hash_pre: p.state_hash_pre,
    state_hash_post: p.state_hash_post
  });
  const hash = sha256Hex(msg);                         // assinar hash canonical
  const sig = await ed.sign(hash, PRIV_HEX);
  return Buffer.from(sig).toString("hex");
}

export async function verifyReceipt(body: {
  span: any; decision: string; state_hash_pre: string; state_hash_post: string; signature?: string;
}) {
  if (!PUB_HEX) return { ok:false, error:"missing_public_key" };
  if (!body?.signature) return { ok:false, error:"missing_signature" };
  const msg = canonicalJson({
    span: body.span,
    decision: body.decision,
    state_hash_pre: body.state_hash_pre,
    state_hash_post: body.state_hash_post
  });
  const hash = sha256Hex(msg);
  try {
    const ok = await ed.verify(body.signature, hash, PUB_HEX);
    return { ok };
  } catch (e:any) {
    return { ok:false, error: e?.message || "verify_error" };
  }
}
```

**`package.json` (raiz ou workspace) — adicionar dep**

```json
{
  "dependencies": {
    "@noble/ed25519": "^2.1.0"
  }
}
```

**`bin/gen_ed25519.sh` (assistente local de chaves)**

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
# Gera par ed25519 em hex (noble/portable)
node -e '
(async()=>{
  const ed = await import("@noble/ed25519");
  const priv = ed.utils.randomPrivateKey();
  const pub  = await ed.getPublicKeyAsync(priv);
  console.log("LAB_ED25519_PRIV_HEX="+Buffer.from(priv).toString("hex"));
  console.log("LAB_ED25519_PUB_HEX="+Buffer.from(pub).toString("hex"));
})();'
```

```bash
# 1) Instalar deps
bun install

# 2) Gerar chaves

./bin/run_sse.sh & ./bin/run_api.sh &

# 4) Executar um span pra gerar receipt assinado

  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"span":{"intent":"hk.clean","params":{"room":"101"},"execution":{"action":"hk.clean.plan"}},"pre_state":{"rooms":{"101":"dirty"}}}' | jq .receipt > /tmp/rc.json

# 5) Verificar o receipt
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8090/verify_receipt \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data-binary @/tmp/rc.json
# Esperado: { "ok": true }
```

*   PEM será suportado futuramente; noble usa secret 32-byte.
*   Receipts assinam **JSON canônico hash** (determinístico).

PR-14 — Loader de Policies (hot-reload) + Waivers computáveis
=============================================================

### 1) HEADER

**Title:** Policies por diretório (`policies/`) com hot-reload e waivers (`waivers.json`)  
**Rationale:** Governança dinâmica: equipes alteram regras sem rebuild, com exceções auditáveis.  
**Risks/No-regret:** Aditivo; default continua com policies embutidas se diretório vazio.  
**ENV:**

*   `LAB_POLICY_DIR` (default `apps/logline-core/policies`)
*   `LAB_WAIVERS_FILE` (default `<POLICY_DIR>/waivers.json`)

### 2) PATCHES (diffs)

**A) engine.ts — consumir policies via loader**

```diff
--- a/apps/logline-core/compute/src/engine.ts
+++ b/apps/logline-core/compute/src/engine.ts
@@
-import { POLICIES } from "./policies.ts";
+import { getPolicies, getWaivers, matchesScope } from "./policy_loader.ts";
@@
-  const pre = runPolicies(span.execution.action, span.params, state_view, undefined, "pre");
+  const pre = await runPolicies(span.execution.action, span.params, state_view, undefined, "pre");
@@
-  const pre = runPolicies(span.execution.action, span.params, pre_state, undefined, "pre");
+  const pre = await runPolicies(span.execution.action, span.params, pre_state, undefined, "pre");
@@
-    const post = runPolicies(span.execution.action, span.params, pre_state, post_state, "post");
+    const post = await runPolicies(span.execution.action, span.params, pre_state, post_state, "post");
@@
-function runPolicies(action:string, params:any, pre:any, post:any, when:"pre"|"post") {
-  let allow = true; let reason: string|undefined;
-  const rules = POLICIES.filter(p => (p.when||"pre")===when && p.applies_to.some(a => matches(a, action)));
-  for (const r of rules) {
-    const res = r.check({ action, params, pre, post });
-    if (!res.allow) { allow = false; reason = res.reason || r.name; break; }
-  }
-  return { allow, reason };
-}
-function matches(glob:string, action:string) {
-  if (glob==="*") return true;
-  if (glob.endsWith(".*")) return action.startsWith(glob.slice(0,-2));
-  return action===glob;
-}
+async function runPolicies(action:string, params:any, pre:any, post:any, when:"pre"|"post") {
+  let allow = true; let reason: string|undefined; let waived = false;
+  const rules = (await getPolicies()).filter(p => (p.when||"pre")===when && p.applies_to.some(a => matches(a, action)));
+  for (const r of rules) {
+    const res = r.check({ action, params, pre, post });
+    if (!res.allow) {
+      // ver se há waiver válido
+      const ws = await getWaivers();
+      const hit = ws.find(w => w.policy===r.name && matchesScope(w.scope, action, params) && isActive(w.until));
+      if (hit) { waived = true; continue; } // ignora a negação
+      allow = false; reason = res.reason || r.name; break;
+    }
+  }
+  return { allow, reason, waived };
+}
+function matches(glob:string, action:string) {
+  if (glob==="*") return true;
+  if (glob.endsWith(".*")) return action.startsWith(glob.slice(0,-2));
+  return action===glob;
+}
+function isActive(until?: string) {
+  if (!until) return true;
+  return new Date(until).getTime() >= Date.now();
+}
```

### 3) NEW FILES (código completo)

**`apps/logline-core/compute/src/policy_loader.ts`**

```ts
import { existsSync, readdirSync, readFileSync } from "fs";
import { join, extname } from "path";
import type { Policy } from "./types.ts";

const DIR = process.env.LAB_POLICY_DIR || "apps/logline-core/policies";
const WFILE = process.env.LAB_WAIVERS_FILE || join(DIR, "waivers.json");

let cache: { policies: Policy[]; waivers: Waiver[]; ts: number } = { policies: [], waivers: [], ts: 0 };

export type Waiver = {
  policy: string;
  scope: { action?: string; params?: Record<string, any> }; // match exato nos campos presentes
  reason?: string;
  granted_by?: string;
  until?: string; // ISO
};

export async function getPolicies(): Promise<Policy[]> {
  if (cache.policies.length === 0) await reloadPolicies();
  return cache.policies;
}
export async function getWaivers(): Promise<Waiver[]> {
  if (cache.waivers.length === 0) await reloadPolicies();
  return cache.waivers;
}

export async function reloadPolicies() {
  const loaded: Policy[] = [];
  if (existsSync(DIR)) {
    for (const f of readdirSync(DIR)) {
      const p = join(DIR, f);
      const ext = extname(p).toLowerCase();
      if (ext === ".json" && f !== "waivers.json") {
        try {
          const arr = JSON.parse(readFileSync(p,"utf8"));
          if (Array.isArray(arr)) for (const o of arr) loaded.push(jsonToPolicy(o));
        } catch {}
      }
      if (ext === ".ts" || ext === ".js") {
        try {
          // Bun/Node ESM dynamic import; exigirá transpilar TS ao rodar
          const mod = await import("file://"+join(process.cwd(), p));
          const arr = (mod.default || mod.policies || mod.POLICIES) as Policy[]|undefined;
          if (Array.isArray(arr)) loaded.push(...arr);
        } catch {}
      }
    }
  }
  const waivers: Waiver[] = existsSync(WFILE) ? JSON.parse(readFileSync(WFILE,"utf8")) : [];
  cache = { policies: loaded, waivers, ts: Date.now() };
}

export async function listPoliciesAndWaivers() {
  return { policies: await getPolicies(), waivers: await getWaivers(), ts: cache.ts };
}

function jsonToPolicy(o: any): Policy {
  // formato declarativo básico
  // { name, applies_to, when, rule: { kind: "exists"|"eq"|"regex", path:"params.room", value?: any } }
  const rule = o.rule || {};
  return {
    name: o.name,
    applies_to: o.applies_to || ["*"],
    when: o.when || "pre",
    check: ({ action, params, pre, post }) => {
      const ctx = { action, params, pre, post };
      switch (rule.kind) {
        case "exists": return pick(ctx, rule.path) != null ? yes() : no("missing_"+rule.path);
        case "eq":     return pick(ctx, rule.path) === rule.value ? yes() : no("neq_"+rule.path);
        case "regex":  {
          const v = String(pick(ctx, rule.path) ?? "");
          return new RegExp(rule.value).test(v) ? yes() : no("regex_fail_"+rule.path);
        }
        default:       return yes(); // sem regra = allow
      }
    }
  };
}

export function matchesScope(scope: Waiver["scope"], action:string, params:Record<string,any>) {
  if (!scope) return true;
  if (scope.action && scope.action !== action) return false;
  if (scope.params) {
    for (const k of Object.keys(scope.params)) {
      if (params?.[k] !== scope.params[k]) return false;
    }
  }
  return true;
}

function pick(obj:any, path:string) {
  const parts = path.split(".");
  let cur = obj;
  for (const k of parts) cur = cur?.[k];
  return cur;
}
const yes = () => ({ allow:true as const });
const no  = (reason?:string) => ({ allow:false as const, reason });
```

**`apps/logline-core/policies/README.md`**

```md
Coloque aqui:
- `*.json` declarativos (array de policies) — ver exemplos abaixo
- `*.ts` com `export default [Policy, ...]` para lógica custom

`waivers.json` aplica exceções temporárias com `until` ISO.
```

**Exemplo `apps/logline-core/policies/hk.json`**

```json
[
  {
    "name": "hk.clean.requires.room",
    "applies_to": ["hk.clean"],
    "when": "pre",
    "rule": { "kind": "exists", "path": "params.room" }
  }
]
```

**Exemplo `apps/logline-core/policies/waivers.json`**

```json
[
  {
    "policy": "hk.clean.requires.room",
    "scope": { "action": "hk.clean", "params": { "room": "999" } },
    "reason": "VIP manual override",
    "granted_by": "ops_mgr",
    "until": "2099-12-31T23:59:59Z"
  }
]
```

### 4) TESTS & SMOKE

```bash
# 1) Policies por diretório
mkdir -p apps/logline-core/policies
cat > apps/logline-core/policies/hk.json <<'JSON'
[
  { "name":"hk.clean.requires.room","applies_to":["hk.clean"],"when":"pre","rule":{"kind":"exists","path":"params.room"} }
]
JSON

# 2) Waiver (sala 999)
cat > apps/logline-core/policies/waivers.json <<'JSON'
[
  { "policy":"hk.clean.requires.room", "scope":{"action":"hk.clean","params":{"room":"999"}}, "reason":"override demo", "granted_by":"ops", "until":"2099-01-01T00:00:00Z" }
]
JSON

# 3) Reload policies
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8090/policies/reload

# 4) Execução sem room → deny (sem waiver)
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8090/compute/execute \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"span":{"intent":"hk.clean","params":{},"execution":{"action":"hk.clean.plan"}},"pre_state":{}}' | jq .receipt

# 5) Execução com room=101 → allow
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8090/compute/execute \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"span":{"intent":"hk.clean","params":{"room":"101"},"execution":{"action":"hk.clean.plan"}},"pre_state":{}}' | jq .receipt

# 6) Execução com room=999 → allow por waiver (mesmo se regras negassem)
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8090/compute/execute \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"span":{"intent":"hk.clean","params":{"room":"999"},"execution":{"action":"hk.clean.plan"}},"pre_state":{}}' | jq .receipt

# 7) Listar policies + waivers
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8090/policies/list | jq
```

**Esperado:**

*   `reload` ok;
*   `room={}` → `decision:"deny"` com `reasons:["missing_params.room"]` (ou equivalente);
*   `room:999` → `decision:"allow"` por **waiver**;
*   `/policies/list` mostra arrays carregados.

### 5) DOCS

`docs/POLICIES_WAIVERS.md`:

*   **Policies**: `*.json` com `rule.kind: exists|eq|regex` ou `*.ts` exportando `Policy[]`.
*   **Waivers**: `waivers.json` com `policy`, `scope` (match), `until` (ISO).
*   **Hot reload:** `POST /policies/reload`.

### 6) ACCEPTANCE

*   Core passa a ler policies dinâmicas; waivers funcionam e são auditáveis.
*   Nenhuma quebra de contrato; SSE publica `policy_reload`.

* * *

Próximos (opcionais se quiser que eu siga já):
----------------------------------------------

*   **PR-15 — `validActions(state)` + beam pruning (SpLLM-aware):** expor `/compute/valid_actions` e ajustar `planSpans` para só considerar ações válidas, preparando encaixe direto com o planner/beam do SpLLM.
*   **PR-16 — Installers skeleton (pkgbuild/launchd)**: esqueleto de instaladores para /opt|/etc|/var com postinstall gerando `.env`, diretórios e serviços launchd separados (api/sse).
*   **PR-17 — Métricas avançadas:** janela deslizante, Delta Consistency real (aplicar Δ), histogramas e export NDJSON por tópico.

Se quiser, eu já avanço em **PR-15** (validActions + beam-friendly) na sequência.

## Prompt:
LAB256-COALESCED-v19r-K15.zip

## Response:
Thought for 10s

Thought for 44s

Thought for 37s

Thought for 29s

Thought for 1m 47s

Thought for 43s

boa, Dan — eu abri o **LAB256-COALESCED-v19r-K15.zip** e fiz uma checagem técnica rápida do pacote. Aqui vai um raio-X honesto + o que falta pra deixar redondo.

* * *

O que tem aí dentro (resumo)
============================

*   **~1295 arquivos**. Pastas chave:
    *   `apps/lab-256/api/` (tem **dois** entrypoints: `server.ts` e `src/server.ts`)
    *   `apps/lab-256/sse/src/server.ts` (SSE já com config central e replay)
    *   `packages/` → **config**, **state**, **parser**, **validator**, **logger**, **extras-manifest**, **loglineos-extras**
    *   `bin/` → scripts (`run_api.sh`, `run_sse.sh`, `run_pwa.sh`, `run_llos.sh`, `run_lab8gb.sh`)
    *   `apps/loglineos/api/src/server.ts` (API do LogLineOS acoplada)
*   **Parser v0.2** (TS puro) está lá: `packages/parser/{types.ts,parser.ts,emit.ts}` — streaming/zero-loss, NDJSON e `report.json` 👍
*   **Config centralizada**: `packages/config/src/index.ts` (FHS pronto: /opt|/etc|/var), CORS e HMAC hooks
*   **State store (single-writer)**: `packages/state/src/index.ts` — snapshots por ciclo, `metrics.json`, `cycles.json`
*   **SSE** topic-aware + replay: `apps/lab-256/sse/src/server.ts` (param `topic=all|ingest|cycles|state|errors`, Last-Event-ID)
*   **Docs**: `README.md` com quick-start, binários e “system layout” (quando instalado)

* * *

Pontos verdes ✅
===============

*   **Parser/Emissor** já no formato LogLineOS (messages/intents/spans/report) sem perder conteúdo.
*   **SSE** já “hub” com tópicos e replay — ideal pro PWA/monitor.
*   **Config** está unificada (FHS + envs LAB256\_\*). Base pra “installers”.
*   **State/Metrics** com single-writer + **snapshots por ciclo** (bom pra auditoria).
*   **Binários** prontos pra rodar localmente (dev shims) e com scripts para LogLineOS/Lab8GB.

* * *

Gaps e riscos 🔶/❗
==================

1.  **Duplication/Drift no API**
    *   `bin/run_api.sh` chama **`apps/lab-256/api/server.ts`** (entrypoint antigo, com helpers inline).
    *   O “novo” com **config/limits/ratelimit** é **`apps/lab-256/api/src/server.ts`**.  
        → Resultado: você tem 2 versões de servidor; os scripts rodam a **antiga**.
2.  **Módulo ausente** (build break se usar a versão “nova”)
    *   `apps/lab-256/api/src/server.ts` e `apps/loglineos/api/src/server.ts` importam `packages/io-atomic/src/index.ts`, **mas `packages/io-atomic/` não está no bundle**.  
        → Hoje não quebra porque o script não chama o `src/server.ts`. Se trocar, vai falhar.
3.  **PWA dist faltando**
    *   `bin/run_pwa.sh` procura `apps/lab-256/ui-pwa/dist/index.html` mas a pasta **não existe** no bundle.  
        → Sem PWA pronto out-of-the-box. (Dá pra servir só SSE + JSON por enquanto.)
4.  **Receipts/assinatura** ainda não integrados no Lab\*\* (está só no vendor/logline mega)
    *   Não vi `apps/lab-256/*` escrevendo `receipts.ndjson`/ed25519. Fácil plugar depois dos writes.
5.  **Ambiguidade de “entrypoints” e import paths**
    *   Como tem “antigo” e “novo” lado a lado, próximo passo precisa **escolher 1** e remover o outro pra não confundir CI/scripts.

* * *

O que eu faria agora (patch rápido e seguro)
============================================

**Objetivo**: deixar o K15 **coeso** e “rodável” com a arquitetura nova (config/state/SSE), sem te obrigar a editar nada manualmente.

1.  **Trocar entrypoints dos scripts** (sem mexer no código de servidor):
    *   `bin/run_api.sh` → apontar para `apps/lab-256/api/src/server.ts`
    *   `bin/run_sse.sh` → já está ok (usa `sse/src/server.ts`)
    *   Deixar claro via log qual server foi carregado (service name / nivel de log)
2.  **Incluir `packages/io-atomic/`**
    *   Adicionar o módulo com `atomicWrite`, `appendNdjsonLine`, `rotateIfNeeded`. (São ~60–80 linhas TS; é o que o `src/server.ts` espera.)
3.  **Remover/confinar o entrypoint antigo**
    *   Deixar **só** `api/src/server.ts` e apagar/arquivar `api/server.ts`.
    *   Assim, **uma** fonte de verdade e menos confusão.
4.  **PWA: estratégia mínima**
    *   Enquanto o PWA não vem, expor `/state`, `/metrics`, `/cycles` e `/events` e **usar SSE em um HTML mínimo** (dashboard light) ou acompanhar por **Termux/HTTPie** no iPhone.
    *   (Se quiser, coloco um `apps/lab-256/ui-pwa/static/index.html` simples que assina o SSE e mostra fase/progresso.)
5.  **Receipts (próximo patch)**
    *   Depois do parser/ingest escrever NDJSON, gerar `receipts.ndjson` com `sha256`, `receipt_id`, e (se tiver `LAB_ED25519_PRIV_PEM`), assinar.
    *   Isso fecha o ciclo de **auditabilidade**.

* * *

Como validar (smoke)
====================

*   **API**: `./bin/run_api.sh` → `GET /healthz` deve dar `{ ok: true }`
*   **SSE**: `./bin/run_sse.sh` → `curl -N ":8091/events?topic=ingest"`
*   **Ingest**: `curl -XPOST --data-binary @qualquer.md ":8090/ingest_md?file=qualquer.md"`
    *   Espera: `apps/lab-256/out/` com `*.messages.ndjson`, `*.intents.ndjson`, `*.span_samples.ndjson`, `*.report.json`
    *   SSE deve emitir `event: ingest` (topic `ingest`)
    *   `apps/lab-256/state/snapshots/*.json` ao acionar `POST /trigger_cycle`

* * *

Resposta direta à tua pergunta (“teve muita diferença de um para o outro?”)
===========================================================================

*   **Sim, melhorou**: o K15 já tem **parser v0.2, config unificada, SSE com replay, state single-writer e docs** — isso é a base certa.
*   **O que faltou colar**: alinhar scripts → entrypoints “novos” e **adicionar `io-atomic`**. Sem isso, fica essa sensação de “bundle instalado, mas servindo a versão antiga”.

Se topar, eu te mando na próxima mensagem **os diffs dos 3 arquivos de script** + **`packages/io-atomic/src/index.ts`** (curto) — isso resolve **na hora** os dois maiores gaps (1 & 2) e você já consegue rodar o K15 “novo” sem zíper extra, só sobrescrevendo arquivos no bundle atual.

Quer que eu já te entregue esses 4 patchzinhos agora?

## Prompt:
Mas não tem os 5 instalaveis?

## Response:
Thought for 28s

Boa pergunta — **ainda não**. No K15 a base está pronta (FHS, config central, SSE, state single-writer), mas **os 5 instaláveis não estão gerados**. Abaixo te deixo um kit **completo** para **produzir agora** os cinco `.pkg` no Mac (sem dependências exóticas): usa `pkgbuild`/`productbuild`, `launchd` e os paths FHS que já habilitamos.

Cole esse bloco como arquivos (ele já traz staging, plists, postinstalls, envs). Depois é só rodar `./installers/build_all.sh`.

```bash
# ===== installers/README-INSTALLERS.md =====
# Cinco instaláveis .pkg para macOS (Apple Silicon), prontos para LogLineOS + Lab 256 + Lab 8GB + Extras + PWA.
# Pré-requisitos: macOS, Xcode CLT (pkgbuild/productbuild), Bun (para rodar serviços), repo no layout K15.
# Build:  ./installers/build_all.sh
# Output: ./dist/*.pkg
# Instalar: sudo installer -pkg dist/<nome>.pkg -target /
# Desinstalar (exemplo Lab256): ./installers/uninstall_lab256.sh

# ===== installers/build_all.sh =====
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
DIST="$ROOT/dist"
STAGE="$ROOT/.stage"
mkdir -p "$DIST" "$STAGE"

PKGVER="${PKGVER:-1.0.0}"
ID_BASE="com.voulezvous"

echo "[+] staging payloads…"

# 1) LogLineOS (core)
rm -rf "$STAGE/loglineos"
mkdir -p "$STAGE/loglineos/opt/voulezvous/loglineos/current" \
         "$STAGE/loglineos/etc/voulezvous/loglineos" \
         "$STAGE/loglineos/var/lib/voulezvous/loglineos" \
         "$STAGE/loglineos/var/log/voulezvous/loglineos" \
         "$STAGE/loglineos/Library/LaunchDaemons"
# código (ajuste se o teu bundle usa outra pasta)
rsync -a --exclude node_modules --exclude dist \
  "$ROOT/apps/loglineos/" "$STAGE/loglineos/opt/voulezvous/loglineos/current/"
install -m 0644 "$ROOT/installers/templates/loglineos.env.sample" "$STAGE/loglineos/etc/voulezvous/loglineos/loglineos.env"
install -m 0644 "$ROOT/installers/plists/com.voulezvous.loglineos.api.plist" "$STAGE/loglineos/Library/LaunchDaemons/"
install -m 0755 "$ROOT/installers/scripts/postinstall_loglineos.sh" "$STAGE/loglineos/"

pkgbuild --root "$STAGE/loglineos" \
  --identifier "$ID_BASE.loglineos" \
  --version "$PKGVER" \
  --scripts "$STAGE/loglineos" \
  "$DIST/LogLineOS-$PKGVER.pkg"

# 2) LogLineOS Extras (plugins/policies/apps)
rm -rf "$STAGE/extras"
mkdir -p "$STAGE/extras/opt/voulezvous/loglineos/extras" \
         "$STAGE/extras/etc/voulezvous/loglineos"
rsync -a "$ROOT/packages/loglineos-extras/" "$STAGE/extras/opt/voulezvous/loglineos/extras/" || true
install -m 0644 "$ROOT/installers/templates/extras.manifest.json" "$STAGE/extras/etc/voulezvous/loglineos/extras.manifest.json"
pkgbuild --root "$STAGE/extras" \
  --identifier "$ID_BASE.loglineos.extras" \
  --version "$PKGVER" \
  "$DIST/LogLineOS-Extras-$PKGVER.pkg"

# 3) Lab 256 (master)
rm -rf "$STAGE/lab256"
mkdir -p "$STAGE/lab256/opt/voulezvous/lab256/current" \
         "$STAGE/lab256/etc/voulezvous/lab256" \
         "$STAGE/lab256/var/lib/voulezvous/lab256"/{state,out,archive,snapshots} \
         "$STAGE/lab256/var/log/voulezvous/lab256" \
         "$STAGE/lab256/Library/LaunchDaemons"
rsync -a --exclude node_modules --exclude dist \
  "$ROOT/apps/lab-256/" "$STAGE/lab256/opt/voulezvous/lab256/current/"
install -m 0644 "$ROOT/installers/templates/lab256.env.sample" "$STAGE/lab256/etc/voulezvous/lab256/lab256.env"
install -m 0644 "$ROOT/installers/plists/com.voulezvous.lab256.api.plist" "$STAGE/lab256/Library/LaunchDaemons/"
install -m 0644 "$ROOT/installers/plists/com.voulezvous.lab256.sse.plist" "$STAGE/lab256/Library/LaunchDaemons/"
install -m 0755 "$ROOT/installers/scripts/postinstall_lab256.sh" "$STAGE/lab256/"

pkgbuild --root "$STAGE/lab256" \
  --identifier "$ID_BASE.lab256" \
  --version "$PKGVER" \
  --scripts "$STAGE/lab256" \
  "$DIST/Lab256-$PKGVER.pkg"

# 4) Lab 8GB (worker conectado por Ethernet)
rm -rf "$STAGE/lab8gb"
mkdir -p "$STAGE/lab8gb/opt/voulezvous/lab256/current" \
         "$STAGE/lab8gb/etc/voulezvous/lab256" \
         "$STAGE/lab8gb/Library/LaunchDaemons"
rsync -a --exclude node_modules --exclude dist \
  "$ROOT/apps/lab-256/" "$STAGE/lab8gb/opt/voulezvous/lab256/current/"
install -m 0644 "$ROOT/installers/templates/lab8gb.env.sample" "$STAGE/lab8gb/etc/voulezvous/lab256/lab256.env"
install -m 0644 "$ROOT/installers/plists/com.voulezvous.lab8gb.bridge.plist" "$STAGE/lab8gb/Library/LaunchDaemons/"
install -m 0755 "$ROOT/installers/scripts/postinstall_lab8gb.sh" "$STAGE/lab8gb/"

pkgbuild --root "$STAGE/lab8gb" \
  --identifier "$ID_BASE.lab8gb" \
  --version "$PKGVER" \
  --scripts "$STAGE/lab8gb" \
  "$DIST/Lab8GB-$PKGVER.pkg"

# 5) PWA (dashboard leve com SSE)
rm -rf "$STAGE/pwa"
mkdir -p "$STAGE/pwa/opt/voulezvous/lab256/ui" \
         "$STAGE/pwa/Library/LaunchDaemons"
# Se já existir build, copia; senão instala um HTML mínimo
if [ -d "$ROOT/apps/lab-256/ui-pwa/dist" ]; then
  rsync -a "$ROOT/apps/lab-256/ui-pwa/dist/" "$STAGE/pwa/opt/voulezvous/lab256/ui/"
else
  mkdir -p "$STAGE/pwa/opt/voulezvous/lab256/ui"
  cp "$ROOT/installers/templates/pwa-index.html" "$STAGE/pwa/opt/voulezvous/lab256/ui/index.html"
fi
install -m 0644 "$ROOT/installers/plists/com.voulezvous.lab256.pwa.plist" "$STAGE/pwa/Library/LaunchDaemons/"
install -m 0755 "$ROOT/installers/scripts/postinstall_pwa.sh" "$STAGE/pwa/"

pkgbuild --root "$STAGE/pwa" \
  --identifier "$ID_BASE.lab256.pwa" \
  --version "$PKGVER" \
  --scripts "$STAGE/pwa" \
  "$DIST/Lab256-PWA-$PKGVER.pkg"

echo "[✓] pacotes em $DIST:"
ls -1 "$DIST"

# ===== installers/plists/com.voulezvous.loglineos.api.plist =====
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0"><dict>
  <key>Label</key><string>com.voulezvous.loglineos.api</string>
  <key>ProgramArguments</key>
  <array>
    <string>/usr/bin/env</string><string>bash</string><string>-lc</string>
    <string>cd /opt/voulezvous/loglineos/current && bun run api/src/server.ts</string>
  </array>
  <key>RunAtLoad</key><true/>
  <key>KeepAlive</key><true/>
  <key>StandardOutPath</key><string>/var/log/voulezvous/loglineos/api.out.log</string>
  <key>StandardErrorPath</key><string>/var/log/voulezvous/loglineos/api.err.log</string>
</dict></plist>

# ===== installers/plists/com.voulezvous.lab256.api.plist =====
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist …><plist version="1.0"><dict>
  <key>Label</key><string>com.voulezvous.lab256.api</string>
  <key>ProgramArguments</key>
  <array>
    <string>/usr/bin/env</string><string>bash</string><string>-lc</string>
    <string>cd /opt/voulezvous/lab256/current && LAB256_INSTALLED=1 bun run api/src/server.ts</string>
  </array>
  <key>EnvironmentVariables</key>
  <dict>
    <key>LAB256_INSTALLED</key><string>1</string>
  </dict>
  <key>RunAtLoad</key><true/><key>KeepAlive</key><true/>
  <key>StandardOutPath</key><string>/var/log/voulezvous/lab256/api.out.log</string>
  <key>StandardErrorPath</key><string>/var/log/voulezvous/lab256/api.err.log</string>
</dict></plist>

    <string>cd /opt/voulezvous/lab256/current && LAB256_INSTALLED=1 bun run sse/src/server.ts</string>
  </array>
  <key>EnvironmentVariables</key><dict><key>LAB256_INSTALLED</key><string>1</string></dict>

</dict></plist>

# ===== installers/plists/com.voulezvous.lab8gb.bridge.plist =====
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist …><plist version="1.0"><dict>

  <array>
    <string>/usr/bin/env</string><string>bash</string><string>-lc</string>

  </array>

  <dict>
    <key>LAB256_INSTALLED</key><string>1</string>
    <key>LAB256_ROLE</key><string>worker</string>

  </dict>

  <key>StandardOutPath</key><string>/var/log/voulezvous/lab256/bridge.out.log</string>
  <key>StandardErrorPath</key><string>/var/log/voulezvous/lab256/bridge.err.log</string>
</dict></plist>

# ===== installers/plists/com.voulezvous.lab256.pwa.plist =====
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

  <array>
```
